reviews.author: Darice Rose
reviews.text:
What a lovely third space!

We met a friend to explore a “new” neighborhood for long-time city dwellers.

The coffee (Tanbrown Coffee) was delicious by snob standards and the tea was well-brewed too. The egg sandwiches were soul-filling.

Most importantly, the service was gracious and attentive fostering a sense of warmth and community.

Absolutely will revisit.

reviews.author: Taylor Stroud
reviews.text:
$10 for just milk basically. Unfortunately the most poorly made matcha I’ve ever had. A bit confused because i saw it hand whisked in person and not sure why it’s a pale green (especially compared to authentic matcha & the matcha photos they market online)
I’d be willing to give them another shot if the prices weren’t so insane

reviews.author: Kat
reviews.text: Located in a nice neighborhood with free parking right next door. Food and coffee were delicious! Great quiet vibes during the day.

reviews.author: Julia Z
reviews.text: A really nice coffee shop to get some work done with good drinks and food. The blueberry matcha was amazing, not overly sweet once mixed together. Turkey club was huge, its double decker. The egg sandwich I couldn’t even open my mouth big enough to get a full bite but was hot and fresh and very delicious. The staff was so kind as well, we talked with them for a bit and they were honestly really lovely people. Good WiFi, nice bathrooms, overall nice place to hang for a little.

reviews.author: Hannah Schobert
reviews.text: Amazing coffee and food! Super friendly staff! Lovely vibes. What more do you want from a coffee shop, truly?

address: 2788 Forrest Hills Dr SW, Atlanta, Georgia, 30315
google_address: 2788 Forrest Hills Dr SW, Atlanta, GA 30315, USA

reviews.author: Ahquila L
reviews.text: ROACH INFESTED. The night is cheap $90 for two twin beds. The rooms are very small. Stains on the sheets, only one thin top sheet provided, tiny bathroom that looks dingy. And worst of all there are tiny roaches. After staying out for a few hours I saw one on the sink almost as soon as I returned. Picked up my shoe and a roach fell out of it and onto the bed. Poor lighting so it’s hard to find them and kill it. The other guests are loud and tweaking. Loads of trash around the building. The front desk people are polite and they offer a suspicious looking case of overpriced snacks. Refunds are not allowed regardless of how disgusting the rooms are. The manager himself told me he doesn’t care politely. He’s willing to change the room but even the neighbors could be heard spraying raid with the door open. The description should honestly state there are roaches since they don’t care in my opinion.

reviews.author: MOONIE
reviews.text: Everything already seemed sketchy once I arrived with a friend of mines. I thought nothing of it and went ahead and got the room, once we were walking up the stairs it smelled like pee and it was very strong. We get to the door and unlock it but once we looked down there were roaches scattering in the cracks. Once we got inside there were more roaches crawling up the walls and onto the beds and pillows. There were even roaches in the bathroom. This place was so freaking disgusting and I will not be coming back. They don’t offer any types of refunds either.

reviews.author: Julietta Phillips
reviews.text: I drive trucks, I don't have a place I can call home.  But being here felt like home, I was able to rest so I can get back out there and work.  It's quiet, the rooms are comfy, and service is great.  I read other reviews but it's the company ppl keep.  I will 100% stay here again

reviews.author: MZ TANYALE
reviews.text: Great place for short / long term living with spacious rooms and very well kept. Staff is amazingly friendly. Close to so many different restaurants and stores literally in walking distance. Check them Out very reasonable.

reviews.author: Tyshay
reviews.text: They are very nice staff. They are trying to help give affordable rooms. Great for when you are in a bind. Older hotel but Great people and off the expressway for convenience.

google_name: Double Scoop Ice Cream Atlanta (Drive-Thru Only)
address: 3455 Martin Luther King Jr Dr SW, Atlanta, Georgia, 30331
google_address: 3455 M.L.K. Jr Dr SW, Atlanta, GA 30331, USA

reviews.author: Ari Holt
reviews.text:
Saw a social media post about this place, on a site I rarely visit, and couldn't believe how close it was to me! The young man working the drive thru was polite, and easy to understand. I ordered something a little out of the ordinary for me, but it sounded great on the menu.

The Rum Cake Sundae is very, very delicious. The cake was nice and warm under the ice cream, flavorful and sweet, but not so sweet that the ice cream had to compete with it. Worth the value for sure!

Also, the location is soooo cute, and there's even dairy free  / vegan options! Black owned and delicious, I'll be back too soon.

reviews.author: Christopher
reviews.text: You won't believe the hidden gem I found! The customer service is absolutely amazing, and the ice cream is incredibly creamy and flavorful. This place easily has the best customer service on the entire west side of Atlanta! I feel so lucky to live just around the corner. The ice cream scoops are massive, and it's super kid-friendly! My absolute favorite is the unforgettable combination of rum-raisin and cake sundae. This place is a must-visit!

reviews.author: Carol Lindsey
reviews.text: Exceptional flavors and options! This is gourmand level deliciousness. The banana pudding flavor is epic! My nephews LOVED the mint chocolate chip and Cookie Monster flavors!

reviews.author: Olandha Miller
reviews.text: Double Scoop experience was AMAZING!! The building is so cute and really matches the theme and the customer service was A1! My favorite flavor this go round was the graham central station & coffee.

reviews.author: Katie Akins
reviews.text: Delicious, Delicious, Delicious!!! I cannot say enough amazing things about Double Scoop! First, the ice cream is yummy! They have so many choices! I am def going to visit weekly to make sure I try every flavor. The prices are super reasonable too! I always have such a wonderful experience with the team that’s working. So kind. And, most of all, I love supporting local, small businesses that are run by women! Please visit Double Scoop! You won’t be disappointed!! So far my favorites flavors are Banana Pudding, Birthday Cake, Peach Cobbler, and Brownie Batter!

google_address: 2260 Cascade Rd, Atlanta, GA 30311, USA

reviews.author: Pamela The Islandgirl
reviews.text: Neighborhood church-run eatery. Soul food at it's best. Absolutely 💯 percent worth the drive out to S.W. Atlanta (they also have an in town location). Line service like a Picadilly. Muslim healthy fare like veggie plate is so filling. Have had that before.. Nonetheless less this time we just had to get the fried catfish. The portions are sizeable and the line servers are so nice and friendly. It's like your Grandma fixin' your plate at the stove. They do have a small outdoor patio too.

reviews.author: Hannah G.
reviews.text: We tried the Beautiful Restaurant yesterday and absolutely loved it. Just an absolutely delicious home-cooked meal, pure comfort food, good for the soul. The ribs were falling off the bone, so flavorful. The dressing, the mac and cheese, the collards. All absolutely unreal!  Everybody was so friendly—the diners, the team, the manager. There was such a sense of community. We will definitely be back.

reviews.author: Frank Gray
reviews.text: Soul food/country cooking done right!! They've been at it a long long time so you know they're doing it right! The nicest folks too! Everything was so great!

reviews.author: Shaunic S
reviews.text: It was alright. This was my first visit and I won't hold my breath to return. I do like that they require your pants to be worn correctly to be served!!

reviews.author: Ahmad Walker
reviews.text: I visited on 8-3-2025. This restaurant is a Historic Soul Food Treasure! I looked at the menu on the website before I went here. I've been chilling off the beef for months. I've been eating chicken lately so I needed a change. They had a beef short rib plate for me and I got a oxtail plate for Mom. I got dressing with Mac and cheese and cornbread. I got mom mac and cheese with yams and oxtails and cornbread. The food is delicious! One of the best meals I ever had since I've been in the area. Pull up and support. Just be sure to leave me some food. I might just pull up before to make sure that I'm good. Established in 1979 and still going strong!

address: 3451 Atlanta Industrial Pkwy NW, Atlanta, Georgia, 30331
google_address: 3451 Atlanta Industrial Pkwy NW, Atlanta, GA 30331, USA

reviews.author: Jason P
reviews.text: Wow, it’s pretty pathetic and very thin skinned for the owner to respond with petty remarks. I’ve never done business nor worked there but with this childish behavior , I wouldn’t want to. The responses are laughable

reviews.author: April Stetter
reviews.text: Came here to pickup a load. The gentleman in the shipping office is extremely nice and very professional! I was 2 1/2 hours late for my appointment time due to truck issues. He said no worries, stuff happens and gave me a door right away. He was very directive of signing of paperwork. Got a full load, he had me loaded in less than an hour. Thank you sir for the professionalism. Alot of shippers need to take point from this man!

reviews.author: J.C Squad
reviews.text: Only PU one pallet but was in and out in 3 minutes. You know in this business some places take 3 hours no matter if you getting one pallet or a whole truck load. I appreciate that guys

reviews.author: Ginger Boss
reviews.text: I placed an online order and received this product in my groceries. Once I opened the tortillas, it was clear the batch I received was defected as there were 2 diagonal cuts that made a triangle on each tortilla. I called and left a message to receive assistance. After a week went by, I logged onto the website and submitted an inquiry through the "contact us" section. Two weeks later still no response. Very disappointed.

reviews.author: Jose Pellot
reviews.text: I went there about two weeks ago. I got there 2 Hr earlier than my appt. I got loaded in and out with in 1 Hr.

google_address: 1095 Ralph David Abernathy Blvd SW, Atlanta, GA 30310, USA

reviews.author: N R
reviews.text: I stopped by this location because I was craving fish. I decided to get fish fries and shrimps. I don't eat ketchup or cocktail sauce so I asked for more than 2 small cups of tater. Cashier said I can only get 2 per order. I offered to pay extra the said no. I asked for a refund. I'm thinking to myself the manager will give me a refund instead making some extra dollars. What business turning down money? Bay breeze it is. I just wanted something quick. Thanks Captain ds for letting me know quick is no longer the way to go. I can only imagine how much business y'all lose.

reviews.author: Heaven Sent
reviews.text: This captain D’s the worst ! Stop saying they open at 10:30 cause they don’t ! They never open and when they do it’s when they want to  ! Metropolitan and west end captains D the freaking worse literally! Quit false advertising yall time !

reviews.author: Akira Marshall
reviews.text: August 17 Sunday night I went to get some food from here before taking it in for the night !I sat at the speaker for 15 minutes saying hello. Nobody said anything pulled around to the window to see three people inside. There were cars in front of me so I do understand that they were busy, so I  parked and went inside so I can order And everyone walked past me i stood there for another 10 minutes. Nobody said anything nobody told me to wait or to give them time or asked me what I wanted so I just left !! very unprofessional to not speak at all or not even address me !!! even though you guys are busy!!  I don’t recommend coming here at night And also if coperate reads this you YOU NEED MORE/BETTER STAFF !!!

reviews.author: Brox Ringstaff
reviews.text: I passed by and thought Ahh Captain D’s I haven’t had them in so long I wonder Why🤔…I Ordered The 2 piece Fish and 2 Chicken combo coleslaw and fries with the “lobster “ bites hush puppies $15 only thing that was Mediocre was the Fish planks I couldn’t even eat it am I too Good for Food like this …. The answer is Yes just to keep it clean look at Pic am I tripping?!?

reviews.author: Destinee Parker
reviews.text:
Just took super long in the drive thru. Otherwise food, temperature taste & the whole 9 were expectational... service was decent, & plenty of parking to stop and eat before hitting the road again was a bonus. All in all I was pleased 😄 Happy plate everytime I visit this Captain D's location.
PS the sweet tea is phenomenal 😁

google_address: 176 Fairburn Rd SW, Atlanta, GA 30331, USA

reviews.author: Tenea London
reviews.text: Although a nice place to hang out and chill, when asked for water the waitress said that I had to purchase.   I thought it was by law that if you served alcohol that you aldi had to serve water.   I'm asking for a friend 🙄.  Music is good.   Service is great..... but when I need water!!!  And it's not expensive.... but that's not my point!

reviews.author: Shannon Baker Rhodes
reviews.text: Small place, older, but great DJs, music, dancing, drinks and service. The owner Mr. JR is there every night to greet and compliment his customers. That's something you don't ever see.. Makes it a #1 respected place.

reviews.author: yett charla
reviews.text: Very dirty bathrooms. Dirty bars.....i miss Jr back in the day...but the dj is Awesome! I used to love to go on Sundays. Not sure if they're still open then

reviews.author: Salathia Beckham
reviews.text: I love this place. The repass was absolutely EPIC! I am certain that anything they host will be great. The owners are wonderful kind people.

reviews.author: Nacory Wright
reviews.text: Mika is the best bartender at the front bar on Thursdays . Nice vibe older crowd but younger people fit in well also .

address: 3181 Donald Lee Hollowell Pkwy NW, Atlanta, Georgia, 30318
google_address: 3181 Donald Lee Hollowell Pkwy NW, Atlanta, GA 30318, USA

reviews.author: Derrick Selvage
reviews.text: The location is ok for the city. The parking lot is huge but is usually full early part of the evening. The shower experience tonight was totally despicable. I have never walked into a supposedly clean shower, and found a dirty toilet that could not have been missed by the chamber maid. The splatter rode up the back of the toilet bowl and continued to the toilet seat itself. The top cover of the toilet seat was up so there was no way it could have been missed or overlooked. My shower was changed to a new one after alerting the front cashier manager. Even after I received a new shower room, I still felt traumatized and nasty just being inside of the closed in shower room from what I had previously saw. This the is first time in my 25 years of my OTR career, that I have ever walked into a shower room at the Peteo or TA and found such filth left behind.

reviews.author: Jim Van Namen
reviews.text: Had to stop here because traffic was backed up and didn’t have enough time to make it to Loves in Calhoun. Was shocked by the price of parking but was told it was covered with a qualifying purchase of 30.00. So got something to eat at Iron Skillet. Meal was decent but 3.99 for a Pepsi? For that price I should be able to fill my thermos. Everyone I interacted with in the store and the restaurant were polite and courteous. My meal and a shower covered the $30 but was curious why parking is $25 but had to spend $30 in the store. Although my experience here rated 3 stars because of the employees, I will not stop here again because of the prices. When you compare the pricing between here at TA with Loves (which has free parking, cleaner showers,and reasonable prices for in store items) and Pilot (which has free and reserved parking for $15-$20, cleaner showers, and reasonable prices for snacks and other items) TA needs to re-evaluate their pricing for this location. But given the fact that this location generates so much revenue just on parking fees I doubt prices will do nothing except increase. Another factor TA management should consider is having a security car patrol the parking lot. For the price of parking I’m sure they can afford it.

reviews.author: Dominique Ward
reviews.text: I came into this location for fuel and I had a very pleasant experience with Miss Jovann! She has a very calm & kind spirit. Super friendly to everyone she encountered. It’s not often you find workers like her at gas stations, let alone anywhere so I had to give her recognition! Thank you again Miss Jovann!

reviews.author: Yordan Rodriguez
reviews.text:
1. A place with over 400 truck parking spaces supposedly has some free ones—free if you spend $25 in the store. "Free" isn't really free; they're forcing you to pay.

2. These "free" parking spaces are never available because of the immense size of this city (Atlanta, GA) and the severe lack of truck parking, which is essential for keeping the city running.

3. If you manage to park in a reserved space, they no longer "validate" your parking ticket. You're now required to pay for it, and not only that, it now costs $28.

4. At the very least, they should include a shower with the purchase of a reserved parking space.

Respect and gratitude for truckers have been lost. The effort of many who, despite being away from their families for days at a time, have nowhere to park and rest safely is no longer valued.

reviews.author: Edmund Falk
reviews.text:
would be nice if the staff
A. new how to use or have the miniscule amount of ambition to use the Utra One points system when I prefer to use my Ultra One points to pay for reserve parking rather than my own money.
B. did proper inventory so they dont run out of things us truckdriver consider essential like you know.... COFFEE!!! COFFEE CREAMER.... steak at the iron skillet

google_address: 2096 Metropolitan Pkwy SW, Atlanta, GA 30315, USA

reviews.author: Jalisa Smith
reviews.text: Horrible customer service from the lady at the first drive thru window with the blue locs! I spend too much money at Wendy’s to be treated nasty! I will pray for her and whatever she is going through, however, the young lady with the glasses at the second drive thru window has excellent customer service as well as the tall young man with the earrings in his ear and nice voice, great job!

reviews.author: Bre
reviews.text: worst Wendy’s i ever been to & i don’t even eat Wendy’s often .. only by cravings but today at 3:40 i came to this location & they had NO CUSTOMERS .. should’ve been the first red flag ugh . We ordered  2 $5 biggie bags jr bacon cheeseburger meals . We pay at the first window & get to the second window for them to tell us the only had spicy nuggets available at the time . I get home , mind you i stay next door the nuggets are HARD AS A ROCK AND THE BURGERS HAD NO BACON , fries were stale . I hate spending my money at places that half do their job idc if my meal was 1.50 i worked hard for it and they get paid to do a job correctly NOT HALF DONE 🤦🏽‍♀️ i will neverrrr return , im going to McDonald’s from now on

reviews.author: Jason Bernard
reviews.text: Give me wrong order and refuse to correct order or refund money had to dispute charge. Terrible customer service bunch of teens working and running store. In-store hours not accurate either

reviews.author: Blake Graham
reviews.text:
The employees on 6/22/2025 at 12AM were fantastic. This was my first time ordering from this Wendy’s and I was very skeptical as most fast food service in Atlanta is horrid. Looking at you Taco Bell.

They were kind, quick and efficient. I will be ordering here again. Give these people a raise.

reviews.author: BOBBI ANN JONES
reviews.text:
Why don't they place the sign where it can be seen from the street?? I wouldn't waste my time driving in just to see the sign saying the dining room is closed for maintenance ON THE DOOR!! Wendy’s doesn't value my time!! I would drive on by I hate the drive through it allows people to make mistakes being in a hurry no thanks!! All the store going to tell you is how sorry they are!! I don't want to hear that periodt!!
I don't want nor have a lot of stuff put on my food so waiting inside instead of the drive through period!! Nobody pays for my gas!!
I went by the location on yesterday Thursday July 24th wasting my time to find out their dining room is STILL CLOSED FOR MAINTENANCE!! Shame on you Wendy’s stop wasting my damn time ..

address: 1380 W Marietta St NW, Atlanta, Georgia, 30318

google_address: 2841 Greenbriar Pkwy SW, Atlanta, GA 30331, USA

reviews.author: Dylan DeLeon
reviews.text:
I don’t understand why there’s so many bad reviews!
Food was great! We got the bacon burger, chicken tenders, fries, and mozzarella sticks.
Everything was good, especially the burger!
The wait for our food was long, I will say that, and the shake machine was down (like many others said.)
But overall, good first experience!

reviews.author: Beyoutifully Gifted
reviews.text: Service sucks here. I placed a mobile order for pick up and after waiting for more than 30 minutes, I was advised that someone else picked up my order from the drive-through line. I explained that only I was supposed to pick up the order that I placed on the app and eventually the staff began to prepare my order again. I was at this establishment way too long for a big Buford and a regular fry. I should’ve been refunded for my time that was wasted… But instead, I had to wait longer for them to prepare the order again.  If I never have to return here again, that would be too soon

reviews.author: VICTORIA SANDOVAL
reviews.text: Google says it opens at 10am, drove up at 10:05am and a young lady comes on the speaker to say they’re not open yet and to give them 15 minutes. Understandable, maybe they’re still getting things ready and turning machines on. I pull away and park nearby and come back at 10:30am. This time, a young man comes on the speaker and says, “no, we’re not open yet.” Very disappointing.

reviews.author: rr Gaskins
reviews.text: Thursday afternoon 9-18 after I had a bad experience at KFC I stopped at Checker's to get a burger and was told they were closed... I went back to the car and a guy pulled up and said are they closed again today again at 4pm. The guy went tro the window and a gentleman said we'll open up again at 5p. Meanwhile they were fixing food for a group of kids sitteing at the picnic table. Apparently it was one of the employees children and they were trying to get them situated. The guy said he would come back later and maybe they would be opened. Meanwhile cars were being told they were closed in the drive thru. I went to Kroger and bought hamburger patties and I fixed my own food. I won't be back to this location at all.

reviews.author: Lakeisha Allison
reviews.text: My food was hot and tasted fresh. Also, the guy working the drive thru was so nice and my food was ready pretty quick for it to be later in the night.

google_address: 3 Joseph E Lowery Blvd SW, Atlanta, GA 30314, USA

reviews.author: Lucian J
reviews.text: This place is trash in a way that characterizes a lot of wing spots in ATL these days. We ordered wings and shrimp (they were out of the whiting I wanted and the hushpuppies). They had one person both taking orders AND cooking. She made a horrible attempt at coconut shrimp using what tastes like old/used grease. The wings were incredibly bland and tasted like they’re using old chicken. The fries were also stale and dried out. They don’t deserve to be in business if this is how they operate-this is practically theft.

reviews.author: Sean White
reviews.text: Hands down top 3 best, somebody on here can't hold water too...why tell that they gave you more than you paid for??? See that's exactly how things get messed up out here, talk too dmn much bruh. Lol but yeah fasho a banger

reviews.author: Fran Thomas
reviews.text:
The Abundance of fries! The size of the wings is why i drive to get them. Perfect, not huge steroid looking. Combo is fairly price, friendly people, fast service.
Great hours of operation & live community action. My favorite wings place!

reviews.author: Sujai Reddy
reviews.text: Dude misheard my order but corrected it when I came back later. Polite and pretty nice service. I liked the food. Certainly not winning any Michelin Stars anytime soon but it's pretty decent food at a decent price.

reviews.author: T. Laurice Bagby
reviews.text: I stay 5 minutes walking distance I'm here twice a week. The wings are some of the best around

google_address: 2284 Cascade Rd, Atlanta, GA 30311, USA

reviews.author: Chris Magana
reviews.text: This place was amazing! I've never had food like this! The lady that took our order made us feel like we were family! So much hospitality it was amazing. They were even gracious enough to let us sit and eat! But the food, my goodness. The best soul food cooking I've ever had in my life! The mac-n-cheese, chicken, ox tail, the greens, on and on but the cornbread 👌 amazing! Do yourself a favor if you're in Atlanta stop and enjoy this euphoria in the south!

reviews.author: Piffy93
reviews.text:
I’m a Georgia native and had this place for the first time in 30 years of living. My goodness. Real soul food. They season it enough where it’s not too salty. I would add pepper to my Mac and cheese and a little pepper to my greens but that’s it!! I was cussing myself out eating at the same time it was so good!

I don’t know WHO IS BACK THERE STIRRING UP THAT PUDDING BUT THANK YOU! NO BOX PUDDING. Just like granny. This place is amazing.

reviews.author: Jamar Hill
reviews.text: Great food and even better customer service!! I ordered the bbq beef short ribs with rice, collard greens, and candied yams with a corn muffin and a large sweet tea. The ribs were tender and very savory 10/10, the collard greens were just right but I would like to have the turkey meat that they cooked it with in them next time 8.5/10, the yams were sweet, tasteful, and cooked just right not to soft and not to firm 9/10, the corn muffin was ok but still good went nice with the short rib a little bit of rice and collard greens together but I give the corn muffin a 7/10. And I can’t forget the sweet tea 9/10 it was super good. The customer service was exceptionally good the lady at the register was super nice and she’s originally from Jamaica and helped me with my order and was very patient with me while I was reading over their menu 10/10. The price was fair and I’ll be going back to try their desserts😋.

reviews.author: V R
reviews.text: The service was fast and efficient. We arrived around twelve noon. The food was hot freshly cooked. I had the Mac n cheese, black eye peas, whiting and collard greens. The fish was seasoned very slightly. The mac n cheese and the peas were ok. The staff were friendly. I was told about this place that everything is good. I would agree it was ok. It was flavorful enough to eat. I enjoyed the cornbread.

reviews.author: Shon H
reviews.text: Good spot to grab some quality soul food on the go. I usually get the fried wings but I tried the meatloaf this time. Let’s just say , I’ll stick with the fried wings going forward.  Service (the line) moves a little slow at times but overall i recommend.

google_address: 2885 Lakewood Ave SW, Atlanta, GA 30315, USA

reviews.author: S. Kelly
reviews.text: I’ve been looking for a place to enjoy a great breakfast with matching service and I’ve found one. The pancakes, eggs and bacon were made as if I made them myself. Superb. The waitresses that work there are great, especially Destiny. I found this diner through a referral and when I called for a pickup order and Destiny answered, I knew this place was different. I’ve been there ever since. Thank you Destiny, you are truly outstanding. You were the catalyst that brought me to their satisfying catfish.

reviews.author: Happy Mr Farmer
reviews.text:
The staff was friendly and very patient. I highly recommend the red velvet cake. I killed it before my breakfast food came out lol
It was so good that I won another slice, but I decided to prioritize my health. What’s the point of working out if you eat too many sweets?
I would definitely attend again.

reviews.author: Grace Hawkins
reviews.text: It's not bad for the price.  Service was great.

reviews.author: Latonya Burkes
reviews.text: The service was great the food is my, the grits were nasty and not done I've been given undercooked grits I should have known something was wrong when I was give extra salt and pepper. The eggs were okay they lack flavor and that biscuit warmed in the grill along with a teeny  tiny sausage cut in two. I'll try most things once, I'll never come back

reviews.author: Brent Williams
reviews.text: Lakewood Diner gives you that classic hometown diner feel with food that always hits the spot. 🍳 The breakfasts are hearty, the coffee is strong, and the portions are generous. Their menu has all the comfort food favorites, and everything tastes fresh and homemade. The staff is friendly, attentive, and makes you feel welcome the moment you walk in. Whether it’s breakfast, lunch, or a late-night bite, Lakewood Diner never disappoints!

google_address: 881 Donald Lee Hollowell Pkwy NW, Atlanta, GA 30318, USA

reviews.author: R. P. (Google)
reviews.text: I'm not sure how you forget the bread on a catfish sandwich but that's what they did. It's literally 1 of 2  ingredients & one was left off my order. I tried to speak with the lady in the front about a glitch in DoorDash, she was only concerned with getting me out the door so she could serve the next person. I should've know better tryna explain something to a black woman, conversations never go well with the majority of them. Anyway the fish was seasoned very good & it was cooked great. Just wish I could've gotten my entire sandwich. Considering I'll never go back, I know these folks could care less. I tried to be nice person, it didn't go so well so now we're here.

reviews.author: Kevin Zeng
reviews.text:
Clean place, close to university, not too busy, ton of place to seat and visited by locals.

The food is very good  and I appreciate the soul food on my trip here again.

The best thing is the fried fish which isn’t on the lunch menu. Price is a bit high though

The green isn’t that great but it’s the only veggie.

reviews.author: BOBBI ANN JONES
reviews.text: The food is great always a good selection and everything is fresh!! The staff always so friendly and helpful. They have a lot of options to choose from. And desserts to die for!! A good bargain for the money and your full with plenty leftover!! I love K & K Soul Food keeps me healthy with their selections!! Whomever is doing the greens please less spicy I hate spicy stuff!! I came in 10/22/25 and the greens were extra spicy everything else was great as usual!!

reviews.author: A Kennedy
reviews.text: We're from out of town and wanted to try some genuine southern style food.  We're glad we stopped!  Everyone in our family raved about their food orders.  Everything was delicious and portions were generous enough to have leftovers to take back to the hotel.  All the staff was very friendly and helpful.  While we were eating in the dining room, Chef Curtis came out to make sure all the patrons were enjoying their meals.  Prices were reasonable for the amount of food you get.  We loved it!

reviews.author: Nicole Jackson
reviews.text: Our last day in ATL we decided to try this restaurant. The place was packed. The fried chicken wings were GREAT. The mac & cheese was dry( We prefer creamy Mac) and the peach cobbler crust was still very doughy. The sweet tea was a little too sweet even for my husband who loves super sweet tea. The staff was friendly and the restaurant was clean. Should we return we will try something different.

address: 868 Joseph E Boone Blvd NW, Atlanta, Georgia, 30314
google_address: 868 Joseph E. Boone Blvd NW, Atlanta, GA 30314, USA

reviews.author: Alicia L
reviews.text:
What a night! The wings were delicious, the drinks were strong and on point, and the owner was super friendly and present. My friends from out of town and I had such a blast at the show — the music was absolutely top-notch and kept the energy going all night. 🎶✨

The space itself is awesome too, with different rooms that each have their own vibe. If you’re looking for great music, fun people, and an unforgettable night out, this is definitely the spot. 🌈🥂

reviews.author: Garrick Tv
reviews.text:
Hands down the #1 gay after-hours spot in Atlanta! The energy is unmatched — great music, great people, and the vibe is always right. The food and drinks are top-tier every single time, and the service is just as amazing.

I especially have to shout out Uzii, my server — super attentive, friendly, and made sure my friends and I were taken care of all night. You can really tell they care about the guests having a great time. If you haven’t been yet, you’re missing out — this is the place to be after hours in Atlanta! 🌈🔥

reviews.author: BIGSEXY
reviews.text:
This establishment is poorly ran in my opinion, they only take cash! That alone was a inconvenience from the jump, entry was $20 …a bit much considering the ambiance BUT i digress, walking in it is Nothing too special to see … but u can tell its a well loved spot !! I can see how people catch a vibe … there is alot of space to roam and chill !… anywho this review is for CUSTOMER SERVICE 🤨 Which they lacked, i work in customer service so I am Big on it! And im also understanding on both ends! i ordered mozzarella sticks and it didn’t come w/ marinara sauce 🧐… thinking she forgot it,  I went and asked for some and she said they didnt have any……. Ok so That should be something you tell your customer before they place their order ☺️☺️☺️☺️… plus she said it rude like i was inconveniencing her 😂 ok cool, when  i asked for something in exchange of them because i personally wouldnt eat them without marinara …i was told no they couldnt do that 👎🏻  so i asked why and The response was dry and short and lacked professionalism! 👎🏻 it immediately put a bad taste in my mouth for the establishment !! …I was so bothered by the response that I went to try to find a “manager” I will say the manager TIRED to resolve the issue by giving me a drink, which was appreciated but at the end of the day …the exchange with the staff made my first experience/first time here underwhelming !

One thing Atlanta is known for is BAD customer service and places like this is why!! Maybe i came on a bad night 😂 i wont be returning but i wish the business the best !!! 💋😊

reviews.author: Markees Webb
reviews.text: Marquette Night Club was absolutely amazing! The atmosphere was electric, the music kept the crowd moving all night, and the energy was unmatched. The staff was friendly and professional, making sure everything ran smoothly. The drinks were on point, and the vibe made it the perfect spot to let loose and enjoy yourself. Definitely one of the best nightlife experiences I’ve had—I’ll be back for sure!

reviews.author: Marquette
reviews.text: Hello everyone thank you all for your honest opinions the Marquette is under new management and we look forward to bettering the experience for customers who have not had the best time time. We also plan to keep up the the positive things that you all love and expect from us. Please continue to leave reviews as we further our journey as the eldest and most legendary lgbtq+ night live spot in Atlanta ⭐️❤️

address: 2517 Donald Lee Hollowell Pkwy NW, Atlanta, Georgia, 30318
google_address: 2517 Donald Lee Hollowell Pkwy NW, Atlanta, GA 30318, USA

reviews.author: Silver Dollar
reviews.text: This is a fun, fun place. They have the best drinks in All of Georgia! Facts!! The woman are super bad! Im'a bring my son here for Christmas and I'm going to bring all my brother's here for New Year's to bring in the New Year like a King does! If you never been go check this establishment out ASAP, you will be glad you did

reviews.author: Unique Patrick
reviews.text: Visiting from Colorado, I dont know how I ended up here on a friday night..............my sister....😂. Wasn't bad, but it was different. Loved the bar tender for sure. I stayed by the bar and tipped her all night because the drinks were good. Me and sis got a good ole buzz with those long island iced T's.

reviews.author: Rick
reviews.text: This place is NO LONGER open!! The building just sits there, and they refuse to sale it to my nonprofit organization, which mission is to save & change lives of our young black youths!! This is why we'll continue to lose our sisters and brothers to gun violence! We've got to stop being selfish!

reviews.author: Mella M
reviews.text: This club has shut down years ago. It’s completely empty. Smh please take this down google. I waisted 35 minutes on gas driving here.

reviews.author: Slick Miti
reviews.text: Nice spot to go kick your s#&t at especially if you are a out of towner it'll give you that own city vibe

google_address: 2685 Metropolitan Pkwy SW Ste. H1, Atlanta, GA 30315, USA

reviews.author: Squirrel G
reviews.text: Guess I'll start going to the location on Camp Creek.... I spent over thirty dollars on two large pizzas and Oreo bites. I received one large pizza, one medium pizza. Neither included the pepperoncini, or garlic sauce. Oreo bites didn't include cream cheese icing. These items are included with the purchase. The service has been on a decline for quite some time, and now you can't even get what you pay for. Perhaps if they hired folks that can retain what they read, we wouldn't have to pay the price for it. I work quite hard for ever penny I earn and this is a blatant slap in the face.

reviews.author: Goddess Purity
reviews.text:
I order my pizza today around 7pm i paid for extra Pepperoncinis with my delivery order , I didn’t receive it, when my pizza arrived it was under cooked , she gave me an option for a refund or remake, I went with a remake due to me just getting off work and didn’t feel like cooking after working 12 hours. I waited for my second delivery for about 45 minutes, when my pizza arrived, they had it drenched
In cheese with less toppings , they only gave me one extra Pepperoncinis for extra fee of 75 cents, when I normally get more..when I called back the manager team member stated I wanted extra cheese when I order extra cheese it’s never this excessive and she told me her manager was not on duty, who is running the shift if no manager is available?

reviews.author: Sarah Smith
reviews.text: I received the wrong order. It had someone else’s name on it.  To top that, the label on the box with the order details wasn’t even what was in the box.  How can someone get so many things wrong ?  Don’t risk ordering delivery. And if you’re picking up double check everything before you leave.

reviews.author: Yum Yumz
reviews.text: Heed these reviews! I went in to grab my food and the 3 employees argued about whether or not there was sauce for my wings. They found it, and I saw the guy put my wings with the wrong order while the young lady tried to help other customers behind me as my food was getting cold. This evening crew needs training and supervision, or just an effective manager. Food was average.

reviews.author: Aunt Esther
reviews.text: I Am giving 5 stars because there is a young lady that works there in the afternoon who has prepared my family's order for the last 3 visits, and each time you can tell that she really cares about the customer. No extra food...it's just that we feel that we get our money's worth. In the past, at other locations, the food seemed to have been haphazardly prepared.

address: 3083 Martin Luther King Jr Dr SW, Atlanta, Georgia, 30311
google_address: 3083 Martin Luther King Junior Drive Northwest, Atlanta, GA 30311, USA

reviews.author: Jim Fletcher
reviews.text: Excellent rib tips!  Linda was nice and reminded us that “hole in the wall” places can be the best. While this spot is no frills, the food was great. Park in the lot and walk up to the window to order. Took less than 10 minutes until our food was ready. Prices are good and there’s good deals for lunch and in certain days.

reviews.author: Thai Boyd
reviews.text:
Pulled up to this spot because I saw a video about it on tiktok. The lady taking orders was so rude, but I was still hopeful the wings would live up to the hype. The wait was an entire hour. I got there at 2:14, order taken at 2:20, order received at 3:20.

When I received my bag thank God I checked it because I asked for blue cheese and none of it was in the bag. The wings honestly looked like they had been sitting out for a while. I know what fresh wings look like.

Apparently I’m not hip to the lingo because I asked for hot lemon pepper and when I saw no lemon pepper on my wings I was informed that I didn’t ask for lemon pepper SPRINKLES 🫩😂. She aggressively shook lemon pepper on top of the wings.

The wings were cheap (Wednesday special), however I do not think they were worth the hour wait + nasty attitude from the lady. Mind you we were standing in the hot sun just to be able to hear our order be announced because she wasn’t able to provide an estimated time of when the food would be ready.

The positive is the wings were small (my preference).

reviews.author: Mercedes
reviews.text: The lady at the window is rude as hell… I proceed to order my food and I say with an extra blue cheese, she says it doesn’t come with one, I said I know I would like an extra one… I ask for fried pickles, she says we don’t have that, I said can I get onion rings… she said look we only doing wings and fries… I didn’t know it was wing Wednesday… she was talking to me like I’m bothering her… I asked for ketchup, she said if you give me a minute I was gonna put it in the bag… I thought condiments were available upon request… lemon pepper wings were good and crispy… after eating 5 wings, they became too zesty, it started to cut the tip of my tongue

reviews.author: Honest & Simple Food Reviews
reviews.text:
The wings 🪽 were delicious 🤤 but the owner/manager/cook (older lady) got to arguing with a customer. It was in regard to the price posted for $10 (4 pcs fish, wings & fries) but the price actually being $12. The food is delicious to be honest, so I would’ve just paid the additional $2 and kept it moving. Instead, the customer (male) proceeded to argue with the manager (I guess to try to haggle her down to the $10 price). Which led to her coming out of the establishment and returning his energy back to him. This was my 1st time trying this wing place and the food DID NOT disappoint. The male customer did disappoint me though with his demeanor and demands. The owner could’ve left out calling him a “negro” but aye 🤷🏾‍♀️ he kinda put himself in a position to be called one. He literally was acting like one and embarrassed himself along with his gf/wife. Me personally I’m 27 yrs old, I’m not arguing or haggling someone that looks like she’s my mother age at best. Even if she did “initiate” the debate etc. it just not in my character to go back and forth, it was an odd experience.

*Pssst* NEVER argue with someone who’s making your food. 🍽️*

> Side note : I love tiny wings 🪽 so this was truly great food to me.

reviews.author: Christopherwayne
reviews.text: “Bringing a change to our community” is the slogan for this business! Being rude and not being able to respectfully explain what a few wing flavors are is not bringing a change! I’m sorry ma’am, I am not familiar with seasoned or moon dust wing flavors! I was referred to this place by a local resident and colleague of the area that I had just picked up from the bus stop. Needless to say, I will not be returning to this establishment. Your new slogan should be “being rude and taking your money bag back to the community where you live” because clearly you not for our community! Rude and entitled with pot holes in the parking lot!! Give me a break!! The local residents deserve better!!

google_address: 2644 Metropolitan Pkwy SW, Atlanta, GA 30315, USA

reviews.author: MaTiya Smith
reviews.text: I ordered two 10 piece wing combos for my daughter & I. One hot & the other ranch. The wings were hard & dry. I asked for celery & was charged $0.50. They tried giving me carrot sticks & celery with brown rot on the ends, but I refused it & requested fresh cut celery. While ordering & sitting down dining in, SEVERAL street walkers/non paying customers were allowed to come in & out & make themselves drinks from the fountain. The cashier was on her phone behind the counter. The restaurant smelled like mop water. And one of the windows had a bullet hole in it. It was very uncomfortable. We left & didn't even finish our meals. We won't be going back!!

reviews.author: Edgar Soto
reviews.text:
This place has to be a local favorite. The parking lot was pretty much full.
But, looking the exterior is not one I will have entered. The food was flavorful, but the sizes of the wings were the smallest I ever had.  😫

reviews.author: Noni Parker
reviews.text: I was a walk-in at 7:44 ticket 130. I just ordered my 10 piece rat sprinkle in my six piece honey Hyde everything was supposed to be crispy and my fries in both boxes are soft enough to be gummed and these ranch wings look like they’ve been sitting for hours. They’re not hot not even a little bit and they look disgusting. I’m mad that I even took a bite, horrible and I’ve had great experiences here ! Never returning

reviews.author: Nicole “TheRealNicole” Davis
reviews.text:
Their wings are the Best! Never have to request crispy, they always come out just right! My favorite are Honey Ranch & Honey Lemon Pepper. If you like dry Ranch wings like at Walmart, there's is way better!!

Update: They are still Goodt!!
Went today and got a Philly, Honey Lemon Pepper, Ranch & Mild. The Asian lady is mean but I just go in and go out.

reviews.author: BOBBI ANN JONES
reviews.text: My first time at this location their selection was great as I tried a new favor. The cashier Moni was very patient with me as I didn't have my mind made up she didn't rush me or anything. The food was ready in a reasonable amount of time and I like how they presented the food for your approval before putting it in the bag. One they they didn't do was put any napkins or things to eat with in the bag otherwise everything else was great I would eat there in the future. Spent almost $57 and fed 3 adults 2 teenagers and 2 kids everybody was full‼️Way to go A-Town giving you the best bang for your buck 👏🏽 👌🏽 👍🏽 🙌🏽

google_name: Hans Chinese Food And Chicken Wings
address: 798 James Jackson Pkwy NW, Atlanta, Georgia, 30318
google_address: 798 James Jackson Pkwy NW, Atlanta, GA 30318, USA

reviews.text: The restaurant was very clean. The cashier was very enthusiastic and made our experience great. Family of 7, each kid ordered and he was very kind with all of the 5 kids. It was change over from breakfast to lunch. The food was hot, fresh and delicious!

reviews.author: Cozy Inn
reviews.text:
Subject: Formal Complaint – Customer Service & Sanitation Concerns at Burger King Store #4182

I am writing to formally report serious customer service and food safety issues during my visit to Burger King Store #4182 on the date 11/19/2025 of my visit, between approximately 3:45 p.m. and 4:10 p.m. (Order #82).

Upon entering the store, the manager initially refused to allow me to use the restroom, despite my explaining that I had already been in the drive-thru and would place my order immediately afterward. His attitude was dismissive and unprofessional, setting a poor example for the rest of the staff.

Throughout my visit, employees displayed disrespectful behavior, including making inappropriate comments when I briefly stepped outside to retrieve the fries that were missing from my order. The overall environment lacked basic customer service standards.

More concerning were the sanitation practices I witnessed. A food-preparation employee handled a counterfeit $20 bill with the same gloves he was using to prepare customer meals, then continued making food without changing them. This presents a serious health and safety violation.

In addition, my Whopper was prepared incorrectly despite my clear allergy to lettuce. The employee attempted to remove lettuce from an already-prepared sandwich and transfer the ingredients to a new bun, resulting in contamination. When I brought this to the staff’s attention, I was met with dismissive and unprofessional responses.

Several other customers were also returning due to incorrect orders, indicating broader issues with management and training.

The conduct I experienced and observed was unacceptable and does not reflect the standards of the Burger King brand. I request that this matter be investigated and addressed promptly.

Thank you for your attention.

reviews.author: Kenneth Owens
reviews.text: So I received cold food it was obviously made hours before I even placed my order. Was missing my most expensive item, only received half of my large frozen Coke. And one of the employees on the third shift had the audacity to take a bite out of one of my jalapeno popper things and put what they didn't need back in the box. This is not the first time I've had issues with this place it was pretty much the same thing last time. Dislocation needs to be shut down and the franchisees license revoked for running such a poorly run business. It is shameful.

reviews.author: GODAC COOKIEE MONSTER KNOWLES
reviews.text: This place always closed early for dining (6:50pm). I was gonna place an order on my mobile for faster process, but in the midst of it, an employee told me the lobby was close and I heard "my apologies we not taking orders atm"(6:55pm). Why is that⁉️ & this is not my first time ever trying g to place an order here at this location‼️Why this burger king even over here at Greenbriar if the employees in there not going serve the customers‼️Please, explain‼️⁉️

reviews.author: Lisa Coleman
reviews.text: Went in on 11/24/2025 (inside the lobby) waited approx. 10 minutes before the manager of the store runs out on the phone stating every time he comes in it's some bull ish going on and proceeded to tell us the lobby is closed with 4 people in line.  The cashier is finishing up a mobile order and the manager asks her what she is doing and she replies to him.  His reply is even more repulsive after that....he says....oh...ok... don't ring up anyone in line I'm just trying to handle the drive through.  Paying customers got turned away with it seems 4 people working.  I'm convinced that people no longer want a work....they want a paycheck without the effort.

reviews.text: Staff is very unprofessional and has no respect for customers. I got there around 2:49 am to pick up a guest food, one of the guys told me, give a few minutes to get your order. At 3:54 a.m., a lady showed up with her attitude and told me we couldn't prepare your order because we ran out of the product for it.

reviews.author: Antonio Evans
reviews.text:
I thought I would stop in and get the $4 special with the cheese. Double apple pie fries and drink. I've had it before and it's been cool. It's been a good value for the money. But apparently on MLK at this location it's different than that. At this location, I got a water cup of drink. They call it a value drink. The other stuff was okay but I also got the strawberry cheesecake bites for $2.99. Do not buy these! You only get three small bites. It was my first time getting them and they were small and nothing like the advertisement. That was more powdered sugar than bites. 🤢
This Checkers has fell way off! ☹️
The upkeep of the property leaves a lot to be desired also.
Honestly, if this is how it's supposed to be at this location, then fine. I'm just being nitpicky. But, I had this special at other locations in Decatur and it was a lot better than this.

reviews.author: John D
reviews.text: Came here at almost 2AM and the gentleman at the window was so kind and upbeat. It was so wonderful to see them in such good spirits even though it’s late. Great work, they need raises!!

reviews.author: Christopher
reviews.text:
This is ridiculous! I have waited over 40mins for a mobile order.

Update 02/28/25 @1610: I have given this Checkers location multiple chances to improve, but unfortunately, the service remains unacceptable. Despite placing a mobile order, I waited over 30 minutes for my food, which is completely unreasonable. The lack of urgency, customer service, and overall efficiency suggests a disregard for customer experience and time. This location is in serious need of new management. The quality of service should not be dictated by the neighborhood—it should meet the same professional standards as any other establishment. I hope corporate takes action to address these ongoing issues.”

reviews.author: Shawn D
reviews.text: The young lady Katelyn working the drive-thru around 1 PM today was quite rude and seemed more focused on her phone than on the customers. I added an extra drink and fries to my order, but she never asked what kind of drink I wanted and instead made the same one as my original order. When I requested a correction, she responded with an attitude. Thankfully, the person supervising her stepped in and resolved the issue.

reviews.author: Yolonda Jones
reviews.text: Good food, good portions. I got the short ribs with mac & cheese , yams, and they put mashed potatoes at the bottom and they gave me A cornbread I also purchased the blue raspberry lemonade and the peach lemonade. The food was so good and again you’re able to split it with people or take some home for later. Save it for the next day for lunch. Just really depends if you want to eat all of it in one setting or split it up. The lemonades were a little too sweet for my preference, but they were still good though.

reviews.author: Leroy Mathews
reviews.text: I’ve seen this place for years and have never stopped by. I’ve been missing out! I was craving some soul food and decided to try this place. I ordered the fried pork chops! They were amazing. Just out the grease and seasoned to perfection. For the sides I had cabbage and mac. They hit the spot as well. The cornbread muffin was also very good. I finished the meal off with banana pudding. Customer service was also pleasant. everyone was friendly and helpful. Pricing is also affordable. I will definitely be back soon.

reviews.author: Brianka Dixon
reviews.text: Everyone was very attentive and on point. The food was amazing and the people were even more amazing. Everyone checked on us multiple times to make sure we are ok. Manager checked on the table and built such an amazing conversation with us. We felt very comfortable.

reviews.author: Necole Anré'V
reviews.text:
The ladies are sweet hard working and know what they’re doing! They keep the kitchen moving and the restaurant packed! The food is DELICIOUS👍🏾‼️ All of the food!!  We have tried most items/dishes at this point and this restaurant now has a drive up window and an online order system too! They have a discount program and just make it easy to always come back!

We tried wing stop by 285 as a close second- mistake! We instantly regretted it! The food was dry and over seasoned. We couldn’t even eat it!

A town wings is our #1 “wing and all other items they have “ restaurant! Oh, the fried rice and veggies are incredible and my personal fave!

They have the peach lemonade mix and fountain drinks as well as cans.

They automatically provide more than enough condiments and present your food like the pictures I’ve posted so you can season etc and know what you’re getting! Love them love them love them! Ladies, thank you for always showing up with strong customer service management smiling and herring the job done! We love you!

reviews.author: Tete Fuller
reviews.text: The Hibachi grill was all that. I had the Steak Hibachi with yum yum sauce it was good. The yum yum sauce was a little watery. The wings was good as well a little pricey but they was good. The French was not well done like we asked. But the overall service was great. The young ladies was nice and pleasant and gave good energy and vibes. Now the inside needs a little repairing and leaks needs to be fixed. They make more than enough money. Only in the black neighborhoods. This would not stand in a white community. Fix this restaurant or close until needed repair are done.

reviews.author: Pretty Yaya
reviews.text: Might look a little beat up on the outside but they actually have good food with fast service. I always order the hibachi rice and wings. The rice is so good my baby loves it, she’s picky.

reviews.text:
I was looking for a car wash in the neighborhood and this one popped up during my Google search. Loved it! Service was efficient, friendly, precise and extremely thorough. The pricing for outside wash and inside vacuum/detailing in $55. Some may say that’s expensive, but for a small business it’s very reasonable in my opinion.

Also, it’s connected to a great Latin kitchen! I was able to eat and relax in great weather as I waited for my car. I will be returning! Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Sean M
reviews.text: They're accommodating to your asks and needs especially Alex. Do a thorough job on my hard to clean wheels.

reviews.author: R M
reviews.text: He did a great job but I believe I needed detailing.  I ended up at 2 other car wash after this one.  I did not know that cleaning the bed of a truck was separate.  Overall, I like the concept.

reviews.author: Rachel Hayden
reviews.text:
**Hidden Gem for Car Enthusiasts: The Ultimate $35 Personal Hand Car Wash**

Tucked away from the hustle and bustle, this hidden gem is every car enthusiast's dream come true. For just $35, you get an exceptional hand car wash that goes beyond expectations.

From the moment you arrive, the meticulous attention to detail is evident. The staff here are true professionals, treating each vehicle with the utmost care and respect. They don't just wash your car; they pamper it. Every crevice is meticulously cleaned, ensuring not a speck of dirt remains.

What sets this place apart is their dedication to quality. They use premium products that leave your car gleaming without compromising on paint or finish. Whether it's a quick wash or a thorough detailing, they deliver consistently outstanding results.

In and out? Absolutely. Despite their thoroughness, they work efficiently, so you're not waiting around. You can trust them to deliver on their promise of a swift yet thorough service.

If you're tired of conveyor belt car washes that leave your vehicle lacking that personal touch, give this place a try. It's not just a car wash; it's an experience. For $35, you'll drive away feeling like you've rediscovered your car's showroom shine.

reviews.author: Raphael Theologou
reviews.text: I have a 2007 BMW and I brought it to the shop conveniently located in heart of Zone 3. I got a full car detail and to say the least, the service was EXCELLENT. The workers were friendly, fast and efficient! I even met the owner who is awesome and he offered me the new special which is included with regular car washes, the jumbo shrimps were so good I am not surprised this place is becoming the new car wash and dine-in hangout spot for ATL and Metro Tech! On the way, out my stomach was perfectly full, with my car sparkly clean and smelling so good that I felt like I just left the spa, the new car spa ZONE 3 Car Wash!!!

reviews.author: Arlette Freeman
reviews.text:
Lunchtime and first time. Ms. Deanna D was nice, pleasure and helpful. Also, she made a good Island Long and Sex on the Beach for my friend-girls.

Let’s get into food. All I will say is hats off to the chef/those in the back.

Friend-girl order the Chicken Quesadilla and I will say we both gave kudos to how well it was seasoned and you could taste all elements. Every bit was delicious.

For me the Stuffed Potato, yes for the gods! It was delicious! Leftovers for sure. However, I don’t like seafood the day after because of the fishy taste, BUT it was delicious and I’m going to save some for later. This is really a shared dishes. Love it!

reviews.author: Reggie Lowe II
reviews.text:
Man, let me tell you these are hands-down the cheapest and best-tasting seasonings that’ll make your mouth water instantly. From the first bite, I knew I was in for something special. My waiter, Tia, was on point the entire night, making the best food recommendations that had me grinning from ear to ear. And let’s not forget my bartender, Cocoa — shaking up the best margarita in the A, smooth and flavorful with just the right kick.
The vibe here is unmatched. The DJ had the place lit, spinning all the right tracks right now I’m listening to Lucci as I’m writing this, and it’s the perfect soundtrack to this unforgettable meal. You can feel the energy from the moment you walk in, and it just makes the food taste even better.
I was so impressed I had to order seconds just to take home for lunch tomorrow. When food is that good, you can’t walk away with just one plate. If you’re ever in the A, do yourself a favor and check this spot out. Trust me, you won’t be disappointed  they’ve got flavor, vibes, and hospitality locked in.

reviews.author: patricia atkinson
reviews.text: Total waste of 78 dollars. Burnt lobster tails and the seafood potato’s looks like dog food. I will never ever do this again. I’m so sick of Atlanta with all this over priced low value food. I paid 78 dollars for puppy chow and burnt seafood stuffed potatoes. 🤬

reviews.author: Nadia Britton
reviews.text: I came here to eat and have drinks. We walked in string 11:20. Sat down and waited for about 20 mins, no waitress showed up. I had to get up she find her. She was sitting down eating at the bar. Finally got  our drinks, cool. We finally order after having to tell her we are ready to order. She never came back initially to ask if we wanted to order food. We got our food and she forgot my silverware. Took Atleast 10 mins to get silverware. By that time for not even hot. I ordered seafood rice. Didn’t eat it because it ed took temperature and tasted disgusting. I made a complaint to waitress and she never took accountability. Just statef all sales are final. At that point i no longer want to spend any further money into thiis establishment. I won’t return to  patronize

reviews.author: Andrea Freeman
reviews.text: Came in to celebrate Juneteenth & Watch the NBA finals. Second visit and the food was salty. I had the turkey ribs(salty), sprite, & patron margarita. My homeboy had wings (salty) and very nasty spinach dip!!! then two more guests came & wasn’t greeted . So they waited with us just to be told if we are staying to watch the game we must start another tab after our server was ending her shift. We paid then left

The lady who took my order was nice and patient, and she the time to explain what things were. Only thing I’d change is they should post the menu. I was surprised about the price because I didn’t know how much anything was. But other than that, would return and would recommend

The Mac and cheese was good too. I look forward to trying other items on the menu.  Lastly,  the food is a little pricey but I said I would be back so it's definitely worth it! The portion size was decent. Give them a try!

I've been back again and again! It is by far the best Jamaican food in Atlanta! I've tried alot of them  Try the chicken pea curry it is delish 😊

reviews.author: Nikolett Brown
reviews.text:
My cats Absolutely love the Rebel raw food.
The company always reliable and they packaging for shipping always perfect nothing was ever melted and we are in Florida.  The food is a really high quality.  Also they customer service is wonderful Tyler is such a good help and always quickly responding to me. The brand is 4 cats approved!!!

reviews.author: A Shel5
reviews.text: So I have been a customer on and off over the last several years through several dogs lives. I leave because my dogs have skin allergies no fault to RR. But I always come back when I see they have a new product so I can try again. Why come back? Because these people have their hearts in the right place. This Isn’t just a company this is a family and they make you feel like you are part of theirs when you are one of their customers. I have always been able to get in touch with them And when I say them the owners of the company. They have helped me out tremendously and have taken so much of their personal time trying to assist me. They go way over and beyond they will do their best to help you however they can. They are truly the most deserving company to be recognized and successful.  And if my dog does not do well And I have to transition again to another company, rebel raw will, always have my heart. And let’s be honest Their latest video is just bad ass. Why wouldn’t you want to support them? :-)

reviews.author: LaShandra Moore
reviews.text: I’ve been using rebel raw for the last 1.5 for my now 2 year old schnauzer. I wanted to make sure she was being provided with clean ingredients easy to digest. My fur baby absolutely LOVEa this food to the point when she sees me pulling it out of the refrigerator, she patently waits licking her lips lol! She’s in perfect healthy with a beautiful coat. I’m a rebel raw client for life.

reviews.author: Michaella Phillips
reviews.text:
My cats love the Rebel Raw food. We’ve been feeding it for over a year now! I get the bulk box with wonder turkey, magic rabbit, and mystic chicken. I converted two of my 3 cats from commercial dry pet food and my other from a homemade raw food from a breeder to Rebel Raw. We had almost no issues doing that and we get a ton of complements on their health from our vet.

All their food comes extremely well packaged. They also contact me if there’s any issues getting my box to me and have alternatives and solutions for me to choose from. I will say issues have mostly been due to when my box is supposed to ship falling in a holiday.

reviews.author: Jenny Lee
reviews.text: I discovered Rebel Raw today, and I’m so glad I did! Matt helped me with my first order and was incredibly kind, super fast, and friendly. My cat absolutely loves the food, and I love that they are local and I absolutely trust them. From now on, we’ll only be ordering from Rebel Raw!

reviews.author: Mary Brady
reviews.text: As an UberEats driver, I am not going to be bullied by these restaurants. If you see my face pop-up on your machine as a driver, trust me I am out there doing my job. I have good stats. Do not tell me how to do my job and I won't go back there and tell you how to do yours. I am out there to make money so I can buy the food I like not take an order, I am not even sure I am going to like. Not to offend anybody but I don't even like American Deli food. I like my wings crispy and not so oily. You need not to accuse anybody of being a thief if you don't know them. As you said some, I am not part of that some. I come from the generation that does their job to the best of their ability and take pride in it whether or not they get recognition. I have only, one time had a problem with a deliver and that was when a car cut me off and I had to slam on my breaks to avoid hitting the car and the pizza slid out of the seat. Unfortunately, that did do the pizza any good. I called Uber and sent them a picture and apologized. So inconclusion I want to buy food I like, I do my job so just let me do it. Restaurants be nicer to the good Uber drivers because without them you wouldn't be making the extra revenue you are making off of them. The only I have a cancelation rate is because of this American Deli person telling what I have to do because I am not going to be offended by being called a thief. If you have a problem with the Uber drivers then don't do business with Uber, problem solved.

reviews.author: True Believer
reviews.text: Got the Philly cheese sandwich and it was just ok. came with enough fries to share. Parking is tight.

reviews.author: Nik Eternal
reviews.text: The cashier was very dismissive and rude. As I was placing my order she was very short with me and nasty. She was not friendly at all to me but as she took the next persons order behind me her whole attitude changed and she was much more friendly to them than she was to me. I was very calm and friendly and didn’t match her nasty attitude. The food was good but average. I don’t think I’ll be visiting here again anytime soon.

reviews.author: Wendy CARSWELL
reviews.text: The cashier was extremely rude after placing a $75 order she told me she didn’t have time for this shit today and I was Afraid to stay in that establishment she needs customer service training

reviews.author: valerie briscoe
reviews.text: This was our first time at Club Ellery’s and it didn’t disappoint! From security at the front door to the waitresses, everyone was very friendly and welcoming! The club was packed Friday evening when we got there around 7:30pm, but Honey; waitress,  found us a booth and it was the perfect spot! The drinks were great and the food was delicious! They had more than one DJ that night and they played a mixture of music from R&B to Trailride line dancing! We had such a great time that we returned Saturday night! I contacted Shayne Murphy; Owner, and he accommodated us with the same reserved booth we sat at Friday evening! It was a pleasure to meet him Saturday night and we were treated like celebrities! Everyone was awesome! We will most definitely come back whenever we are in Atlanta! This wasn’t just a club, it was an experience!

reviews.author: Curtis Preston Sr.
reviews.text:
Top Notch Old School Get Down Party.  Fine Ladys and the Brothers don't half step on the style.
Mr, Ellerys and Son Shane Taking care of Business.  You wanna Dance Go to Ellerys
