reviews.text: I haven't been here in over 20 years and I decided to go out on a spur of the moment and my experience did not disappoint... Loved the atmosphere, the music was nice, food was great, drinks were strong... They will see me every Wednesday night❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️

reviews.author: william johnson
reviews.text: First time here! Jackie bar tending tonight! Come and check her out! Holding it down tight! Enjoyed my drinks and food! The groove and vibe is kool ! I think you're going to also!  Thank me later! 😊

reviews.author: Daniel Pringle
reviews.text: Club Ellery's was highly recommended to me by a coworker, expressing to me that it was a great mature party atmosphere, good music, good vibes. I found a few of those to be a little skewed...not enough seating, after standing in line for 45 minutes had to run like the Hunger Games for a table, my server had a little bi-polar attitude when I just wanted to ask her a question. And yes this was my 1st time going.  It's a cozy neighborhood " hole in the wall" bar, but it wasn't my cup of tea.

google_address: 2205 Campbellton Rd SW, Atlanta, GA 30311, USA

reviews.author: Johnna Bailey
reviews.text: Food is always good fresh and hot. I always come here when I visit my friends hair salon which is very often.

reviews.author: brea ditzel
reviews.text: Fried rice is nasty 🤮, the parking lot is trashed , the Philly was disgusting the chicken tasted old !! You can tell by the discoloration of the chicken it was old … and they wouldnt even make me more food to replace it … I didn’t even ask for a refund . The wings are small and oily, but their lemon pepper wings are good … as I was ordering more food the cook came from the back and stared at me as I was finishing up my second order

reviews.author: A Wells
reviews.text: Ordered a 30-piece and shrimp fried rice. The wings were tiny and way too oily and greasy. Rice was okay, but definitely not worth almost $40!

reviews.author: Pro Peller
reviews.text: Two other restaurants I was trying to get to today were closed for labor day.  Took me a minute to get used to the owner.But the food is really good.Smallest chicken wings i've ever had but also some of the tastiest... he doesn't accept Cash tips So I left the 5 star review :)

reviews.author: antwan moss
reviews.text: Not tenders i was expecting. Although the Food was hot and fresh, I would never order the tenders again! Not real chicken it's some processed chicken nugget-patty madness. And for 15 bucks no! Will not likely eat here again or maybe just wings?

google_address: 3195 Donald Lee Hollowell Pkwy NW, Atlanta, GA 30318, USA

reviews.author: Valerie Freitag
reviews.text: Lady at the counter was unable to follow anything I was saying. Come to find out after getting back to our truck where we were going to eat lunch, she completely screwed up my order. This is the second Burger King I have been too that the employees cannot seem to do their jobs correctly. I said, "No Tomatoes", but because she didn't read back the order nor ask if she understood me correctly, I got ONLY TOMATOES. Now I will not be eating lunch because walking back to the restaurant is absolutely ridiculous to do when we have places to be for our trucking company to keep moving and making the money we need to pay our bills. Thanks for wasting our time and money with hiring incompetent employees. This is completely unacceptable Burger King 💯 Will never return to either of the 2 locations with worthless employees. You're about to lose our business completely, and we travel throughout the US.

reviews.author: Family Account
reviews.text: Why does this Burger King not have a phone number or come up on the burger king app? This location SHOULD NOT BE RECOGNIZED as a TRUCK STOP LOCATION, just because it’s off an exit! There is no gas station connected to it. It’s on a property with a gas station that has a truck stop behind it. Plus they sell everything at truck stop prices. If anything it should do better to be on the app and have greater prices that way, so that the community it serves can have access to a fast food restaurant

reviews.author: Jose
reviews.text: THIS BURGER KING DOES NOT OPEN AT 6AM. ITS 6:46AM CURRENTLY AND THEY ARE STILL NOT OPEN. THE LADY AT THE PETRO TRUCK STOP TOLD ME SHE DOESN'T KNOW WHEN THEY OPEN BECAUSE THEY OPEN AT DIFFERENT TIMES EVERYDAY. ITS PRETTY MUCH WHEN EVER THE WORKERS DECIDE TO COME INTO WORK. PLUS THE PHONE NUMBER DOES NOT WORK.

reviews.author: Ab Velasquez
reviews.text: Marquez was more than happy to take our order. he was very polite & we had no issues. hope to see more of him

reviews.author: Cheryl B
reviews.text:
The milkshake machines at multiple Burger King locations across Atlanta are always “broken.” This has been happening for a long time — every visit, same excuse. It’s not just one store. It’s happening at:
199 Northside Dr SW, 1122 Northside Dr NW, 3195 Donald Lee Hollowell Pkwy NW, and 2760 Greenbrier Pkwy SW.

This isn’t a coincidence. Either the machines are not being maintained or staff simply refuse to operate them. That’s neglect and false advertising.

I’m not asking for free food — I just expect Burger King, a billion-dollar company, to maintain its equipment and deliver what’s on the menu. It’s time to hold these franchisees accountable and fix what’s clearly been ignored.

google_address: 490 Fairburn Rd SW A, Atlanta, GA 30331, USA

reviews.author: Juicey Moore
reviews.text: Update 2025 The food is still delicious. The Chicken Philly is good but not the best I've had if you're in the area it's a good pick for this area. The chicken wings are always good, that's the main item I purchase here. The fries I dont care for. The area is busy but as long as you're in and out you're good.

reviews.author: Махабат Абдиева
reviews.text: I walk every day. Firstly, halal, secondly, delicious sandwiches and thirdly, a very responsive and soft person who will cook you a delicious dish. The room is clean and cozy. Thank you for the delicious food. By the way, I'm writing a review eating a beautiful sandwich

reviews.author: Nikita Bolden
reviews.text: Small mom and pop storefront in Southwest Atlanta. While, the waiting area is dirty, dirty carpet, dirty floors, dirty walls. I noticed their rating is 94 so I took a chance and ordered the butter, lemon pepper and garlic pepper wings. I received a total of 12 wings for $13. The butter, lemon pepper had good flavor. The garlic pepper had no flavor at all. It tasted like unseasoned fried chicken. I don’t know if I would go back. Nothing really stood out to me to make me wanna go back.

reviews.author: Faith “Faith Walkz” Walker
reviews.text: As a New Jersey native, I have say I thoroughly enjoyed my chicken Philly.It had mushrooms onions and peppers on it.I stick my fries inside my sandwich and it tasted like home.

reviews.author: Jurnee Hall
reviews.text: Good taste BUT over priced and the wings are mini wings . I wish I had check my plate before I left. This place should be a same of themselves to charge 10.00 dollars for this meal. The onion rings were soggy mostly bread no onion. I hope this place improves there Quality of food. If you are going charged large amount make it worth the money.

google_address: 394 Cleveland Ave SW, Atlanta, GA 30315, USA

reviews.author: Empress Love
reviews.text: This food was nasty. I spent I think like over $60 for oxtail plate with extra sides. Yams were ok oxtail was tender but lacked season. Green beans were good and so was the potato salad. The meatloaf was disgusting! So nasty!!!! Mac n cheese tastes like box with added cheese. Nasty!!! Mustard greens were the worst! Horrible!! They fell all the way off

reviews.author: Tiniqua Marshall
reviews.text: Tried This Place More Than Once & Everytime It’s A Fail But This Time I Had To Leave A Review. Whoever Making Them Sides Need To Be Fired Because Messing Up Rice Is Crazy . Nun Of The Sides Are Good The Porkchops Ok & The Sweet Tea . The Meats Aren’t Horrible It’s Just The Way They Don’t Season Anything Hurt My Heart. Ohhh And The Sweet Potato Pie 0/10 Tasted Like It Been Sitting In A Freezer For Months… The Staff Are Friendly, Line Moves Swiftly But It’s Not Even Worth The Money I’m Sorry To Say It Because I Love To Support A B.O.B .

reviews.author: Tamera Thomas
reviews.text:
This was our first visit and I wasn't surprised. The first thing I was told, we're closing in exactly 31 minutes!
I can read. They had food left,  BUT  it wasn't appealing. The green beans were fresh out the can. My daughter call these  repass beans. Their version of Mac and cheese looked like the stouffer frozen meal time.  Now the jiffy cornbread was ok. I don't eat pork chops, but that's what he wanted. Luckily he carries his own seasoning. The young lady that took my payment was very pleasant. Will I return? Hard NO. Blessings to them.

reviews.author: Erika Norman
reviews.text:
My experience at Walters is a perfect example of when they say people don't forget how you make them feel. I was just looking for something to take to work when my partner recommended Walters as we rode by.

Once I was in line which is set up cafeteria style, the gentlemen who prepared my turkey wing dinner were awesome! Very pleasant demeanors and portion size was great!

Once it was time to pay though, ALL electricity on the street went out!!! The young lady Mesha was on the register. She asked if we had any cash, or could cash app & unfortunately we did not.

Now here's why I decided to review them besides for the food, she didn't HESITATE once I told her I'd cash app her the next day. She even insisted I just send $15 (I'm sure the plate was more).

I called back the next morning to confirm her cash app and she STILL insisted I only send a tip. I sent her enough for the meal + tip. This could've went left so fast and easily, but because they treated us like decent human beings and NOT scum, it didn't!!!!

It pays to treat ppl well. Figuratively and literally. The staff at Walters understand this and they EXECUTED. Please keep it up guys! We need service like this in our communities.

reviews.author: Cassandra
reviews.text:
They are losing one star because the.
sweet potato pie wasn't ready to serve 😭

Moving along the food was excellent. Not a true down home southern gut busting feast but you got plenty of portions and many choices. Should have stopped by in the morning foe that pie 😒

They only had mustard greens, no collards, tried, didn't like. Got the beef liver and mashed potatos, a piece of cornbread and a drink to go (Oct 2025 = $14.14).

google_address: 2301 Marietta Blvd NW, Atlanta, GA 30318, USA

reviews.author: Jasmine Motley
reviews.text: 5 min wait at the drive thru at lunch time on a Saturday afternoon. Ordered via the app for a pick up. Drive thru employees were pleasant. Burger was hot & so were the fries. The order was modified and correct. First fast place I’ve ever been to that you didn’t have to ask for ketchup packets. They were already in the bag. Major kudos to the GM & staff.

reviews.author: Tiffany Me
reviews.text: Mobile order. Service was fast but food was disgustingly. The chicken biscuit was soggy and wet. Made my grandson sick to the stomach. The potatoe wedges were old and dry and this was 9:00am. No straw or ice in my mango lemonade. Will never go back here.

reviews.author: Sabri Khezri
reviews.text: I am very disappointed with this Wendy’s location. This is the second time I’ve ordered food and it was extremely old, cold, and tasted terrible. Last time it even made me sick and caused stomach pain. The staff also do not follow basic hygiene and cleanliness. This place really needs better management and quality control.

reviews.author: Georgian GA
reviews.text:
What to except from a fast food place. Good was great, hot to the point I had to slow down.
Service: was better than food, smiling crew and happy welcome makes, all the difference. Thank you guys for your welcoming attitude. It’s a rare at fast food place.

reviews.author: R B
reviews.text: I came here last week Thursday after having a bad experience at a different fast food restaurant minutes earlier. I actually had not been here in over a year because every time I would come the staff would be rowdy and unprofessional and/or the inside would be closed an hour or more earlier than posted. So I came to give it one last shot here and it was waaaay better! The food wasn't piping hot but it was good enough. Every one greeted me and was nice. I don't know if it was because the store manager was there but if he wasn't I'm not sure if I would have got the same treatment. The store manager was nice to me too. I hope to visit the restaurant again soon because I did eat good for the amount I paid. All this in the picture was about $7 or less.

google_address: 3041 Headland Dr, Atlanta, GA 30311, USA

reviews.author: Jonathan Pyles
reviews.text: This burger is insane! I’m not really sure why this location has such a low review rating, but I ordered, received my food burger within 60 seconds, and opened the wrapper to the best Dave’s single I’ve laid my taste buds on!!!

reviews.author: Grant Lawson
reviews.text: Every time I go to this Wendy’s and order something other than a biggie bag the order looks disgusting… this is not what the spicy chicken looks like man it’s supposed to have lettuce and look somewhat appetizing… I could have made this at home if I didn’t want toppings. Then when you go and ask for a refund they fight you about the refund. Why can’t Wendy’s in my neighborhood be the same as the ones in the nice neighborhoods

reviews.author: Sabrina Chism
reviews.text:
My son wanted to try the new 'Wednesday' meal that they are promoting. The menu board shows two flavors of shakes but you only have their choice of this bloody looking Frosty with this super sweet cherry stuff in it.
It's disgusting!
We could not choose the chocolate one he wanted and their service was so rude and unprofessional.
The guy that took my money said that he was going to give me $3 off with some promotion that they had then said oh never mind, it's not working. After he took my money he said oh there it goes and took nothing off.
The young lady that gave me my meal acted as though she was doing me a favor.
When I say at the window waiting to ask her for the sauces and a straw and napkins that should have been in the bag, she acted irritated. She never said a word.
It's been almost a year since I've ordered at this place because of that type of behavior.
I will never go back again...

reviews.author: Schertevear Lewis
reviews.text: Sabrina is a sweetheart! My mom and I come every morning before starting our day. We always order the honey buddy chicken biscuit or switch it up and get the breakfast baconator. Sabrina is always up lifting when we see her. The smile is amazing and her service is always on point. She feels like family 🥰

reviews.author: D “Jambritdon” Dav
reviews.text: The cashier was friendly, the food was good except for the cold fries that Wendy’s seem to pride itself for. There is a wide variety of drink selection. Only issue was the cleanliness of the restaurant. All the empty tables (inside and outside) were dirty and the floor was littered with trash.  Surprisingly the bathroom was really clean. Overall I’ll give it 7 out of 10 points

address: 35 Hamilton E Holmes Dr NW, Atlanta, Georgia, 30311
google_address: 35 Hamilton E Holmes Dr NW, Atlanta, GA 30311, USA

reviews.author: Mercedes Luv
reviews.text: I frequent Wendy's for breakfast all over Atlanta.  This particular Wendy's is hit or miss in the morning.  The manager is rather mean light skinned woman with braids.  Very hot tempered and doesn't respond well with instructional orders. I have to request that my English Mcmuffin get toasted twice everytime because it isn't toasted...and every single she's there, there's continued sass.  No matter what the request.  Mind you this 7-8am in the morning and I'm a paying customer.  This past Friday will be my last time going there.  I posted 3 pictures of the molded dirty biscuit with what looked like a bite was taken out of that was given to me (with a smirk) on Friday morning.  Instead of giving it to my daughter I documented and trashed it and stopped by McDonalds.  This what we call "slick evil" where I'm from.  Wendy's this manager should work in the afternoon, not the morning shift. She's not nice enough and seems to bring problems to work with her.  I've encountered her on atleast 4 occasions with her stuff. "Ain't nobody got time for that".....lololol.  Look at the pics and tell me would you give that to your kid.  Yall owe me....some $$$.

reviews.author: Chanel Comer
reviews.text: Drive thru backed up and he back there on his phone.  The young lady in the window is really rude she doesn’t know how to multi task she take one order.  Once she complete that order that’s when she take another order.  Door dash is losing out for bad service like this ! Definitely taking this over the store manager location.

reviews.author: Golden Sunshine
reviews.text: It’s 11:30 am , why are you giving me food that looks like this yall just opened !!! I didn’t get a receipt but my total was $6.86 & I want my money back . I’ll be coming for it !!! I don’t even trust yall to remake it with love . This is pitiful !!!!!

reviews.author: Diandra DeNardo
reviews.text: Andre is an amazing employee! I stopped eating fast food due to bad service. Andre makes eating Wendy’s such a delight. His positive attitude and efficiency is top tier. I could definitely see him having his own franchise or 100 one day. Thank you for going above and beyond Andre!!!

reviews.author: Kala Dixon
reviews.text: I know cashiers are most stressed at a job but there is no reason you treat your guest like we don’t matter. It is very sad that I have to pull up to the window and ask the cashier if they’re okay because they sound like I’m aggravating the hell out of them at the window. Orders made wrong, asked for sauce and got different sauce so when I asked another woman says “ 85 cent “ when you gave me the wrong sauce maam.. I hope you guys get it together cause clearly tonight was not your night.

google_address: 2596 Donald Lee Hollowell Pkwy NW, Atlanta, GA 30318, USA

reviews.author: Jazzy Jazz
reviews.text: I used to frequent this establishment over 10 years ago. Yesterday I decided to take that ride and try it again and boy did they not disappoint. The food was delicious and they listen and pay attention to every detail. I will be going back today.

reviews.author: D. Stegall
reviews.text: They got some of the best lemon pepper wings in town The prices are always affordable You can feed a whole family and the kids and plus some It's right there in the middle of bankhead You can't miss it You beat your food always come out hot and fresh and the place is not that bad as far as the inside of they keep it pretty clean But them lemon pepper wings don't hear they are banging on everything.

They should have chairs in lobby for people to sit while waiting for orders. Food the wings were good but the rice tasted old like box rice and expired chicken was fake/processed and doesn’t taste fresh I came around prime time dinner and was busy so was expecting much better for the price I paid..dissatisfied and disappointed with my food…do better instead of worrying about pocketing money and being greedy it’s better for you to focus on customers and quality not just making money

reviews.author: Lena Downs
reviews.text: REVISED-REVIEW... Still 2 years later and love this place more and more... the sesame chicken is my favorite lately and hubs and son love the egg foo yum. love the new fries....(2yrs ago)Been eating at 🐼 as long as I can remember. Might not look like much but nothing can comfort ur day like one of the only original spots left on bankhead

reviews.author: Veronica Bass
reviews.text: I've been eating here for years. Best Lemon Pepper wings I've ever tasted! Food is always cooked to order. I'll save you the extra trip - No Cash Accepted.

address: 1992 Donald Lee Hollowell Pkwy NW, Atlanta, Georgia, 30318
google_address: 1992 Donald Lee Hollowell Pkwy NW, Atlanta, GA 30318, USA

reviews.author: M D
reviews.text: Happened to stumble upon a legendary establishment in Bankhead. Service was A1. Folks running this establishment are down to earth and eager to fill your belly. Ones of the best spots to stop and get filled up on some ATL culture and great food. They're worth the visit.

reviews.author: Leonine Greaves
reviews.text: I just picked up a half rack of baby back ribs and they are horrible. Like very overcooked, no meat, so you can assume not fall off the bone. I’m not sure why they would even serve this to a customer. It looks disappointing. Two stars because they pound of brisket Is good.

reviews.author: Devon Garvey
reviews.text: We've ordered delivery several times and the food has always been great! Tonight I had a pulled pork sandwich with baked beans and sweet potato fries and everything was delicious. The prices are also extremely affordable compared to other BBQ restaurants nearby.

reviews.author: Sydney Rhodes
reviews.text:
My phone did NOT get a chance to eat first because my mouth did.

This is my 2nd time ordering through Uber Eats and it’s NEVER gotten to me and not been hot, fulfilling, flavorful, etc.

This last time it was so good I had to leave a real review and not just the lil thumbs up or down on Uber because this place needs their flowers!

I purchased (2) dinners : Leg quarter with green beans and potato salad. And a half Slab of Rib Dinner with Mac and yams.

I also got sweet potato pie and an Arnold Palmer on the side. My 1 year old son was smacking his lips and demanding more of his food. I was smacking my lips and portioning my plate into lunch meals so I have enough leftovers to savor.

Y’all the food is good. I’ve never been in the restaurant because they ensure your order is quality right in your home but I sure will be paying them a visit soon!

reviews.author: Deirdree
reviews.text: Man this has been my spot for yearsssssss.... Always feels like a family cookout from the customer service to the grill outside and the old school music being played. Great prices, food and atmosphere. Me and my husband love Mr. pig. The sweet potato pie is my favorite

google_address: 2084 Campbellton Rd SW, Atlanta, GA 30311, USA

reviews.author: Lady RatedIt
reviews.text: Great great service and great food! I got the wings and catfish and came back for the fish. The wings were great too they had a unique flavor when I ordered hot it wasn’t like anything else I’d tried before but still good. The fish was crispy and the service is phenomenal! It

reviews.author: Robert William
reviews.text: If you are wondering why a five star for everything then let me tell you Madea (Tyler Perry) and his entire team are crazy about this food junction. Just imagine that they had their last movie shoot in the complex. The food is good the service is too good and the location is convenient. So next time make it a point to taste their fish fry and shrimp rice. And if you try the wings I bet you want moooore.

reviews.author: Sharon Wilcox
reviews.text: The food was fresh and good! The people were very nice! I ordered a Philly combo.

reviews.author: Milton Jackson
reviews.text: The fish and wings are good. Must try this place. Good food and very clean. Sam is very respectful and courteous.

reviews.author: RoSa Will
reviews.text: The food is amazingly fresh and delicious! Tyler Perry's movie Destination wedding was shot here. And, the entire team, crew, all ate at this place. It was exciting to be at the same spot!

google_address: 2975 Headland Dr SW, Atlanta, GA 30331, USA

reviews.author: CAMAA
reviews.text: One of the best Sierra Leonean restaurants in Atlanta! If you live here, you know there aren’t many places representing Sierra Leonean cuisine. This spot offers great service and authentic flavors.

reviews.author: Sean Golan
reviews.text: Great West African food inside the mall. Plantains, jallof rice and fish were very good. The service and food were excellent. More of a take-away vibe.

reviews.author: Brylee Rogers
reviews.text: So delicious!! Staff was very friendly :)

reviews.author: letitia ellison
reviews.text: I had the potato leaves and they were delicious, she even put extra fried pepper on the side for me after I told her I liked spicy foods! Would definitely recommend

reviews.author: Moriska Wellington
reviews.text: the food is great, i am african myslef and where i live i don’t really have access to authentic african food. but when my mom brought me here to shop we had some from this restaurant it was amazing for great price too. will be coming here again!

address: 875 Martin Luther King Jr Dr NW, Atlanta, Georgia, 30314
google_address: 875 M.L.K. Jr Dr SW, Atlanta, GA 30314, USA

reviews.author: Mary Kay McBrayer
reviews.text: I feel like Chik-fil-A is almost always the gold standard of fast food experience, but this one is just not a good one. I've been here many times because it's so close to my house, and I always check my order before I pull out because they forget items or give the wrong order more often than not. Sometimes the food is not fresh, over salted, or not salted at all. They are also just not up to the hospitality/courtesy standard of literally every other Chik-fil-A I've ever been to... minus the one at Hartsfield airport, maybe. I'm just saying: treat this fast food place like a normal fast food place, and lower your expectations. A lot.

reviews.author: Dre P.
reviews.text: After waiting in the lobby for a door dash for  six minutes for an order, which was not bad I noticed this was the first Chick-fil-A that not one employee did not speak or greet to me. I was actually astonished when I mentioned it to the manager he still didn’t reply and then they shoved my food towards me. I said you guys do not speak to your customers here and he shake his head no one of the reasons I go to Chick-fil-A because of the excellent customer service and that the employees go out of their way to greet and take care of you he ruined my entire experience for the brand, especially coming from the manager.

reviews.author: LiveLove Ri
reviews.text: First time at this location and will be my last. I placed my mobile order and was patiently waiting for prior customers to receive their food. Once it was time for me to pull up, the drive thru rude African American girl with black braids tome me to stop and then came to my window extremely hostile and holding my food hostage and demanded my name. I was confused because when you place your order online you have to put what vehicle you have. I told her my name and she gave me a smart remark. They also stopped taking orders at 9:40 pm and told all those other people that didn’t place an order online that they were not accepting orders. I see a lot of others complain about this store, unsure why it’s still open

Not the typical Chick-fil-A experience. Not friendly- as in: Absolutely NO pleasantries exchanged. Food was quick and hot, though. Requested number of sauces not provided.

Now, are any of these lapses a big deal in the grand scheme of things? Absolutely not. Of course not. But are these things that we go to Chick-fil-A for- trusting that they'll be there? Yes.

No huge deal, though. I'll just head to my usual spots next time the craving strikes.

reviews.author: M
reviews.text: Yall get my order wrong almost every time. It makes no sense. The only reason I keep trying to patronize this location is because of its proximity to my job. Please do better. Pay attention. Recite the order back. Something.

google_address: 2740 Greenbriar Pkwy SW Ste A1A, Atlanta, GA 30331, USA

reviews.author: Jarema Moody
reviews.text: The food looks good, but please do not put soy sauce packs in my actual plate where everybody touched the soy sauce packs probably The actual soy sauce packs is touching my food.

reviews.author: Chantel Moore
reviews.text: My family is visiting from Portland Oregon, we stopped by because my nephew follows several streamers who rave about this food line. This particular location was a let down. Although the food was great around 10:20pm they wouldn’t allow us to use the restroom despite waiting for our pick up order that we were waiting for well over 20minutes for. Although the cashier was passive about the denial the restaurant was still taking other orders.

reviews.author: Kara Lee
reviews.text: I am not originally from Atlanta and like most people I learned very quick that every American Deli is not worth the stop. The Greenbriar location is always busy for a reason! If I can offer a tip, I would say download Doordash and pick it up so you do not have to stand inside amongst the crowd for too long. I ordered mine while sitting outside, got on the phone, took care of a few things, went inside once the "ready" notification came through and was out of the door in no time. You have to use the window closest to the drink machine if you place a doordash order.

reviews.author: Ego Maniak
reviews.text: There's nothing like American Deli wings one of my favorite spots to eat hands down...

reviews.author: Tenika “TStar”
reviews.text: I noticed they will give you more fries but never make a mistake and give an extra wing or two 😂

google_address: 2841 Greenbriar Pkwy SW N436, Atlanta, GA 30331, USA

reviews.author: David Owolabi
reviews.text: I had great customer service when I first walked into the Building. The server Akasha R recommend the vegetable fried rice with lemon pepper wings is pretty good. I would recommend this restaurant to anyone. Excellent customer service.   I am From Tallahassee, Florida

reviews.author: P Mac
reviews.text: Best wings I've had in a while. Daughter says the fried rice was just okay. I might drive back for these wings. The chicken sandwich looked great but was too big for my child, a kid's menu would be great.

reviews.author: Fran Thomas
reviews.text: I usually don't eat from these types of wings spots however I noticed they had fried cauliflower....my fav! So disappointed for $17 I got a box full of greasy cauliflower nubs....you may want to order a burger or wings to be safe but do NOT order the cauliflower. The Fries is how they got 2 stars! Customer service is cool. The young black girl at the counter is very nice & mannerable. The place is  Fast & clean! Prices are moderate not high but not cheap either. Below are 3 pics. 2 Black boxes is WNB the plated food is "Mosa" how cauliflower should look once cooked.

reviews.author: Elizabeth Allen
reviews.text: Everything was great! From my interaction with the cashier to the quality and taste of my food! The wings (dry rub LP) was spot on and the coke was properly carbonated! Would definitely eat here again.

reviews.author: Eundreia Goodrum
reviews.text: Kitchen Sink Philly surpassed my wildest expectations, just the right amount of seasoning✅, not greasy✅, temperature✅ portion size ✅ … definitely a tasty short order  meal

google_address: 10 Northside Dr NW, Atlanta, GA 30314, USA

reviews.author: Lauren Cato
reviews.text: My first time eating here was perfect! I was greeted by Andrea (the bartender) and was able to sit at the bar immediately. The turkey ribs, mac and cheese, candied yams, collard greens, and corn muffin were delicious and cooked perfectly. The bread pudding was amazing. I had two drinks and both were filled to the rim which I appreciate. I didn’t wait long for my food and drinks. Andrea made sure everyone at the bar was taken care of. I enjoyed their music playlist and the restaurant is very clean. They have free wifi, free parking, and a clean restroom. I will definitely be back.

reviews.author: Andreka Wallker
reviews.text: Our server, Laci, was amazing! The food was delicious especially the fried green tomatoes!! I’m coming back again soon.

reviews.author: Lamya Bowie
reviews.text:
came late saturday night bc it was open late. the service was great, the raspberry margarita pitcher was amazing.  the only disappointment was that I ordered wings and after 45 mins and the rest of my party receiving their food I was told they were out of wings. the server said the kitchen didn’t communicate to her so I don’t blame her it just sucked bc I was really hungry lol.
but I ordered cheeseburger sliders instead and they came out pretty fast and was absolutely delicious. my other complaint was that the onion rings were burnt/hard and not tasty but based on quality of food and the free parking I would consider giving them another chance in the future if i’m looking for late night food downtown.

reviews.author: Lateefah Berry
reviews.text:
We recently had our holiday lunch catered by Restaurant 10 Bar & Grill and Rosie's, the entire experience was outstanding from start to finish. The food was perfectly prepared. Every dish was fresh, flavorful, and clearly made and delivered with care, our whole team kept commenting on how delicious everything was.

The staff was incredibly helpful throughout the process, making ordering and coordinating delivery effortless. They were responsive, friendly, and attentive to every detail, which made the event run smoothly.

Our holiday lunch felt truly special thanks to their service and quality. We will absolutely be using them again for future events. Highly recommend to anyone looking for great food and exceptional catering!

reviews.author: Christie Conyers
reviews.text: We had a great experience! Alvin, our server, was too notch! Excellent customer service, gave great recommendations, fun personality. Our food was 10/10! Portions were fair to pricing, food was seasoned to perfection!

google_address: 1917 Pryor Rd SW ste 3, Atlanta, GA 30315, USA

reviews.author: DE “RocKStarM1KE” RocKStarM1KE
reviews.text:
ATL Sports bar 2 has become my go to place for popping out and resetting my vibe. Beautiful severs, great cooks, and the energy is always positive. Lit vibes in a safe environment…Though management has done renovations, the bar still holds its core feeling of a Community bar with Club energy. Good priced, delicious food (Nachos, wings, and Phillies are top on my list)…beers/shots and an adult only after hour type curfew (Fridays and Saturdays). Never know who’ll pop out but it’s always a place to unwind.

*Ps: Note to management…
“I Would love to see the alligator bites return to the menu.”

reviews.author: Mark Lunetta
reviews.text:
I really hate leaving reviews like this. My wife and I came in for dinner before a concert at Lakewood Amphitheater. Got seated right away, but then it went downhill. Took FOREVER to get our drinks and food ordered (it was busy but not slammed). We could barely see in there because ALL of the lights were turned off. Once we got our order, we had to repeatedly ask for simple things such as ketchup, napkins, etc. Tried to order a second beer which never arrived. Burger was salty and my nachos tasted like someone grabbed a stale bag of Doritos and threw the other ingredients on top of the chips. As we were leaving, our server ran after us in the parking lot to make sure we paid our bill, which I showed her on my phone was in fact paid.

Not a good experience at all. We won't be back.

reviews.author: KKERIC PERKINGS
reviews.text: Ms.Chanel was my server, the food was excellent and her service was great and on point. A real  layed back atmosphere…. Oh Big Shout out to the bartender Monica. She real Fly with the drinks!!! Lemon  drops y’all …..

reviews.author: Craig DeRouen
reviews.text: The atl sports bar 2 is one of the finest establishments I’ve been to since I’ve been to Atlanta being from Louisiana, my hostess mece was very attendant and did not let my glasses to go empty coudos to the whole team if your in Atlanta stop and check this place out . I had a chance to meet the owner very approachable guy 5 stars across the board.

reviews.author: Brian Jones
reviews.text: 5 stars across the board I came in yesterday around 5:00 and stayed until about 9 the staff was great every body was attentive but my girl Meca the bartender is the best !!!!came for the pork steak truck originally but now I have a new hang out .

My chicken was old, the French fries and okra was cold and this place is nasty, they told me I couldn’t get a refund food all on the floor, and they picked it up and served the food to someone else.

reviews.text: The food was really fresh and good. However, there was no icing on my pies. Lol. I should've checked before driving away.

reviews.author: Shirley Rose
reviews.text: The food itself has never changed and the chicken is good and hot, but my fries were cold and hard, and no bread 🍞. So never the less I was not completely satisfied 😞. I guess I need to go in to get a complete hot meal. The young man who waited on me was nice and told me to come back and see them. Yes I will be back, just come in next time.

reviews.author: Nicole Williams
reviews.text: The whole store is a MESS. The whole crew and even the store manager smokes, they seem to have bad representation because smoking in the front ANDD in the back by the drive-thru is not a good look for a Food Company. Also on top of that the people that came in after they took my order from outside didn’t even wash hands before making food, first time there NEVER AGAIN.

reviews.author: Nicola Roberts
reviews.text: This restaurant is exceptionally unmatched. The manager is awesome and also has a friendly and excellent staff Customer service was great. The food was awesome. Delicious and fresh from the oven and the fryer. Speaking of customer service, I was greeted in the most friendly manner, Everyone was friendly. The place is clean and the air was cool smell real great. I would recommend anyone to go there and give them a five star

reviews.author: Cynthia DUNN-DUHART
reviews.text: The steam table looked very appealing.   The options were well stocked?  The food smelled good.  The line moved smoothly.  My food was served hot.  The dining room was quiet and clean.  My meal was delicious.  I enjoyed my dining experience.

reviews.author: Carrington Buddha Sims
reviews.text: I've been coming to this Piccadilly spot in greenbriar mall since I was about 5 years old. They've always had the best soul food and Buffet styled meals that I've always enjoyed. My favorites to order when Id go here are the mac and cheese, the cheese rice, some jalapeno cornbread, and a dessert of some sort which was usually a slice of strawberry cheesecake. It always made the perfect dinner for me. And their big dining area is very cleanly and beautifully put together too. No complaints, great platters, great service, great restaurant.

reviews.author: Candace Sinopoli Bennett
reviews.text: My son brought me Piccadilly for dinner. Veggie Plate. Mac&Cheese Mashed Potatoes Carrot Soufflé and Turnip Greens. So disappointing. Turnips were salty with too many stems, Mac&Cheese was dry, Mashed potatoes with decent and Carrot Soufflé was dry lumpy and like it was not fresh. Greenbriar location standards have been lowered. I m done.

reviews.author: Jenna Chapman
reviews.text:
My food was sabotaged. After requesting to check for missing items I received an intentionally cut cup of corn that spilled in the bag, a bite out of my piece of pie, and the bread was squeezed. The carrot soufflé is burnt. I am missing a biscuit and a piece of chicken. I cannot eat this as it has been sabotaged intentionally.

Update: This establishment has officially been reported to the Department of Health. Good luck preparing for your pop-in health inspection.

reviews.author: J COQUETTE
reviews.text: The swap was overcooked. Fried chicken undercooked and bloody. Vegetable well cooked but food is lukewarm.   Lemonade and tea well made. Desserts are moist. Good cake and pecan pie. Room attendant Felicia is AWESOME

reviews.text: I ordered on uber eats. 1st red flag was my order was wrong. Me and my son lemon pepper wings. Nothing about these wings said lemon or pepper. THE WINGS WAS FRIED TOOOOOO HARD. The food wasn't SEASONED IM NEVER ORDERING FROM HERE AGAIN

Sodas, Powerade, Water and a few others.

reviews.author: Michael Moore
reviews.text:
This McDonald’s is modern and clean, which made for a good first impression. They have four self-service kiosks along with just one traditional cash register, so it’s clearly set up to push most customers toward ordering at the kiosks.

The issue I ran into was with service speed. I ordered two ice cream cones at the kiosk and it took about 15 minutes to receive them. When I asked about the delay, the cashier mentioned she couldn’t see my order on her screen, which was frustrating since the kiosk is supposed to make the process quicker and easier.

Overall, the restaurant itself is nice and well-kept, but the delay and confusion with the ordering system really took away from the experience.

reviews.author: Speedy All Phone Repair
reviews.text: Why does it say “now serving” if the order has not been handed to me, the complete order is not ready and it’s still been made. Stop lying to get a good number or rating, have some integrity. Now serving means the order is prepared and handed to the customer.

reviews.author: Sheva
reviews.text: Im totally disgusted and upset that this McDonald's would serve me this! I couldn't figure out why when I was drinking my coffee, I kept getting back pieces of "something" in my mouth. Look at what it was! This is a shame. Whomever served me this had to see this. You can't miss it. I feel sick! Then I asked for a Chicken McGriddle and received an old Chicken Biscuit.

reviews.text: I found this restaurant looking for healthy choices in the area after getting my hair braided. Royel was excellent. She recommended things and she was very helpful. The young man in the back made sure I liked my food. Chicken salad and drink $21.

reviews.author: Miriam Jackson
reviews.text: Was looking for a place with vegan options to eat dinner before a concert at the Masquerade and this place is great!! Delicious refreshing lemonade, menu with clearly marked vegan and vegetarian options and the perfect portion sizes. Highly recommend the cauliflower tacos!

reviews.author: Allison “Life With Alli Daily” Naze
reviews.text:
I went here with my fellow mom friend and her daughter...... Not too much seating but the customer service is great and the food was very tasty.

We had the Jackfruit sandwich 😋 and the green drink, I would go back but by myself 😂 and sit in the window and just have a nice day date.

The wall they have decorated from past guests is super cute and authentic and cozy.

Clean bathroom too!

Parking was decent, right off the lot just walk.

reviews.author: Hilde Hund
reviews.text: Great food, healthy, fresh ingredients, excellent service, super-friendly staff, wish they didn't  use as much single-use plastics but at least the to-go boxes were recyclable

reviews.author: April Brown
reviews.text: I tried the salmon quesadilla and it was absolutely delicious, hot and seasoned to perfection, and dipped in liquid gold sauce. Omg! I am so glad the employees talked it up. They weren’t lying. It’s so good! A must try.

reviews.author: Joseph Sheffield
reviews.text: Well, well well. I was nearby working and needed something early in the morning. They have a large menu, serving breakfast and lunch all day. The prices are really affordable and hard to beat. A lot of options under $10. I wanted to be in and out within five minutes, but it took more like 15 to 20 minutes. The parking wasn’t great as there are other shops in the plaza who share the same spaces. It’s kinda in the Hood, so there are people standing outside, but have no fear. They’re just kings and queens like you and I. Everything will be gentrified soon. I appreciate the young people working the front. Just a few seats to eat inside. I wonder how their speed is when it’s packed. Most people probably grab & go. I tore the food up in the car. Everything was delicious and hot. Well plated and great value. Saved this place to my favorites and I’m excited about coming back to try the lunch options. They have all of my favorites on the menu. The grit bowl and the French toast was great. I’d recommend trying this place.

reviews.author: Nina Martin
reviews.text: A True Hidden Gem!  They serve breakfast all day! Very clean and smelling so good like your mama in the kitchen!  This restaurant is the truth!  I will definitely be back as I want to try everything on the menu!  Everything coming out of the kitchen is Heaven!  This go round we had the Boss Up Bowl with spinach and onions, the crispy fall off the bone whole wings, the Cory Breakfast with shrimp and gravy and the Homemade Lemonade (Peach and Strawberry).  And all at an affordable price…When I tell you EVERYTHING was great!  It was great! Cory’s Spot is truly the best comfort food in da A.

reviews.author: Alisia Clay
reviews.text: I live in the area and don't know how I missed this hidden gem! Some of the best wings I've ever had and the price was so affordable! I've been the last two days and more than likely will be back tomorrow! Lol Great customer service also! Definitely got a new customer!

reviews.author: John Hancock lll
reviews.text: I remembered going there back in the day and then not wanting to give correct change. Called in for whole wings and onion rings. $9.81 gave correct change when arriving. Gave me 6 small wings and 9 or 10 rings.  Asked about whole wings and said I'm sorry we don't have them. Asked why she didn't say anything. I tried to give a second chance.  Not to mention just dropped the food and ran to the back didn't know if it was mine or the other guy in there when asked she said mine then her and the other guy started fussing or something.

reviews.author: Roy Cogdell III
reviews.text: Cory’s Spot never disappoints! I’ve always loved their burgers, but recently they came through in a big way with a last-minute catering order for a youth event. The food was a huge hit—not a single piece of chicken or fry was left! The kids were asking when we’d be bringing them back again before the event even ended. Great food, great people, and a real asset to the community. Highly recommend!

google_address: 501 Fairburn Rd SW, Atlanta, GA 30331, USA

reviews.author: Brandy,
reviews.text:
I had an extremely disappointing and unprofessional experience here. As someone with a clinical background and previous research experience, I know how a proper screening should be handled, and this was the opposite.

First, the sub-investigator (a nurse practitioner) never introduced herself, was dismissive, and misrepresented my medical history in the prescreen. She labeled a simple, occasional menstrual headache as “chronic pain,” which I repeatedly clarified it was not. This was not based on actual protocol criteria and felt personal rather than clinical. They also told me I would get to speak with the investigator, but that never happened.

One staff member openly yelled my name down the hallway instead of approaching me professionally, after making me wait 30–45 minutes with no update. Another staff member clearly lacked basic medical knowledge and could not perform or explain routine procedures.

What makes this worse is that they never contacted me with a decision. I had to reach out myself, only to finally be told the day before a holiday weekend that I was “disqualified,” even though I was fully qualified based on the actual inclusion and exclusion criteria. Anyone in research knows the PI reviews a case before a sponsor decision is even needed, and that absolutely did not happen here.

This kind of unprofessional behavior is why many patients avoid clinical trials and why studies suffer from poor enrollment and unreliable data. People deserve to be treated respectfully and evaluated accurately, not dismissed due to staff frustration or personal bias. This site failed to meet even basic standards of professionalism, communication, or scientific integrity.

reviews.author: Joshua Lioi
reviews.text:
I love this place and it's people. Everyone is working double duty trying to facilitate studies that will hopefully benefit all of society. I've always been treated with the utmost respect here and everyone has been a pleasure to deal with. If you have a survey request or opportunity and it's cenexel listed,  it's real.

Be patient and ontop of things though as there are many they have to deal with vs us who only need manage ourselves.

5 stars. Place is clean. Only thing I could say is the bathrooms are a bit scary. Clean, just old.

Forgot to mention, if you can manage to get assistance from Dondra, know you're in good hands! She managed me and has a wealth of wisdom for everyone. I enjoy all the staff, but Dondra was my first point of contact and the reason I am able to post as I am now!

Great stuff!

reviews.author: Sheila Gallant
reviews.text:
I had never done any medical studies before and was very nervous. I had heard from friends that it was iffy but found out later they were under new management so I took my chances. Especially with the kind of study I participated in. My outside doctors told me it was safe, and that the company itself was a reputable company so I went with it. I needed more than the paycheck, and I got it!  Stayed in patient at the Fairburn Rd location. Came in manic and stressed, but left with tears because of how well they treated me there! It was more like camp than anything and they paid well. They were very sensitive, accomodating, and kind ! All of them from the director Rebecca to the office staff and coordinators. Dondra is one of the kindest people I ever met. Darien Krystal Kaylee and Ugo all so amazing and understanding! Mr. Kingsley
who did my private sessions knew just how to get you to not only answer the questions honestly but how you comfortable enough to see how you can participate in getting better by really examining where you are.  Sevin and Tony were so cool and everybody treated us like PEOPLE and individuals. The nurses and doctors were such a blessing. The rooms were so comfy and felt like home away from home as best as they could provide considering it's a medical facility . My was great and they put up with so many of our (politely worded) "quirks". Not only do we get compensated handsomely, but they accomplished what I was hoping for! Answers and the right medicine for a mental health issue that NONE of my doctors in 30 YEARS properly addressed. I left there with such tremendous hope because I got the help I really needed AND got paid for it! I would recommend HIGHLY CenExel ACMR on Fairburn Rd and hope to go back soon for another study!

reviews.author: Ray “Good samaritan” Maracnos
reviews.text: Well this an opportunity to get your mental health in check,but it shouldn’t take long for your money to be loaded on your card . I have yet to see the benefits of this program but I will be optimistic. I will definitely keep everyone updated . FYI - most states have passed laws making marijuana legal,but Georgia is not a marijuana friendly state. They will not pay you if you come in testing positive for natural marijuana. Keep that in mind before you give them sensitive information about your health or anything else. I should get paid just for giving my information and time regardless of what happened.

reviews.author: Veronica Atkins
reviews.text: The staff here is so amazing especially the coordinator Casey her leadership is exceptional she goes above and beyond for the patients and the team and I am so grateful. She has to be one of the biggest blessings to me and other patients here especially with my diagnosis that is extremely difficult for me medically.Her support for the patients and staff is top tier service. I also really appreciate Karen who is one of the hardest working women in the industry.nurse Beverley that has been so caring,hard working ,and goes above and beyond with a smile . Nurse Jennifer who works hard and has been so supportive of all the participants during this study. Dr.Julio who is so nice,very professional,and who also goes above and beyond . Wendy the recruiter who was so kind to me and makes sure that you are taken care of getting into the best study for your needs.Tamara and Chanel who always go above and beyond and give us first class service ,Courtney for her exceptional care to us ,Natalie who always blesses us with her smile and works so hard for us. Sheryl the driver who is so dependable ,Adib for always working hard to make sure that we as the participants are taken care of with payments , Nurse Practitioner Bianca and Nurse Practitioner Maria for going above and beyond to take care of our medical needs,Sherrie at iResearch for her exceptional leadership .Honestly the whole staff is so wonderful. My diagnosis has not been easy but with their support I feel encouraged that I am not alone.When you sign up for any studies please let them know that Veronica Atkins referred you.

google_address: 200 Cleveland Ave SW, Atlanta, GA 30315, USA

reviews.author: JJR Media
reviews.text:
I don’t usually take time to write reviews, but this experience needed to be addressed. This was my second visit to this location, and unfortunately, both experiences were disappointing.
During my visit, I was served by a woman who appeared to be the manager. Her attitude and overall approach to customer service were completely unprofessional. The moment I began placing my order, her tone, body language, and lack of patience made the interaction uncomfortable. It’s as if customers aren’t allowed to ask a simple question without being met with frustration or hostility.
To make matters worse, the food itself was below standard. The chicken tenders were pale, dry, and had an odd taste almost as if the oil hadn’t been changed or the chicken wasn’t fresh. I reluctantly brought the food back to request a fresh batch, and instead of understanding or correcting the situation, she gave me a hard time. She even hesitated to replace the BBQ sauce that came with the new order, which made the entire exchange even more unpleasant.
What stood out most to me was the energy among the other employees. They seemed respectful, professional, and patient — yet it was obvious they were forced to work under poor leadership. That’s not fair to them or to paying customers who come in expecting basic courtesy and quality.
This situation should definitely be looked into. Leadership positions require composure, communication skills, and respect for the customer experience. None of that was demonstrated here. I hope upper management takes the time to correct this, because no one employee or customer should have to deal with that type of energy in the workplace.

reviews.author: TK B
reviews.text: I attempted to eat at this location this morning (I do not normally eat at Churches). I ordered a 8 piece family meal and a order of jalapeño bombers. The bombers were $3.49 and the meal was $22.29. The total they gave me was $29.00. When I asked where the extra charges came from the woman told me the price had changed. I told her that its not what was advertised on the board and she said "Oh well that's the price so what you want me to do". I decided to leave but not before I took a picture of the board. Im not sure if the employee was trying to scam me for more money or if the price has changed but hasn't been updated on the board. In any event, its unprofessional, false advertising and makes me feel uneasy. I will not visit this location again, even though I was excited to try the rebranded location.

reviews.author: Kay Kemp
reviews.text: I’m not mad fr cause somehow I didn’t get charged for it but my intentions was to pay that’s their fault. Ordered the 3pc combo and my chicken was still bleeding and slimy. If you not sure if it’s done let it set in that grease for an additional minute especially when making bigger piece auntie not mad auntie was hungry.

reviews.author: L Cummings
reviews.text:
I highly recommend!
Clean environment,  amazingly kind and respectful Team members at this Location!
I don't have one single complaint about the employees customer service or food, all great!
The only suggestion i have is that they try to keep an eye on their dining area due to young (stud) customers Lack of respect towards the the mature. All details would be too long to explain the situation that took place... just know that the younger folks truly need to enjoy, eat their food, and not! allow them and their children to linger and play around for long periods of time in such a small, yet nice dining area.

This day, my first time visiting this location ever 2 (stud) parents seem to be lurking amongst the Wise and Mature Customer!!! They tried starting a conflict with me,  in which I responded on my own when one asked the other if I had a problem, I sternly told them both the only problem I would ever have was not watching my surroundings , my back!!! Multiple times going to the restroom and not using it, huge distraction to me my family member, we dined in, sitting out the way near the restroom, The back and forth, checking us out... The comment
I smelled trouble!
When I said what I said due to hearing what they said, They then walked off realizing they didn't want this problem!!!

I don't know how this review may help, i do know I feel better being allowed to give a review on such unwanted behavior from 2 customers at this location.

very nice establishment!!

reviews.author: Jas
reviews.text: Zero stars. I can see why there are multiple complaints in these reviews about the poor customer service here because I was absolutely REPULSED by the atrocious attitude and pure disrespect of the girl at the register. I have bought food here a couple times, but since this last time- I will never go back again, specifically because of the terrible/non existent customer service. The Sarah person cooking in the back who calls herself the owner should be ashamed of herself also for defending such rudeness of her employees too and also needs a lesson in what it means to to exhibit quality service, value customer feedback, and the importance of public perception of the type of business you run. People with attitudes like this never last long. There are plenty of other places to get food from . SMH✌️ good riddance. Do better.

reviews.author: Omg ILoveYou
reviews.text: I’ve only been to this place one time. I was at Greenbrier mall, and this was the best thing that I saw in the food court at the time. I love anything with rice ..and I love that I was able to basically put the meal together. It was so flavorful. And I cannot wait to go back. I don’t even know the next time I’ll be in Georgia, but I know that I’m going back to this place, at either location. 10/10

reviews.author: Ray S.
reviews.text: I ordered from here for takeout through Uber Eats. It was really bad! The grilled chicken deli sub which I asked to be toasted was steamed to death from the wax paper it was wrapped in and which was glued to the bread and could only be peeled off in small tears, inside of foil. It was just mush with very overly peppered shredded chicken. I don’t want to hurt this small business, but so many others do it right. I threw away $21 which is what this sandwich cost through the app. Also on the order was rice from the healthy section which my colleague stated was also peppered way too heavily. I can’t speak for the dine-in experience, but don’t order a sandwich to go.

reviews.author: Jesseca Jenkins
reviews.text: Customer service is very subpar. Approached the counter to be serviced and the female employee with long  dark hair, medium light complexion just stared at me like I’m working for them and she’s the customer. I could care less about the quality of food if the hospitality is bottom of the barrel. Do better with the people coming to spend their hard earned money on your business. First and last period.
