I highly recommend them.🫶

reviews.author: Yashar Kiarashi
reviews.text: Delicious food, warm and welcoming owner, and fair pricing for the quality you get. The grilled chicken was outstanding, flavorful and perfectly cooked, with a touch of saffron that made it special. Absolutely worth every penny. I’ll definitely be coming back!

reviews.author: Shreya R
reviews.text: This was my absolute favorite food truck in college. The Mediterranean Rice Bowl with Falafel is THE perfect dinner after a long day. Service is friendly and wicked fast.

reviews.author: Mei Underwood
reviews.text: i got the chicken gyro pitta sandwhich. The sandwhich had good flavor but the chicken was incredibly dry. i payed a total of 18 something for the sandwhich and fry combo so i was a little dissatisfied with the dryness of the chicken. oh well. and the fries are bland.

reviews.author: Jennifer Cotton
reviews.text: Platter was amazing and way too big for me to eat all of. Will def be back!

address: 946 Martin Luther King Jr Dr SW, Atlanta, Georgia, 30314
google_address: 946 M.L.K. Jr Dr NW, Atlanta, GA 30314, USA

reviews.author: simone
reviews.text: might be the slowest zaxbys in GA. never fails, you will be in the drive thru line for about ten minutes before even making it to the window. 15 people JUST in front of house but doesn’t make a difference. i ordered dinner and it said it should be READY at 6:06pm. i got to the window at 6:03pm and the girl asked me what time did the app say my food should be READY? i told her 6:06. she told me that i would need to pull around because the order doesn’t come through on their end until that time. i know this isn’t true because i work at zaxbys. the order comes through as soon as you order and you should have it done by that time. i’m 3 minutes early so just be honest and say it isn’t ready. how does the order come through at 6:06 and you’ll have it ready at the same time? reluctantly, i pulled around and of course didn’t get back to the window until around 15-20 minutes later. handed me my food and drinks and told me to have a good night. had to remind them that i also ordered a milkshake. a guy had just asked me 30 seconds prior what kind of milkshake i ordered, so clearly there’s a lack of communication. this was also proven when i pulled up to the speaker and said im picking up for [my name], but when i get to the window, she’s yelling back asking if they have my order. happened BOTH times lmao. the person who takes orders should let drive thru know that so and so is here for a pickup order. my orders are usually right, but if you decide to dine at this establishment, be prepared to be in the drive thru line for minimum 20 minutes, and if you order a milkshake, you’ll need to remind them at the window!!

reviews.author: Ricky Edge
reviews.text: Been eating zaxbys all my life. This location just gets it when it comes to seasoning and preparing the food right. This location should be the standard for how zaxbys is supposed to taste. They're definitely doing something different back in that kitchen, that may not align with company standards and im totally here for it.

reviews.author: Remix Goddess
reviews.text: It's crazy that they close the lobby a whole hour early just to have customers waiting in the drive-thru for over 20 minutes for simple orders! I pulled up at 10:20pm, on Saturday, May 17, 2025, and I'm still waiting at 10:49pm! Since I couldn't walk in and grab my order!

reviews.author: Noodle Ramirez
reviews.text: This employees are great, hard, working folks! Makes me proud to see that they take care of business and get things done . Honestly not many can say we have done or work this late at night and do a great job! 👏🏼 thank you  from your whole neighborhood shoppers!! Hive then a bonus .

reviews.author: Whitney Galster
reviews.text: We came in after a very large group of kids and they did wonderful! Everyone was friendly the food came hot and fast. Clean restaurant. I was so impressed how well they did with that group and didn’t let service slip with the other guest. Shout out to the general manager he was handling the shift so well

google_address: 1192 Pryor Rd SW, Atlanta, GA 30315, USA
2250 Marietta Blvd NW, Atlanta, GA 30318, USA

reviews.author: Shay Starr
reviews.text: This place is great for family dinners and date nights. We made a reservation for 12 which I highly recommend if you want to be accommodating for seating. We arrived a little late but the manger was super sweet and understanding. Our sever was Hope and she was fantastic. She checked in often, refilled our drinks, got everyone’s order correct, and when we had an issue with the dish took it back with no problem. She gave great recommendations and flavors of the bison was spot on. We were allowed to bring in a cake to celebrate a wonderful birthday. Over all great experiences. Shout out to the rest of the staff for being friendly as well.

reviews.author: Cindy Green
reviews.text: Our waiter was Hope. She made sure we had what we needed for my party. The food was good. It was very clean and good music. It wasn’t to crowded and since we called to let them know our party size, they had it already when we got there so there was no wait time. They have no rule against cake if you are celebrating your birthday there.

reviews.author: Jawaniecika Bryant
reviews.text:
Ted’s never disappoints. I’ve been there a few times over the years, and every single time I go, I leave satisfied. My go-to is always the bison nachos. And if I’m being completely H.O.T. (humble, open, and transparent), I may have tried one other thing, maybe a burger, can’t quite remember, but I just always end up going for the nachos.

My lady got the meatloaf sandwich, and it was good! Like, good enough to order again but not necessarily something to brag about.

Our waitress, Tracey, was awesome. She’s new, only been there about a week and a half, but she was on point helping my baby decide since it was her first time there with me.

We’ll definitely be back in the future. I’ll try something new next time and come back with an update, lol.

reviews.author: Zipporah Ford
reviews.text: I usually order to go here, but I will say they have some really good bison sliders. Yesterday I dined in and ordered the crab cake as an appetizer. Salmon asparagus, and broccoli for my entree. The crab cake was made with real crab meat. I was impressed at how well the salmon was seasoned it and the veggies tasted smoke but it was delicious not over powering smoky taste. I sat at the bar and my server Kenndy was sweet and  gave me incredible service and advice on what to order.

reviews.author: teresa schum
reviews.text:
This place is so good 😊
We have tried the bison burgers (my favorite is red rock)
When they have the sweet potatoes fries is a must for me.
This year for my birthday, we went and I got the huckleberry jalapeño margarita which was amazing!  Got the salmon plate with the delicious Parmesan grilled broccoli.
We recently have tried the cheesecake and the presentation was beautiful and on top the cheesecake was perfect, not sweet.but super yummy.

google_address: 725 Echo St NW, Atlanta, GA 30318, USA

reviews.author: Allison “The Allison Jones” Jones
reviews.text: Dance. Dance and dance some more. This is a usual haunt for the Atl crowd. Beautiful people mostly standing around, lovely ladies, and handsome gents not dancing together (per usual), rather enjoying the grooves in their self designated spots to watch the room. The dj was on point for a while until the sad Usher set which poses the question,  "yo did you break up recently?" But a good time was had by all, I think. Good event!

reviews.author: jasmine mcneil
reviews.text: Ok this place is hands down my new favorite. I loved the DJ and the dancing Santa. The drinks were good. The decor was wonderful. The outside set up is perfect for groups. I like that they have a separate order station for food.

reviews.author: Portia Ellis
reviews.text: Went on a Friday night and there was a really nice vibe. There's inside and outside seating. The drinks were really good. They have a food truck for food,but I didn't get anything to eat this time. They vinyls and have a huge selection to choose from. I plan to go back soon

reviews.author: Jessie Abraham
reviews.text: The ambience and location is great. I had a chicken sandwich with fries. The chicken was a little overcooked. The beer was not cold. My biggest issue with the business is that they charge a mandatory 20% tip when you order a beer that you take outside. Question? Where is the service? It’s illegal to charge a mandatory tip when you’re not providing a service. And what’s even more troubling is that they do not tell you that a mandatory tip is included and they have a tip jar on the counter. So they are essentially double dipping.

reviews.author: Jeffrey Gil
reviews.text: I attended “@ The Boom Bap ATL” party here on Saturday afternoon. It was truly a beautiful event for old school hip hop lovers. Each Dj was skilled from open to close. The smash burger was dope. Awesome staff in both the restaurant & indoor/outdoor spaces.

address: 2641 Donald Lee Hollowell Pkwy NW, Atlanta, Georgia, 30318
google_address: 2641 Donald Lee Hollowell Pkwy NW, Atlanta, GA 30318, USA

reviews.author: Tan Tan
reviews.text: I had a great experience at Checkers! The food was fresh,  piping hot 😋 and the service was excellent. I especially want to recognize Jason for his outstanding work and customer service. He was friendly, professional, and made sure everything was just right. Employees like Jason make the difference—thank you for going above and beyond!

reviews.author: Freddy Milkovich
reviews.text: The food is consistently good out of here over the years, and the staff is generally chill, but it's always very very slow.    But again,  just expect it to be slower than most other places around.   It's probably staffing, wages, or both,  but the food is actually always good and correct and I guess that's what's most important locals do appreciate that consistency.

reviews.author: Ne'kea
reviews.text:
Nahh this is probably the worst checkers ever.

First off the parking lot has giant pot holes.
Customer service is awful, they get you to the window to pay then advise you that there is a wait for a particular items INSTEAD of letting you know prior to taking your payment so you can decide on your own, with your own free will if you in fact are able to wait on said food item.

Thursday October 2 was my last visit to this checkers location!

Waiting almost 20 mins for fast food and being denied a refund when asked is ridiculous.

reviews.author: SuperModel Atlanta
reviews.text:
No fork no ketchup no napkins
All I purchased was a LARGE FRY
“Under new management”

reviews.author: antwan moss
reviews.text: Food was actually hot and decent today. This location is hit or miss sometimes. The guy that served me in the window tonight was really cool and super courteous!

google_address: 211 Cleveland Ave SW, Atlanta, GA 30315, USA

reviews.author: Christopher
reviews.text:
I placed my order using the automated drive-through service at this Checkers location. I found it strange that no one came on the intercom to confirm or greet me. Shortly after, I saw the employee outside on his cell phone. As I waited, he pointed at me and held up one finger to signal “one minute”—clearly prioritizing his phone conversation over customer service. I even overheard him say, “I love you, I’ll call you back,” confirming it was a personal call.

The customer service and attention to detail were unacceptable. However, I will say the food was fresh. I just wish the employee had been more professional and attentive rather than focusing on his personal call while customers waited to be served.

reviews.author: Richard Chambers
reviews.text: Tried to eat here 2x in the last couple of months. Food’s been good in the past, but I didn’t get any these past 2 times. Last time I ordered but when I got to the window their card reader was down so I had to cancel the order and go somewhere else. Nothing a worker can do about that, but it was a bummer. This time they said their system was down for a shift change at 6:40 and it would be 20 minutes. Not sure why every other restaurant is able to handle shift work without stopping, particularly around meal time, but this place isn’t. I was looking forward to some Checkers fries but had to go somewhere else again.

reviews.author: Tammie Brown
reviews.text: This is the worse Checkers I have ever seen. I literally just seen the boy cussing out a customer. I waited 30 minutes in line just for him to tell me they closing for 15 minutes come back. I told him I just waited 30 minutes and he had the nerve to tell me he didn’t ask me to come get in line. I’m sure if the company know what’s going on at this location but I’m definitely reporting it to corporate.

reviews.author: April Taylor
reviews.text: Traveling from out of town with my family and this place has the worst customer service EVER! Paid over $50 for food that was horrible!!! The lady at the window clearly had a attitude for some reason. My chili cheese fries were old and stale, the chicken strips were so greasy you couldn’t even eat it. Then the rude and disrespectful lady had the nerve to say I wouldn’t have bought my husband to checkers on Father’s Day! Lady you don’t know me from a can of paint and she had some nerve! FYI we were just stopping through on our way to our destination I don’t care what day it is!

reviews.author: Jared Epps
reviews.text: I spent $65 dollar for food last night and they didn’t even make my food and just gave my dasher whatever they wanted too. And now they can’t answer the phone and it won’t allow me to get refund. I’ll never order from yall again. Trifling as ever

google_address: 2461 Metropolitan Pkwy SW, Atlanta, GA 30315, USA

reviews.author: Olive
reviews.text:
Need I say more ? Please don’t waste your time go to another location. Order for carry out!

Pizza isn’t fresh or even cut.
I’m a hospitality professional and lover of all things culinary and this indeed was not made with LOVE. Just thrown together! In fact lol since I’ve worked in the food/hospitality industry for a while I know in fact they didn’t make this fresh. It was half cheese and half pep. Had to cut it myself and really didn’t even eat it only munch on the crust.
They had some sitting in the hot box and just threw pep on and tried to through it back in the oven. I strive for quality, great food, and great service. This indeed wasn’t to standard.
Please don’t waste your time and money with this business. & to the staff, and management please care more

reviews.author: Xander Trollhunter
reviews.text: I live close by and ordered from here often, but tonight I learned my money is better spent at another location. If you order online and the establishment currently out of what you ordered, the courteous way to handle this is to call the customer and say "hey we're out of the New Yorker, would you care to order something else." Not send the customer a notification 'order ready in 15 minutes.' I assumed I would pick up my order. NOPE!! The ICGAS cashier acted as if I was bothering him when I asked common sense questions. Didn't offer to fix the issue, nope. Told me, next time order earlier, maybe we'll have it. I entered this establishment at 11:42:37. Thank you for your LACK of service

reviews.author: Chelsey Jackson
reviews.text: The pizza was good, but could've been better if they gave me what I actually ordered. On this particular day, I ordered 3 medium cheese pizzas, 2 with Hut seasoning on the crust, and 1 of them were supposed to be done tavern style. Instead, I received 3 cheese pizzas with no Hut seasoning.

reviews.author: Chinesia “Chyna” Parrott
reviews.text:
Every time I try to use this location to feed my family there is always an issue. They run out of everything needed for daily sales and do not call the customer to make sure they know.
I ordered a meal for my family last night that was missing three items and was told the refund could not be done until the next day…Today is the next day and no one is answering the phone and the operator line cant reach anyone either. I loose money or food here and it’s like when you have no choice you pick here to feed your family knowing something gone be wrong but try to give them the benefit of the doubt anyway…it’s sad because this community somewhat needs this location because the others are miles away. This was my last straw.

reviews.author: Melvin Burns
reviews.text: Avoid if you care about your time and money. I placed an online order today at 2:18pm with a delivery eta of 2:48. It it almost 4pm and I have not received my food. I have called the store several time and no one picks up. The call center is no help either because they can not even help to cancel the order or reach the store.

google_name: Superior Vegan - Juices and Vegan Food
google_address: 1990 Perkerson Rd SW, Atlanta, GA 30310, USA

reviews.author: Kathleen Snow
reviews.text:
I got the Philly cheesesteak from their food truck at a festival, and it was one of the best sandwiches I've ever had. The cheese was super creamy, there was a variety of vegetables, and the meat substitute was a very good imitation; it even had the fibrous, stringy texture of steak. There was. Also a generous helping of fries.

My friend also said the bundt cake was moist and delicious.

I hope to visit this food truck again one day. Even though the Philly cheesesteak was a bit expensive at $24 ($26.14 including tax), it would be a treat I'd be willing to splurge on.

reviews.author: J
reviews.text:
I went here the second day of OMF. It was much better value and service than the vegan place I went to the first day.

I ordered the Headkrack Cheesesteak with seasoned fries. It was sooooooo good and FILLING! Superior is an apt description, and I plan on patronizing them again.

reviews.author: Michel Cockerham
reviews.text: I got the jackfruit tacos and the elixir drink! Soooo delicious and fresh! Would definitely recommend to anyone, vegan or not.

reviews.author: Bethany Diamond
reviews.text: Just had the most delicious Philly ‘Cheesesteak’ sandwich from the Superior Vegan Food-truck. If I didn’t know better, I would swear it was really animal protein.  Fries were super delish too. Yummmmm

reviews.author: True Atlanta Farms LLC
reviews.text: HANDS DOWN best vegan food in ATL! The Philly is phenomenal! Amazing that this kind of food is served on a food truck!

company_name: The Corner Grille Upper West Side
google_address: 2341 Marietta Blvd NW, Atlanta, GA 30318, USA

reviews.author: Jarred Flores
reviews.text:
If you’re craving a solid chicken sandwich on Atlanta’s Westside, The Corner Grill is worth a stop. The sandwich hit the mark—crispy, hot, and piled high with slaw—and the fries came out well-seasoned and fresh.

I came in for lunch and ordered the fried chicken sandwich with fries. The plate was generous, and the food came out looking just like the photo: golden, straightforward, and ready to eat. The sandwich had a great crunch and didn’t fall apart mid-bite. The slaw added just enough texture without soaking the bun.

The fries had visible seasoning and stayed hot the whole time. Nothing soggy, nothing cold. You get a decent portion too.

Service was polite, nothing over the top. The space was quiet enough for conversation even during lunch, which I appreciated. Easy parking nearby.

This isn’t a trendy or experimental spot—it’s a clean, casual lunch with food that tastes like it was made fresh, not fussy. Prices felt fair for the quality and portion size.

If you’re in the area and want something filling without the wait or scene, this place gets the job done.

reviews.author: Pollie Tolson
reviews.text: We came for lunch and were impressed with every dish and each one was delicious and perfectly seasoned. We tried the Cajun Seafood Pasta, Catfish, Cajun Chicken Sandwich, and Shrimp and Grits, and everything exceeded our expectations. Josiah provided exceptional service, making our experience even better. We’re already looking forward to our next visit!

reviews.author: Skyline Roofing & Remodeling LLC / Primary
reviews.text: The atmosphere feels like a pretty cool experience. It’s unique, the staff is really nice and the food quality is superb. Pretty sure they make everything from scratch from what they told me so it’s nice to see that as unhealthy as a lot of American food has become. I got the grilled Cajun chicken sandwich and there was this French pastry type dessert that was out of this world.

reviews.author: Lemuel Tweh
reviews.text: Had a great experience at Corner Grille in Marietta! The food was delicious all around—everything was fresh and full of flavor. Our server, Vanessa, was fantastic—super friendly, attentive, and made sure we had everything we needed. Definitely a spot I’ll be coming back to. Highly recommend if you’re in the area!

reviews.author: Shad Russell
reviews.text: Vanessa was outstanding. Great personality plenty of recommendations. I went with the Cajun pasta and it was beyond amazing. My daughter had shrimp and grits she destroyed it. Then washed it down with a brownie. Definitely will stop back next time visiting Atlanta

reviews.text: Nice, helpful and fairly quick unloading. Tight to back into docks, but doable. Good place to deliver to. My photo is after I was backed into a middle dock.

reviews.text: They use chemicals unsafe for human consumption people fake clean. They're is acidic chemicals ask over the ceilings and walls spiders and webs everywhere I worked here found bugs and grime everywhere this place is disgusting people sweating all over covered in the powder they dump. Coughing sneezing around equipment. Friendly staff but the business should be shut down. Half the equipment needs to be cleaned. The floors are never correctly cleaned. This business is dirty all the way around. The only time they deep clean is when they have an audit. They tried to make me sign papers stating they deep cleaned every Friday and i didn't even work there on the dates they made me sign for I asked them to shred and remake papers. This business is fraudulent and need an investigation I hope u guys see me telling the truth to the world

I work in Tucker GA but I never visited that location because of all of the bad reviews! This location is the business my food was delicious cooked correct. I feel that every other location should train under them and this location every one should get a raise! I passed the other loan the original second location in midtown countless times ⛏️ up and dropping my sister off to the MegaBus but I never stopped by there. The food at this location is bussing that I'm reviewing right now. Compliments to the chef keep up the great work! Pull up and support.

reviews.text: The service was excellent and the wings are the best in Atlanta hands down omg they are awesome 👌.  This is my new spot to watch my football now.

reviews.text: Cool atmosphere. Neighborhood sports bar with covered outdoor cigar lounge. Good wings. Plenty of big screen TVs to enjoy all the games. Service was solid. Our waitress was attentive and pleasant. Would return!!

reviews.author: Amaya Wright
reviews.text:
I had to write a review only because the customer service really brightened my day. I didn’t catch her name but the lady working at 5:00 PM on November 4th is such a light and deserves recognition. I was having a very rough day and decided to stop in Little Caesars to grab dinner on my way home. Her kindness and positive attitude really helped boost my mood . Times are hard and It really made me happy to see that there are people that are still kind to each other out there.
On top of that this was the best tasting little cesar’s pizza I’ve had in years . Definitely my go -to location from now on .

reviews.author: Howard Clay Jr. (Filmmaker)
reviews.text: Today is my birthday and my favorite pizza is Pizza Hut but that's to far away because I'm injured right now. So I decided lil ceaser.  Now I've been to this location before and the food was amazing so I was skeptical if they could do it again, on a busier day at a busier time.  BABBBYYYYY they did not disappoint!  It was amazing.  Customer service was what it was for a Pizza pickup spot...lol I food was ready and he handed me my box...lol.  But anywho, whomever is the chef cooking these pizzas, and yes I said CHEF, thank you for Pizza Perfection.  This fat soul is HAPPY on his Birthday.  You never know how a little attention to detail can make someone's day.

I noticed that the traffic and customers are not there anymore either sucks. I wonder where the Old owners took their business. Not going back to this place . Took co workers and was a complete flock.

reviews.author: Mecha Em
reviews.text: I haven't eaten here in forever, but the wings were good when they first opened. The area is lackluster, but they work hard to maintain friendly customer service. My favorite wing flavor was teriyaki. As the cost of everything else has risen, so have their prices (to be expected).

reviews.author: Ms. St. Germain
reviews.text:
Was in the area & stopped by to see what this spot was givin’ & it did NOT disappoint.🤤🤤🤤

Customer service was superb. She did so good I wish I had some cash on me that day. lol Hella accommodating & welcoming. Plus, the food was fresh. I got the teriyaki lemon pepper wet & tore it up so fast I forgot to take a before pic.😹

This lil spot is a piece of “Ol’ A’lana” & I’m here for it.
10 outta 10, Za recommends.
#99thReview fa a Real One🔥🔥🔥

address: 3201 Atlanta Industrial Pkwy NW, Atlanta, Georgia, 30331
google_address: 3844 Longview Dr, Douglasville, GA 30135, USA

reviews.author: Viktoriia Dmitrieva
reviews.text: This is my #1 haunted house this season! No doubt! There are 3 haunted houses and all of them make me 💦my pants! This year the city made them take down outside decorations but the thrill inside is stronger than ever! I’m looking forward to return for another portion of pure thrills! Did you go there yet? What are you waiting for?!?

reviews.author: Alford Arnold Jr.
reviews.text: Good haunted house. Staff is really nice. The black out house is the best... Great looking set up in there.. Lines not long. I'm just glad it's one closer to the city that I didn't hv to drive 100 miles away.

reviews.author: Holly G
reviews.text: We went here and enjoyed ourselves so much! The props and sets were AMAZING! We haven't seen such in depth ones with such an eye for detail in a long time. The actors' costumes were great, and they seemed to really wnjoy themselves being the "monsters". Each of the haunts are a great length, not short at all, but we found ourselves wanting them longer because it was so good! We really had a good time. The people (the ones not costumed) were very friendly and helpful and treated like friends, not the usual formal "customer/worker" persona. All in all, worth the trip. Just take your time and take it all in when you're there.

reviews.author: Chirag Venkatesan
reviews.text: Loved it! 3 different sets and each one had very unique elements! The actors did a fantastic job and a few of the jump scares definitely got me good! One of the best haunted houses I've been to in a couple years! Would definitely recommend - and it's a good value for money!

reviews.author: Haley
reviews.text: Probably the best haunt I’ve been to hands down. Three separate haunts at one location, each a different theme. The scenery is so neat that if you weren’t scared you’d wanna hang around and look at everything all day! The actors are great at their job and you can tell they put their all into it. I’m not sure if it’s always this way as we went an hour before closing and there weren’t many people, but we went in with just our group of three. Other groups had 5-6 and they went in together without strangers added to their group. That makes it much more intimate. There’s no chance of someone ahead triggering a jumpscare so you’re anticipating it. The event staff was kind and informative as well. We’ll be back for sure!

google_address: 1990 Perkerson Rd SW Suite 7, Atlanta, GA 30310, USA

reviews.author: Stephanie Gomez
reviews.text: I had an event and got the American food and tacos trucks. They were SO delicious. People enjoyed the food SO much. Customer service was impeccable setting this up and at the window. I highly recommend using these trucks for any occasion you have. Thank you so so much for your patience and services.

reviews.author: Miss English
reviews.text: Great customer service and good food. Hot honey catfish nuggets and five lemon pepper wings.

reviews.author: Steve Prosser
reviews.text: My wife and I had their food at the Cherry Blossom Festival in Conyers and I have to say it was by far the best festival food we have had. My wife had the fish basket and I had the shrimp basket.  I highly recommend them and will be looking forward to seeing them again next year.

reviews.author: Zadee Nelms
reviews.text: Excellent service! There are some really good menu options and the food smells delicious! I’m excited to share with family and friends.

reviews.author: Mitchelle Southern
reviews.text: My husband and are in GA visiting family. We're from California. Came across this truck at an event today.  Food is AMAZING. Fish was fresh and hot. I'm not even a hush puppy fan but both my husband and I loved these! Also loved the shrimp and the CORN! I could just tell right away this was going to some good eats. Seasoning is great.  But even better than the food was the customer service!  Something that is lacking in this day and age. Smiles, patience in explaining the options and an appreciative attitude for our business.  If I lived here, I'd support this business all the time!  THANK YOU!

google_address: 3375 Buford Hwy NE Ste 1050, Atlanta, GA 30329, USA

reviews.author: Angelia Balentine
reviews.text: First time visiting this restaurant and I'll definitely go back. I met up with some friends Saturday night for a belated birthday celebration. I got there around 6 pm and there was about a 45-50 minute wait. The ambiance is really nice and the food was delicious. I ordered the honey garlic chicken wings, which had just the right amount of crisp without being overcooked. It's an appetizer, but I chose it as my meal, along with black eyed peas, candied yams and cornbread. That, plus my 'Georgia on my mind' cocktail was $41. Plus, they auto-added gratuity for a party of 4, so it was $51 total. My friends also ordered the catfish, fried chicken wings, Mac and cheese, collard greens and mashed potatoes.  Everybody thought the food was good, but mentioned that the collards were a little salty, and so were the mashed potatoes. Overall, it was a great dining experience, the customer service was good, and I would recommend Southern Fire Kitchen.

reviews.author: Keys-New Orleans
reviews.text: I can explain why I only gave 4 stars for everything. One parking was a freaking disaster, the parking lot was full and sectioned off for valet. We go inside and we were told the wait was 45 mins, for a table for 4. We were seated 2 mins later (we were going to try somewhere else) assuming that the servers were busy. Next we get our water, 7 minutes later our order was taken food took 15-20 minutes, judging on the swift moving from the severs they were busy busy. When the food arrived my mouth watered as I had heard so many wonderful things about the location (Fayetteville not pulling up on Google Maps). My salmon bites were not good at all I loved the ingress from loaded mac. I did not expect them to be fried as I don’t like fried foods and eat maybe once a month, it was tasteless they met so much hot sauce and the dipping sauce provided, but it tasted like mayo (I don’t eat mayo) so that was ugh. Let’s go to the mac and cheese me I’m in love with mac n cheese like a kid, they were cheesy indeed but lacked the flavor I desired. My hubs said the greens were vinegar tasting, his lobster pasta was delicious I tell ya. Nice setting I must say, the music was interesting, the bathroom was clean, but needed a tiding up the second time and went in there. My server name was niecey (not sure of spelling). Although she was in and out of the kitchen and visited the table twice she did not refill my water which was emptied due to the long wait waiting for food to arrive. She still received a decent tip. Should’ve ordered that cornbread

reviews.author: Kaiya N.
reviews.text:
Southern fire kitchen

This spot really understood the assignment 🍽️💛. Southern Fire Kitchen coming w/the heat🔥🔥🔥. By far some of the best Soul Food I ever had in Georgia. Everything A1 🙌🏾🙌🏾. It stays packed tho reservations are best or come soon as they open!

1. Appetizer: SFK Wings - Honey Garlic
2. Entree - Grilled Salmon, Baked Mac, Collard Greens
3. Baked Turkey Wing, Black Eyed Peas, Baked Mac Food
Everything was 10/10😋

reviews.author: Rhonda E.
reviews.text: Lord, have mercy on my soul!!!! Why did I stumble upon this place while visiting family in Atlanta. Southern Fire is absolutely incredible. The food was the best soul food I have had in over 20 years. I don't know who they have in the kitchen, but OMG, chef's kiss! 💋 I ordered food to go because the place was so packed. There was a 35-minute wait. I ordered 2  smothered turkey wing dinners (sorry, my mom just started to chow down before I could snap a good pic) with candied yams, collard greens, and a side of mac & cheese. Also, ordered the fried catfish dinner with collars and mac. For dessert, we got the peach cobbler, red velvet cake, and pound cake. Yes, we're eaters. The food was so well seasoned and cooked to perfection. The desserts were also delicious. The red velvet cake, absolutely superb, the peach cobbler, perfect peach to crust ratio. My least favorite was the pound cake (wouldn't order that again). The food was just like my granny used to make. The kind so good you have to kick off your shoes and wiggle your toes while eating. I have been telling everyone I can about this place. It is a real gem. Next time, I will dine in because the vibe looks incredible, and the decor is beautiful. Wishing Southern Fire many, many, many years of success. It's well deserved. And just know I will be back.

reviews.author: Nikimah Williams
reviews.text: We visited the Fayetteville location on a Sunday evening and we're seated immediately. Our waitress was very prompt and attentive. Our food came out quickly  and it was delicious and plentiful! The portions are huge, you will definitely have food to go. Tonight they had complimentary  valet parking (not sure if its an every night thing). Overall we enjoyed our experience and will definitely visit again.

address: 2041 Martin Luther King Jr Dr SW, Atlanta, Georgia, 30310
google_address: 2041 M.L.K. Jr Dr SW, Atlanta, GA 30310, USA

reviews.author: Ashtin Cunningham
reviews.text: Found this gem otw home from work randomly! Black owned and the food was Amazing and seasoned perfectly! I personally had the Chicken Alfredo, which was made to order with enough pasta to feed 2 ppl easily! I will definitely be back soon.

reviews.author: Toni McBride
reviews.text: I had the pork chop dinner with Mac and cheese and yams . The chops were seasoned with perfection , I give them an 8/10 and only because they could’ve been a little bit more crispier . The sides were really good and flavorful and they give you a ton of food for a great price , I’m glad we are getting more food options on this side , go check them out .

reviews.author: Mr James
reviews.text: This is one of my goto places.  Almost everything I've tried here tastes good.  That home cooked food.  Perfect seasonings and all.  Pleasant and friendly service as well.  My favorite so far is the Salmon Alfredo.  They also have Soul Food on Sundays.

reviews.author: Famerica Dee
reviews.text: Love the Alfredo

google_address: 1959 Lakewood Ave SE, Atlanta, GA 30315, USA

reviews.author: brooklyn
reviews.text:
Amazing food and great service, we chose to eat here for lunch our first day in Atlanta and I’m so glad we did, we shared a portion of the chicken Alfredo between 3 people and we also got the garlic parm fries, teriyaki Brussel sprouts, and fried okra.
Big portions and you definitely won’t leave without a mouthful of flavor

reviews.author: Jennifer
reviews.text: If you want some good food, visit SAUCED UP. From the moment I walked in to completing my meal was very pleasant. The Food was Delicious and SUPER tasty 😋 ....which I had the works on the Chicken Alfredo. If you like the Pic, try the food, cause it's even better. Savannah was very nice and thorough when I ordered and the ambiance was inviting. All Good Vibes! I will be visiting 🤗 again. 💯 🌟 🌟🌟🌟🌟

reviews.author: KaTeysha A
reviews.text: I’ve come here a few times and each time it’s consistently good. Tonight I got the Salmon Alfredo and added Jerk Sauce… Talking about GOOD! The Salmon was fresh and cooked perfectly. Definitely my new late night spot.

reviews.author: Quint Harden
reviews.text: I’ve tried almost everything from the menu from the Salmon lamb chops grilled chicken & shrimp, rice and broccoli, to golden brown egg rolls to the flavorful crispy Wings and I must say… Everything is seasoned & cooked to perfection every single time! I have yet to regret my decision on stopping at Sauce Up. For it to be a new location I must add that everything is up to Par from the Customer service to the food & oh yeah… That Lemonade… One Word, BUSSIN! If your’e in the Lakewood area I highly recommend stopping by and getting some great food for a great price!

reviews.author: Nike B
reviews.text:
I am not a local eatery type of girl,however I have been a local girl since the doors opened.
The menu has something for any taste you may be craving. I’ve had the majority of everything on the menu,and might I add that EVERYTHING was a 10/10 !!!
Thanks for the consistency in food and service
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

google_address: 565 Northside Dr SW Building 2, Atlanta, GA 30310, USA

reviews.author: Jing Lin
reviews.text:
This is a local spot near my neighborhood that opened in the last year or so. I like coming here because of the proximity to home but also that they’re dog friendly. Their sandwiches are pretty good. I’ve tried the Miami Cuban, Sam I am, Samuel. I would say my favorite is the Miami Cuban which is probably one of the popular items on the menu. I’m not a fan of mustard but I actually liked it in this sandwich.

I will say I was underwhelmed by their drinks. I ordered an iced matcha and there was very little “drink” in it, mostly ice. You can see that after finishing my drink, my cup still had almost a full cup of ice. (And this is after some melted!) Not worth the price point imo. Worth visiting for the sandwiches though.

reviews.author: Ava D
reviews.text:
I absolutely loved every bit of my experience at Sammy’s! The chic and modern decor plus the abundance of natural light pouring into the huge windows make for an enjoyable experience inside. And the customer service provided by Jason and his team was A+! I felt very welcome and left with a smile on my face. The highlight of my visit was the delicious food. I ordered The Green Eggs and Ham breakfast sandwich; I got mine with bacon. The brioche bun was buttered to perfection and it was a perfect handheld to eat while driving. The eggs aren’t actually green, but fresh basil is folded into the eggs, cooked to your preference.
The yogurt parfait with seasonally fresh fruit and granola was delicious too. I’m not a coffee drinker but I hear the coffee is great. If coffee isn’t your thing, try the limeade with one of their house-made syrups.
If you’re in the area (it’s on the corner of Wells and where Metropolitan Pkwy and Northside Drive meet) come in and give it a try, they’re open for breakfast and lunch. If you’re not in the area, do yourself a favor and make the trip. You won’t be disappointed!
*Next time I’m in town I’m going to try the Uncle Sam made with smoked pork butt that Chef Sam smokes on the wood burning grill right outside*

reviews.author: Joey Widener
reviews.text:
Run, drive fast, or generally just get to Sammy’s. You will NOT be disappointed!

The service and staff are awesome, but more importantly, the sandwiches are delicious.

We couldn’t choose only two, had to try three to get all the flavors and all are winners.

Can’t wait to get back again soon for a morning coffee and breakfast sandwich, and also for a Friday evening burger (don’t forget to order the champagne of beers to wash it down)!

All in all, cannot recommend this place enough. It’s worth the effort to get there.

reviews.author: Raechelle Myers
reviews.text: As a New Yorker, i had a craving for a good sandwich. I found Sammy’s & it did not disappoint. I’m typing this as I’m halfway through my sandwich bc I didn’t want to miss the opportunity to give them a great review! Customer service was top tier! I had no intentions of eating in but glad I did, it makes me want to come here to get some work done. I got the Samigo with American cheese , hotter n hot jalepebo chips, tequila limeade (blueberry) which was phenomenal & a pickle! I’m debating on a cookie before i leave. Don’t walk, run !!

reviews.author: Hunter McDaniel
reviews.text: Pretty good sandwich and coffee shop. I got the Miami Cuban Sandwich and it was alright. They have a variety of coffee flavors and good matcha. Not sure if it was a special event, but they had a DJ and were playing party music while we ate.

google_address: 2149 Metropolitan Pkwy SW, Atlanta, GA 30315, USA

reviews.author: Natydia Gill
reviews.text: Great vibes

company_name: Holy Smokin BBQ and Cajun Cuisine
google_address: 1801 Delowe Dr SW Ste C, Atlanta, GA 30311, USA

reviews.author: P Georgeanna
reviews.text: This Black-owned BBQ spot is a gem! I got the rib tips with double mac & cheese and everything was so good. The rib tips were tender and flavorful, and the mac & cheese was cheesy and comforting—just how it should be. On top of that, the service was fast and the portions were huge for the price. Great food, great value, and definitely worth coming back for!

reviews.author: Crystal
reviews.text: If I remember correctly they're in the same parking lot as the Exon gas station. Of the the Best ribs I've had in Atlanta. It's hard to find good ribs here.... these ribs are great. The potatoe salad is real family reunion somebody grandma cooked that as opposed to the store bought looking stuff you see at other bbq resturants. You truly eat with your eyes here; you can see the seasoning on the food! Baby the yams were off the chain...Craving soul food?! Look no further than Holy Smokin!!!! The service was excellent and overall, they put alot of love in their food. That's the best way I can describe it!  I'll be back again and again and again!!!

reviews.author: LaVon
reviews.text:
📣BEST SOUL FOOD IN TOWN!!!  Y’all, this place is a hidden gem! I only stopped here by accident while getting some ice and I’m so glad I did. I’ve lived in the area almost 4 years and had no idea this spot even existed.

From the warm welcome at the door to the moment I left, everything was amazing. The staff was super friendly and knew the menu inside out. I had the chicken and sausage gumbo, red beans and rice, and dressing with gravy, all homemade, seasoned perfectly, and full of soul.

You can taste the love in every bite. When I say RUN to this place, I mean it! Thank you for blessing our city with food this good.

reviews.author: Lc Williams
reviews.text: As soon as you walk in, you get that down south hospitality everyone is super nice and The food is authentic made fresh and very delicious from the barbecue beef tips on down to the gumbo, red beans and Sausage Can’t forget to add that the Boudin and sausage is Made in house

reviews.author: Armand Jones
reviews.text: Coming from the area where this food originates, I love getting a taste of home when I go by.  The staff and service are great and I look forward to coming back for more….

google_address: 1990 Perkerson Rd SW, Atlanta, GA 30310, USA
730 Peachtree St NE #570, Atlanta, GA 30308, USA

address: 1475 Atlanta Industrial Way NW, Atlanta, Georgia, 30331
google_address: 1492 Piedmont Ave NE, Atlanta, GA 30324, USA

reviews.author: Harrison Marcus
reviews.text: I got the smash burger with special sauce from Just Eat It Food Truck and it was fantastic! The staff couldn’t be friendlier, and as an added bonus, they have a 100% cleanliness rating, which is always great to see. Definitely worth checking out if you’re nearby or they are nearby you!

reviews.author: Ibi O
reviews.text: This place is BOMB! 😋 When they pull up to City Hall they always have a line. I’m the past I usually get the cheesesteak spring rolls but they were already sold out (bc they are THAT good 🤤)! So, one of the owners suggested I tried the seafood bites either side sauce and baby let me tell you!!! Amazing!!!! Fried to a golden crispy perfection. 🤤 They were so good I had to stay outside to eat them because ai couldn’t make it back to my office fast enough. Lol. I am definitely a repeat customer and you will be too once you try the food and meet the owners who are absolutely lovely. Thanks Eat It! For stopping by Atlanta City Hall!

reviews.author: Jazmine Ogletree
reviews.text: We invited Just Eat It out to CATERPILLAR and they were incredible. The food was consistently delicious, and everyone who tried it absolutely loved it. If we could give them 10 stars, we would! They’re definitely going to be invited back.

reviews.author: Lee Ingram
reviews.text: Just Eat It pulled up to my apartment complex today. The double smash burger was fantastic! The fries were crispy and well seasoned. And the cheese sticks were fried perfectly. Would definitely eat here again!

reviews.author: Derek Rose
reviews.text: I just ate one of the best smash burgers I’ve ever had on the JID set. They pulled up right on time and catered to 100 of our workers. Wait time was no longer than 10 min. and the JUST EAT IT sauce was 10 out of 10.

company_name: Off The Hook Crabs & Fish, LLC.
google_address: 2179 Verbena St NW, Atlanta, GA 30314, USA

reviews.author: Tina Cameron
reviews.text: These rolls are the BEST! They are huge and STUFFED WITH LOBSTER, crab and SHRIMP! And the sauce is delicious! One got me full!!

reviews.author: Mike R
reviews.text: Chef Tyler has been a long-time fan of mine, and I've always been impressed with his cooking, personality, and hospitality via his personal and catering Instagram accounts. I ordered two orders of lamb chops, mac and cheese, yams, and wings. Because of my sensitivities, I appreciate him being able to make substitutions. While this business is still in its early stages, I was pleased with the lamb, mac & cheese, and wings because they were all nicely seasoned and I received my food on time. My only complaint was the yams; while fresh sweet potatoes are typically delicious, the leftover skin was a little disappointing.

reviews.author: Samone C
reviews.text: Placed my order ahead online, pickup was quick & easy. Food was hot, fresh, & flavorful. Lamb chops cooked perfectly & sauce on lamb chops was good! Cabbages were very good too! Will definitely be back!

reviews.author: E Tucker
reviews.text: The name fits. The food is good and well seasoned.  It's off in the cut and you would probably miss it if Google didn't give good directions. The service is great.  Be prepared to wait for your for because everything is made to order. It's worth the wait though.

reviews.author: Dwayne Brown
reviews.text: Enjoyed the food Friday Night.  Great menu items.  You have something great on your hands.

google_address: 104 Pirkle Ferry Rd, Cumming, GA 30040, USA

reviews.author: C Ketron
reviews.text: I bought 3 bags of dried chilis about 2-3 weeks ago.  When I opened the bag to rehydrate them they broke into shards. The anchos were the worst. Best Buy dates all showed 2027. Improper storage does this and the creates potential for some bad bacteria. First time shopping here. Won’t go back.

reviews.author: Stanley Yelnats
reviews.text: This is an AWESOME  little store! Great selection,  friendly staff, great fresh meat section, and I highly recommend the Chicharrones (sp)

reviews.author: Miles Huff
reviews.text:
Easily the dirtiest place I have been in my life.  I'm shocked it passes health codes.  Layers of dirt on the floor, milk splashed all against the glass refrigerator doors, blood on the ground by the meat area, and more.  I was shocked and bewildered;  and also disappointed, because this is the closest grocery store to my house, and it would have been really cool if it were a viable place to shop for groceries.
Staff was nice-enough.  It helps if you speak fluent Spanish (which I do).

reviews.author: Kiki Heslin-Kim
reviews.text: We love the food there. Everything seems authentic and fresh. My favorite is the fajita pollo. Try it out!

reviews.author: Alex Sparra
reviews.text: Wonderful tacos. Carne, Pollo, Barbacoa. Excellent authentic selection in la tienda.

address: 3565 Martin Luther King Jr Dr SW, Suite 8, Atlanta, Georgia, 30331
google_address: 3565 M.L.K. Jr Dr SW, Atlanta, GA 30331, USA

reviews.author: cora johnson
reviews.text: If I could give no stars I will they gave me the most nasty rice look and taste like they burn some chicken or something strapped the grill put my rice ontop then mixed it up I gave it back the manager I guess let me get salad instead but that’s not all that happened in the salad it look like they put a hold onion and bell pepper in it I ordered 20 piece wings mild with lemon pepper sprinkle when I say they put the hold lemon pepper container on my food I tried whipping it off with paper towels that still didn’t help so I ask my son did he won’t them he said yes when he tasted one he threw it back in the box and said that’s to to to salty they need the health department to come in on them and I think I’m going to be the one to send them I spent $47 my boyfriend 10 piece he said it was ok they need some training at this location

reviews.author: Keon Sumbry
reviews.text:
This location is very slow and by far one the worse American Deli as far as food goes.

They have a Trash Can right outside their door that is overflowing because it is rarely emptied.

If you want the GOOD America Deli wings you’ve come to know and love this is NOT the location ….there is another location on MLK down the street I would suggest going to instead.

If you come in the weekend when the ‘Booster is in’, just know. The cooks will stop cook and cashier will be distracted buying from the Booster vs putting the orders first adding to your wait.

On a good note the cashier is dope and very nice. If it wasn’t for her, idk where this location would be but the cooks here are the real issue, perhaps they don’t have anyone consistent but between the wait times and not good wings save yourself time and go to the other American Deli in MLK.

I brought my daughter from Florida after telling her about American Deli and the lemon pepper wings…. So disappointing

reviews.author: Keyvon Truth
reviews.text: I order lemon pepper wings and it was trash. It had a sweet wet flavor to it. Definitely not going back. Plus wings were small too

reviews.author: Doll Baby Salon
reviews.text: Today is 6/26 & it’s 3:25pm. I visted after leaving the nail shop that is in the plaza. My boyfriend went inside for me. We got all the way home & started eating. THERE IS BLACK STRAIGHT HAIR IN MY FOOD! I CAN TELL ASIAN OR MEXICANS WORK THERE B/C OF THE HAIR LEFT IN MY FOOD. I’ve tried calling. No ANSWER. This is nasty & I want my money back! The number that is posted on Google does not work.

reviews.author: William Hawkins
reviews.text: If you close at 9:00 pm my when I come I at 8:30 there I can only order wings? I’ve been here numerous times and they do not hold their store hours. You loosing money and that’s bad business. I came in another occasion and they closed early and I’m watching people come up here and they turning away customers. Bad business and bad advertising. Don’t come here!!

google_address: 3867 Washington Rd, East Point, GA 30344, USA

reviews.author: Shalanda Cowans
reviews.text: Best bowls ever! The line doesn’t bother me because it is great, and I love to see black people doing well while they serve the community! I also have wonderful conversations with others that are just as addicted to the bowls as I am 😩😂. Bowls are always fresh! I have been at both locations and the truck in downtown Atlanta. The bowls have a feel good aura about them! You always feel great after eating one! Go and take a friend or two!

reviews.author: Miss Vee
reviews.text:
My husband and I decided to try this spot out yesterday 10/8/24 and we were so pleased with our experience !

The bowls are HUGE (which we thought made it fair with the $pricing$ /14.50 for a bowl) , plentiful with fruits, açaí and all the other fixings. I got the cookie butter swirl açaí bowl 😋and my husband got the dragon fruit açaí bowl 😋. Both were DELIGHTFUL, full and FRESH (most importantly).

The gentleman that helped us at the register was kind and patient with us since it was our first time ordering there. We waited maybe about 10 mins for the bowls to be prepared. Once we were presented with them, we were in awe lol and couldn’t wait to take a bite in the car. We All in all, 10/10- DEF RECOMMEND 🩷!   We’ll def be back!

THANK YOU BLENDZ FRIENDZ!

reviews.author: Tone Love
reviews.text:
So, I drove over an hour to gift someone their favorite acai bowl. The restaurant was small but peaceful—almost zen-like.

While I confirmed her preferences over the phone, the cashier, a young, friendly, and professional gentleman patiently assisted me, explaining the toppings and confirming the order. I was especially surprised how well the staff handled the sudden rush; a second gentleman quickly manned the other register.

Just as the crowd dissipated, a woman walks into the restaurant and immediately shifts the atmosphere. "Why are there two of you at the register?! I need you guys being productive,  clean the windows, pick up trash outside the parking lot..."

She continued complaining as she walked behind the counter to the back. We (the customers) could hear her screaming at her employees. I was embarrassed for them because a manager should never speak in such an unprofessional manner.

Before I left, I decided to express my dismay. I asked one of the cashiers to identify the woman, and shockingly, SHE WAS THE OWNER! 😲 In disbelief, I still kindly asked to speak with her. He left his post to fetch her.

Twenty seconds later, the cashier returned. He murmured,  "she said is it something important because she's busy?"

I was flabbergasted! I  opted not to push the issue. Instead, I have decided to share my experience here on Google. My reviews have been viewed over 35 million times, but I'll tell you, I've NEVER had such a disappointing experience at a smoothie spot. The acai bowl itself was actually great, but her attitude left a bitter taste in my mouth that I won't forget. I hope she learns to treat others with respect. What an experience!

reviews.author: Jae Callis
reviews.text: I’ve become a regular here. The acai bowls are my go favorite. I usually order the acai base (or mixed acai/dragonfruit base) with pineapples & strawberries (sometimes mangos if in season), NO granola, flax/chia seeds, agave and almond butter drizzle on top. The almond butter drizzle tho, is icing to the cake. Delicious and addictive. Well worth the $$ especially for the portion size and options for the standard bowl compared to other places that make acai bowls. They do have other add ons (sometimes I add ginger) as well for an additional cost. I Love supporting this business, it does get busy but I understand why completely. Healthy food options can be somewhat scarce on that side of town even tho it’s down the street from an international airport. So happy my friend introduced me to this place. I’m legit addicted. I hope they open to door dash pickup/delivery instead of uber eats since I stopped supporting this app for multiple reasons.

reviews.author: Chanel Dixon
reviews.text:
This place is so good…..hold on. Let me take another bite of this goodness before I finish this review……

Yes. I got the açaí bowl with strawberries, blueberries, and granola. I’m in the parking lot tearing it up. M! Granola is crunchy and so good. Strawberries are perfectly sweet. Blueberries bomb. Açaí ice cold. Will be back 40 outta 10

google_address: 1422 W Peachtree St NW, Atlanta, GA 30309, USA

reviews.author: abthornton21
reviews.text: Avoid at all cost! Our community switched to this team and it has been nothing but issues. They are as problematic as it can get, but they’ll pitch themselves as a boutique, quick responding team. They utilize 3rd party middle men and act as the “overall” management, however, they provide no accountability for their team. It’s a borderline fraudulent way to put space between themselves and the community they blindly rob. We are still dealing with the same issues as previous management. If anything, we have experienced more issues due to them pushing any ask back on the Board. They do not care about the members of the community, their homes, or the overall property. We had high hopes, but realized we have just paid significantly more (35% increase in monthly dues) for even more lack of proactive behavior, gross negligence and dismissal of concerns, and retaliatory behavior. This company is more of a predator and lacks any morals or business ethics. Our manager has never answered a phone, returned a voicemail, is habitually untimely with email responses, and cannot even manage to send out HOA meetings in a timely manner.

reviews.author: S G
reviews.text: This company is a scam. They will allow you to book an appointment to view an apartment, email you multiple times requesting a copy of your ID, take your information and then cancel the appointment and the apartment is still listed. None of their phone numbers are reachable. Don't submit your information!!!

google_address: 1162 Pryor St SW, Atlanta, GA 30315, USA

reviews.author: Ty Gool
reviews.text: The best açaí bowl I have had. This took top spot over the one I got in PR. They fill your bowl up with the toppings you choose. This is my new spot now. No more smoothie king. Hope to see more locations. The service was also good.

reviews.author: KaTeysha A
reviews.text:
Forget every açaí bowl you’ve ever had until you’ve been N Da Bowl (pun intended).

Literally one of the best I’ve ever tasted—and I’ve been to multiple spots. The ingredients are super fresh, and you can tell every bowl is made with genuine love and care. The flavors are perfectly balanced, the textures are spot on, and nothing feels rushed or mass-produced.

The atmosphere? Chill, inviting, and downright addictive—you just want to stay and soak it in. It’s the kind of place that makes you plan your next visit before you’ve even finished your first bite.

10/10. I will definitely be back.

reviews.author: Batin Rainey
reviews.text:
Me and my wife are a little picky when it come to Acai bowls, every place don't do it right! N Da Bowl is not one of them!! Our bowls where 🔥🔥🔥! Price wasn't bad at all and they loaded those bowls up, the fruit to base ratio was on point and flavors were there throughout!! Customers service was really good she answered all our questions, I really hope they keep that up. If they keep doing what they doing they'll be around for a long time.

Oh another thing that cookie butter is 🔥

reviews.author: Lee
reviews.text: I’ve never finished an açaí bowl (esp one this big) in one sitting until today. i love that you can taste the freshness in the bowl. store was very clean. i will be back!

reviews.author: Nikki Con (Nikki vs Nikki)
reviews.text: This place has some of the best acai bowls in the A. Great bowls, even better customer service. I really enjoy this place. I would definitely recommend this place if you are looking for a healthy option. And it's delicious!! Check them out!!

google_address: 1990 Perkerson Rd SW, Atlanta, GA 30310, USA

reviews.author: GERALD BRISTER
reviews.text: Prep is amazing!!!! A one stop shop!!!

google_address: 1955 Campbellton Rd SW, Atlanta, GA 30311, USA

reviews.author: Obinna Mbachu
reviews.text:
Love the customer service at this BLACK & QUEER owned business! The food was amazing too! Three friends of mine and I got food and we all loved it. I got myself the chicken birria tacos, honey lemon pepper wings and churros. Everyone must check them out! I will definitely be returning and cant wait to see where this black owned business goes!

Update on 7/26/2025: the bar side is 😍😍😍 and the food always on point. My go to still the chicken birria tacos plus some wings.

reviews.author: Jayla Bridges
reviews.text:
Me and my family dined in today 10/27/2023 it was really good.

Customer Service 5/5
Food 4/5
Price 5/5
Cleanliness 5/5
Was it a vibe ? Hell yes lol :) the
Music playlist was good
Friendly 5/5

We have the chicken tacos, wings, and fries everything was pretty much good. I think you all should come up with some kind of house sauce to put on the tacos to top it off but other than that we enjoyed our food. If you’re reading this review please stop and go support this business you won’t regret it. I take reviews very seriously because I’m a real life foodie

I pray that your business continues to grow and you gets lots of support 🤎

reviews.author: Adrian Barkley
reviews.text: Heard about this place and decided to check it out. The shrimp nachos were awesome!!! The picture doesn't do it justice! Please support our local businesses!!

reviews.author: Clascee
reviews.text: Today was my 1st time here. And order 3 chicken taco aside of black beans and aside of Mexican rice. Well the rice was just yellow rice the display was nice but it was bland. The black beans the same bland. With the taco I was expecting some kinda salsa which I did not get. I was unable to really taste the chicken because the shell was extremely salty and the shell was grease as if it was not drained on a paper towel. So I tried the chicken by itself and i think it was moist. Hard to tell because of the saltiness of the shell. I think it was a good gesture just to much.So I paid $20.14.. Not sure if I will be back. But I can say the lady who took my order was very nice and the guy who served me was very nice also. He made sure I had the correct order. Thank u

reviews.author: Piccola hill
reviews.text: I had to visit the restaurant after seeing 2 Amigos Tacos on TikTok. I must mention that the seafood egg roll and my three shrimp tacos were great, and don't forget about the granny honey lemon pepper wings. The customer service was good.

google_address: 66 Georgia Ave SE, Atlanta, GA 30312, USA

reviews.author: Navita B
reviews.text:
First time visiting after dropping someone off at the airport. I had time after, so I decided to stop by since this has been on my list of places to try for a while. I am not sure of the parking situation, I just parked on the side of the street and quickly ordered and left. Cute store with a cute store front.

When you first walk in, there is a decorative tile that says “Big Softie”. It’s a pretty small area where you are ordering, but I did notice there is a seating area next to it that I believe is available.

I ordered the a swirl of Vanilla and Chocolate Petite size in a cake cone. I did a pretty basic order, so maybe that’s why I don’t get the hype and the raring of the place.
I was pretty disappointed after trying the ice cream because there wasn’t anything special about the ice cream or the quality. There was nothing wrong with it, so definitely check it out if you’re nearby.
I wouldn’t recommend it to anyone or go out of way to visit.

reviews.author: Natashe Kelly
reviews.text: I’m an ice cream person. I love ice cream and know good ice cream. Their ice cream and topping are just not good. They need better sprinkles and the hard syrup has a funny taste to it. We really need a good soft serve ice cream in Atlanta, however Big Softie has a long way to go unless they change up the way their product taste. I hear the hype but I was underwhelmed. The presentation was good though. Their service can be better too, they served me as if I had been there already, every customer should be treated as if they are new to the store.

reviews.author: Michelle Walker
reviews.text: I ordered a petite vanilla ice cream with rosemary carmel drizzle. It was good, nothing special but a nice sweet treat when you’re in the area. Customer service was good.

reviews.author: Cécile Baudry
reviews.text: I’ve been multiple times to this place and never been disappointed. The staff is so kind, always smiling while being super busy. They have options for vegan and the flavours are delicious. Even with a classic chocolate vanilla soft serve you won’t be disappointed.

reviews.author: Robert Galerstein
reviews.text:
My girlfriend suggested we visit this place instead of my usual favorite (Jeni’s). I figured why not? I love her and am happy to try something new. Well turns out I don’t love her enough to understand why people like this place at all!

The ice cream? Fine. Regular soft serve. The toppings? It’s like they just put cereal in a blender. The waffle cone? Clearly had been sitting for quite a while. All this together? That’s $11.50 I’ll never get back. (Unless I dispute the charge and file a complaint with the Better Business Bureau.)

Hopefully my relationship can recover from this crushing disappointment. While I likely will continue to see my girlfriend, I will never see the inside of a Big Softie again.

google_address: 1995 Metropolitan Pkwy SW, Atlanta, GA 30315, USA

reviews.author: Ravoris Q Latimore
reviews.text: I absolutely love this place. The drinks are great. The tuna salad is delicious. Now, the only thing I'm little off about is customer service. They are fast-paced, and sometimes, that can take away from the opportunity to engage with the customers. I guess if they don't know you (meaning you go to their gym regularly), then you get the step child treatment. You still get what you came for, but they get a little more love and time. Moreover,  I love the menu items. 😋

reviews.author: Alan Natanagara
reviews.text: I go to the location on Decatur St. and Bell St, which is small and may have a different menu from the other locations, but everything I've gotten there is great. Fresh ingredients, excellent prep, great service, and tasty drinks, smoothies, and food.

reviews.author: Dee
reviews.text: I have been coming to Spreading the Health for a while now and I can't say enough positive things about them. They offer a fantastic selection of healthy drinks. Jasmine & Keleigha are incredibly friendly and approachable, readily available to answer any and all questions and provide assistance. They made me feel welcomed and valued as a customer. The drinks are high quality and consistently outstanding, exceeding my expectations every time. I highly recommend this business.

reviews.author: Read Center
reviews.text: Nah. Got a tropical smoothie yesterday. It was not smooth. Had clumpy fruit that was clogging straw when I drink it. I just wanted it to be smooth like a smoothie, not watery after 5 minutes and clumpy. Unclean dishes on counter next to uncovered appear to be tuna salad. While lady with uncovered long braids on her cell phone. I usually never dine out because of things like this. I don't like inconsistent service. 2 stars for greeting me.Cover and refrigerate cold salad or at least cover if just left on counter. Hide unclean dishes from customer's view. It wasn't no one there, could've been cleaning instead on cell phone. Please please please Wash Hands before making drinks and food. She didn't do that at all. I was so desperately looking for alternative healthy choice on my way work but always go with first mind. Next time I will just blend a smoothie at home before work. Hopefully this will help improve service, so no more clumpy fruit in smoothies just SMOOTH. Good criticism for improvement.

reviews.author: Olie
reviews.text: Hidden Gem! So glad I don’t have to drive to a gentrified area to get my smoothie or juices now 🙌🏽

google_address: 2414 Marietta Blvd NW, Atlanta, GA 30318, USA

reviews.author: McKenzie Potter
reviews.text: Stopped by this location today and was blown away by the customer service, the management, and the efficiency! Everyone was so friendly! Well done to the leadership and staff here. So impressed!

reviews.author: N K93
reviews.text: One of the best starbucks ive been to! i travel a lot for work and I always make sure this starbucks is on my trip. Thank you Jeremy  for being super nice to me last time i was in. I was having a rough day and your politeness was exactly what I needed. Hard to find that kind of thing these days!

reviews.author: Kwadwo Bediako
reviews.text:
Horrible experience on Father’s Day. Disappointed and disrespected.

Had the worst experience today with Brittany, the manager, on Father’s Day. I went to this location around 3–4 PM to get my usual. The café was closed but the drive-thru was open. I placed my order at the mic but forgot one drink, so I planned to ask to add it at the window.

When I got to the window, Brittany greeted me with a quick, generic “hello” no acknowledgment of Father’s Day, which was fine. I politely asked if I could add one more drink, and she immediately and rudely said, “No.” When I asked why, she claimed there were cars behind me and she couldn’t do it  but there was only one car. I still circled back around, and by the time I returned, there were no cars at all.

When I got back to the window and asked to speak to the manager, she said, “I am the manager,” with a condescending tone. I calmly explained that her customer service was unacceptable and that I’d be reaching out to corporate. She sarcastically responded, “Go ahead, I can give you the number.”

This was one of the worst customer service experiences I’ve had and on a day meant to be appreciated as a father. Brittany’s attitude, lack of professionalism, and complete disregard for basic courtesy are a disgrace to the Starbucks brand. This location needs serious attention.

A brand-new location with a 3.6-star Google rating should raise concerns at the corporate level, as it clearly reflects that leadership at this store is not upholding the standards of the Starbucks brand.

Thank You

reviews.author: Dee Jones
reviews.text: Literally the number 1 starbucks. I travel to this location rather then the one by my home just for the outstanding customer service, the constant integrity these Bristas show, the smiles on their faces, and most of all the consistency and always being able to get my order correct and on time. They never fail to make my day better. Thank you.

reviews.author: Chandni Suthar
reviews.text: I've been looking forward to this Starbucks location opening. I've been here twice, and both times the staff was super friendly and the drinks were delicious.

google_address: 1990 Perkerson Rd SW Unit 63, Atlanta, GA 30310, USA

reviews.author: Anita Carter
reviews.text: OMGOODNESS, the food from Stuffed-Tastic is always delicious, fresh, and priced fairly. Kristin and Justyn are amazing to do business with, and have amazing menu offerings weekly. The GOBS are legendary, and a must try!  I have loved every meal that I have gotten from them. Each meal is packaged for easy heat up and easy clean up. I highly, highly recommend Stuffed-Tastic!

reviews.author: Phyllis H Porter
reviews.text: We are so happy we decided to let Kristin cater our event at @thereelmarkethouse All I had to do was share with her my vision and she brought it to life! On time within budget. The meal was great and the set up and display of the food were picture perfect. I highly recommend Stuffed Tastic catering.

reviews.author: Anna Mazur
reviews.text: Ordered the lasagna bar for over the weekend. So delicious and super easy to assemble. 10 out of 10 for sure!!

reviews.author: Tara Ansley
reviews.text: We've used their services on various productions and always happy. Thank You

google_address: 900 Murphy Ave SW, Atlanta, GA 30310, USA

reviews.author: Kelly Fletcher
reviews.text: Incredible, locally owned, small business, coffee shop inside CreateATL! Coffee is yummy, staff are so friendly, and there are lots of yummy treats from Collete! Cute inside and outside area for enjoying your bev and pastry! There is also a little shop inside if you need a pick up a quick gift!

reviews.author: Rob Birdsong
reviews.text:
Delicious coffee program via Radio Roasters.
Colette pastries
Relaxed vibes in an interesting setting.

5 Stars

reviews.author: Daniel McNabb
reviews.text:
Absolutely love this place. Located inside CreateATL this coffee shop is the best local spot in the WestEnd.

The space alone is fun to visit, but this coffee shop makes it a must stop.

Look forward to visiting again!

reviews.author: Michael Barthelette
reviews.text: They serve fresh goodies from Colette and a full range of coffee selections.

reviews.author: J
reviews.text: cute shop, great coffee and specialty drinks, high quality pastries ✨

address: 3000 Stone Hogan Connector Rd SW, Atlanta, Georgia, 30331
google_address: 3000 Stone Hogan Conn SW, Atlanta, GA 30331, USA

reviews.author: Hilliary Gibbs
reviews.text: Don’t move here. I know at times it’s a bit hard and we have very few choices. Don’t move here. I moved here in February 2024. I still have no ac thermostat is broken my refrigerator, the “new one” that they brought in is still leaking inside running out onto the floor food not keeping cold or freezing. Leaks under kitchen sink and bathroom sink downstairs. Mold growing in bathroom regardless of the bleach used. Had to call code to even  get a smoke detector. They go in and mark the work orders complete when they haven’t attempted to come out. I have 3  small grandchildren here. And I never get emails or phone calls about any of these problems only about the rent.And they go to empty units and remove appliances and use them in your unit nothing is ever new.

reviews.author: Trenisha Pharr
reviews.text: I Have had problems with this unit since I’ve moved in The beginning of last year. The biggest problem is that I have had water leaks in my living room every single time it rains. It has been fixed on three different times already and it still seems to be a problem now it’s worms coming inside my Unit I’ve contacted the leasing office multiple times About this situation, but the associates seem to not care and hangs up in your face. Now my wall is changing different colors because of the situation and it’s beginning to be a health hazard.  This is not a safe environment to live in An I will be taking action.

reviews.author: Valery Noelsaint
reviews.text:
Greenbriar Commons had the laziest leasing office workers EVER! Picture this: you walk into the leasing office looking for the perfect apartment, and you’re greeted by folks who seem more interested in their morning coffee than helping you out. They might be chilling at their desks, more focused on scrolling through their phones or chatting with colleagues than actually assisting a potential tenant like you.
Paperwork? Not their forte. You might notice a pile of applications collecting dust on their desks. And don’t get me started on returning calls or emails—that could take ages! Sometimes, you might catch them offering vague answers to your questions, leaving you even more confused than before. MAINTENANCE WORKERS NEVER DO THEIR JOB. I've had mold growing in my home, no A/C and bugs everywhere. I pay for pest control automatically every month and no one comes to my home to get rid of these bugs. How do I pay for a service and never receive it? They don't care about wellbeing, only money. Don't be fooled by the price and please for the love of God go somewhere else. IT'S NOT WORTH IT!!!

reviews.author: Robert Gaskins
reviews.text: The apartments located at Greenbriar Commons are deplorable! There’s always someone complaining about flooding whether it’s coming for the ceiling or up from the toilet. Communication between the leasing office is terrible. You’re definitely not going to feel welcomed. I never do. I’ve been going back and forth with these apartments about them double charging for rental insurance. It hasn’t stopped. Mood has been growing throughout the bathroom excessively.

reviews.author: Selena S
reviews.text:
These people are slumlords. My air has been broken for over a month and all I can get is an I'm sorry. The temperature in my apartment is 105 I've purchased 4 fans and 2 portable A/C's. I even had to leave one night and get a hotel because it was so hot and humid I had an asthma attack... And this is just my latest issue with them. These would be some nice apartments only if someone cared about the upkeep inside and out.

In response to Greenbriar Commons comment. How are you all currently solving the issue and I currently still do not have air conditioning
