reviews.author: Tamiko McGee-Conley
reviews.text:
Uber eats: food was delivered with care.
Burgers are AMAZING!! Called in for specific order(Uber doesn’t cover) and the person that answered made sure it was done. GREAT FOOD!
You will not be disappointed! I’ve ordered twice this week. GREAT VEGAN BURGERS!

reviews.author: Deanna Granger
reviews.text: My family and I were hungry; we literally googled vegan burgers and GAB's Food Truck was 5 minutes away. We were a little nervous because we had never heard of it, but I am so glad we took a chance. The customer service was great and the food was delicious! Will definitely return again when we come back to ATL.

reviews.author: Rolling With Jones
reviews.text:
Good as Burger is the BEST VEGAN RESTAURANT IN ATLANTA!!!

They have been at Delta and all of the major events in Atlanta. My favorites are the OG burgers and the Philly…if you haven’t had it you are slipping…

I wish everybody can try it, cause you missing out

reviews.author: Tristen Luff
reviews.text:
10/10

I stopped by the shipping container under the bridge on the belt line. I am not a vegan… quite the opposite working for a meat and seafood wholesaler. Anyway I would always pass by while running and it smelled so good. Tonight I decided to give it a try.

Firstly the young man working was an absolute pleasure the customer service was 11/10. Fast turn around 7-10 minutes. To the owner make sure to hold on to this guy and take good care of him.

The food was really really good. The burger was delicious, flavor was all there slightly different from a traditional meat based burger but great in its own way. Melty cheese, fresh onions, pickles, tasty house sauce and tomato sliced to the perfect thickness. The fries were hot and crispy with a nice soft middle. Almost seem to be battered but are not, seasoned really well not too salty great with just ketchup.

Overall an awesome experience. I will definitely be back and am amazed I don’t usually see this place busier. To the owners and staff, thank you!

reviews.author: Charlee Ann
reviews.text: Great, friendly service and even better food! We tried the sloppy joe sliders, sloppy joe fries, and smash burger. They were all incredible and served piping hot!

google_address: 2036 Sylvan Rd SW, Atlanta, GA 30310, USA

reviews.author: Paul Richardson (TheHomeWizard)
reviews.text:
Man this is THE SPOT!

Close to the airport, stumbled across this awesome restaurant on the way to the Perkerson park to kill a couple hours  before departure.
I'll have to hit this place next time I come back to town. Excellent  menu, fabulous,  amazing, don't  you miss it.
Great tunes, great ambiance. You need to bring your sig. Other here for date night, day, ... whenever  you can!

reviews.author: Kourtneii Alston
reviews.text: The food was as amazing as it sounds. I was craving a vegan lasagna and I knew they wouldn't disappoint! The lobsta fondue was also a perfect substitute for the seafood dip at Papadeaux! I was going to get a pic of thw kale salad but it was too good to wait. The music was a vibe so I'll be back for brunch 😋

reviews.author: B. Young
reviews.text: My daughter and I visited Life Bistro today for a late lunch and they serve some of the most FLAVORFUL food items I have ever had. The selections were amazing and you MUST try their Banana Pudding- DELICIOUS. We were attended to by a gorgeous lady who was courteous knowledgeable and professional. Our food was served timely and she was a great sales person offering beverages that we had never had before. The music and the atmosphere was great. My only concern with this location is that during checkout I personally was confused regarding gratuity versus tip so I left not fully knowing if I left her a proper tip as voth options are available at check out. I want to make sure that great people are taken care of. PLEASE make Life Bistro a stop on your next trip to Atlanta.

reviews.author: Brikk Realty Co
reviews.text:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Life Bistro on Sylvan Road is honestly the best kept secret in all of Atlanta! The food is beyond delicious and the portion sizes are excellent. I discovered it just yesterday and I’m already hooked.
I had the Rasta Pasta with steak on my first visit—completely dairy-free and meat-free, yet bursting with flavor. Today, I tried the fried mushrooms, and they were just as amazing.
The best part is you don’t need to be vegan to love this place—the food stands on its own. If you’re looking for a spot with incredible taste, generous portions, and 100% plant-based goodness, Life Bistro is it! My half eaten portion of fried mushrooms

reviews.author: Steffie (Steff)
reviews.text: Visiting the nearby military base and found this spot and it was open as advertised. Plenty of parking. Sweet little vibe as you enter. Nice noisy dim lighting. Kiara assisted at the register and is truly an asset to this establishment. I ordered so many goodies and can’t wait to dig in. They have a wide variety of vegan and alkaline for drinks and desserts. I wish I lived closer. Thank you for feeding me today. 💜

company_name: Be coffee tea wine bar LLC
google_address: 451 Lee St SW suite a, Atlanta, GA 30310, USA

reviews.author: Zoe
reviews.text: Delicious coffee and tea, mouthwatering croissant, beautiful decor and equally wonderful service/people:) I’m so happy we decided to stop by on our way out of ATL. They are nestled right next door to Morehouse campus, and a few turns away from the interstate. My fiancé ran inside to grab our order, and he said the folks inside were super kind. The croissant was warm and buttery, the coffee (iced mocha) was not too sweet and had a silky flavor, and he enjoyed his peach/apricot/earl grey immensely!!

reviews.author: Clarissa Villarreal
reviews.text: The only thing good about this coffee shop is the aesthetic, the customer service was trash , they took too long and the cheese danish had MOLD in it , the frappe was terrible I would NEVER go back

reviews.author: Andrea Harris
reviews.text:
Let me tell you!!! This place is a MUST go! My sister and I decided to have “sister time” with some coffee and great conversation. Upon entry we were graciously welcomed by the employee AND the patrons. We both immediately got excited. We told the young lady it was our first time and she gave great recommendations. I got their signature lavender coffee and I can’t remember what my sister got but baaaaaaaby…*chef’s kiss*.

We also got lavender lemonade to go alongside some salmon bisque and tomato bisque. While we were preparing to pay and leave, the owner came in. The way she gracefully walked in like she was a patron and spoke….that’s boss. No ego, no “air”…just her.

It was the best experience. Every trip back home, they will see me.

reviews.author: Bria Witherspoon
reviews.text: Be Coffee, Tea, and Wine is definitely the place to be! The ambience is amazing, the location is ideal, and the owner is very sweet and personable. When I came in yesterday with my mom, Ms. Sherry gave both my mom and I samples of her delicious soup in which I bought my own cup of the sun dried tomato bisque afterwards. I then looked in her pastry display where I couldn’t even decide what I wanted. Everything looked SO good. I ended up buying a danish and chocolate chip, but I would’ve gotten everything in the display if I could’ve. She will warm the pastry up for you before she bags it up. I wanted something to drink, eat, something sweet, the soup, the sandwiches, the salad, literally everything in the entire store. My eyes were definitely bigger than my stomach for sure. Since I go to school nearby, this is definitely the IT spot for me to walk to for something, friendly, fresh, and healthy.

reviews.author: Stacey Watson
reviews.text: Run, DON’T WALK, over to Be to get the Seafood Salad. It is delicious!!! You will not be disappointed. Also, the owner Sherry is a gem and the service is wonderful. It is so great to have a new place like this in the West End. I look forward to her being a staple in our community. Highly recommend.

google_address: 587 North Ave NW, Atlanta, GA 30318, USA

reviews.author: Angel Michelle
reviews.text: I remember when this was an event venue but it has been transformed into a beautiful breathtaking lounge.  Stopped in for a Sunday Funday and truly enjoyed myself.  I couldn't eat bc unfortunately everything is fried in the same grease and I can't chance it with food allergies but the people I was with enjoyed their food.  The server was nice and professional.  Great open space with nice lighting and good music.  Parking was free which was a plus.  Definitely wishing the establishment well because the renovations are amazing.

reviews.author: Melissa Palmer
reviews.text: I came to Avenue specifically to review it! It did not disappoint! The pictures I’m adding don’t do it justice because the lighting is just something you have to see in real time. Let’s start with the Dj he was great! You can vibe but also still hear yourself think. The food was so good I had the seafood wontons 10/10 I was very pleased. It was crispy but not to hard it was perfect. I also had the steak and without even telling them the cook I wanted it came out perfect!! PERFECT! Now the service was so good I’ve already decided that I’ll be back next Sunday. Izgen is the perfect host she’s so sweet and kind and attentive without being overbearing. You guys I don’t just give a 10/10 for nothing this place has the makings of something great. Meet me there Sunday. Also the parking FREE! The Entry FREE!! Come on now! This spot is it.

reviews.author: LA
reviews.text: I had an amazing experience at this restaurant! The food was absolutely delicious—fresh, flavorful, and perfectly cooked. Every dish was beautifully presented and had such authentic taste. The staff were incredibly welcoming, attentive, and made me feel right at home. The atmosphere was cozy and inviting, making it a perfect spot for both casual meals and special occasions. Definitely one of the best Asian cuisine spots I’ve been to—highly recommend I’ll be coming back for sure! The cocktails were so yummy as well! Hookah is available after 10PM as well which also sets the vibe! Aesthetics are amazing!

reviews.author: Shakinah Floyd
reviews.text: My husband and I really enjoyed everything. The decor, the Atmosphere , the service, the Dj and the food was everything. The Avenue Kitchen is a must!!! We will be back😊 The parking was very limited but everything else made up for it.

reviews.author: Shae Poole, Realtor
reviews.text:
We tried this new place last night that’s newly-opened in Atlanta. It was decent. The food & drinks were really good, but a bit pricey. The fire-eating dancer was cool (video attached).

They were supposed to have a band but didn’t; they had DJs & the music choices were kind of all over the place, but got a little better towards the end of our time there.

Some interesting things about it: You can make reservations on OpenTable, but you get a two-hour seating limit. And if you want to stay for the “party”, then you have to pay $20 to remain. They also started taking away the barstools at a certain part of ￼the night so that people didn’t have anywhere to stand if they didn’t already have a section reserved. There was free valet parking. It was interesting I’m not sure it’s somewhere I will return.

google_address: 3888 Jonesboro Rd SE, Atlanta, GA 30354, USA

reviews.author: Nikki Hall
reviews.text: Little back story: I attend this Popeyes all the time due to it being closer to my home. However, a few times I’ve came here I’m always getting over charged for things I’ve NEVER asked for. I asked for two 6 dollar big boxes with two fries and the other a Cajun rice ADDDD GRAVY which is 30cents by the way. I get to the window and the young lady says 18 bucks I’m confused but I also paid with no problem and asked for my receipt! I look at the receipt and to my surprise they charged me a WHOLE SIDE of gravy for 3.29! Why! I’m not sure! However I wanted my money back. I gave her the rice and gravy back due to her not only over charging me but never gave me my SIDE OF GRAVY instead she added the gravy on the rice. As I processed to asked for my money back. The OWNER SHORT HAIR LADY I CANT REMEMBER HER NAME RIGHT NOW but once I go to the headquarters we will move forward with names. Meanwhile, she comes to the window, I inform the cashier I work for Popeyes! I Never stated my position or who I am. She comes over to the window and makes a nasty statement “COME ALL THE WAY OVER HERE TO COST PROBLEMS” Ma’am! I’m always friendly when visiting and this is the disrespect I receive. This is to bring awareness! Very disappointing how you treat your customers! MOVING FORWARD!😉

reviews.author: S Garrett
reviews.text: Placed an online pickup from here. The young woman in the drive thru window was rude. My food was incorrect, not fresh and cold. My son complained that it made him feel sick. Didn’t even bother with going back because I was not in the mood to deal with her attitude further. The other locations are much better . I should’ve read the reviews before ordering from here. This needs new staff and people who care about food quality. It’s shameful and hurtful to the community! Food is already expensive no one wants to waste money on old nasty food.

reviews.author: Denorris Banks
reviews.text: I work across the street and have been going since they opened. The employees are always rude and impatient. They dont listen or care that they get your order wrong. My best experience was with young lady with all the tattoos.

reviews.author: Andrey J
reviews.text: Pretty Good, Chicken Was Fresh And Everything Was Hot,And They Had A Special Apparently I Was The First To Order,Cause They Didn't Even Know It Was son The Sign,But It Was Great, Cashier Was Nice And Sweet !

reviews.author: B Lover
reviews.text: I come  to location every now and then chicken good enough sides a different story. Well 7-30-25 I came to this location to get some spicy chicken  ,waited 50 minutes for mild because the manager was saying someone quit who came to work on the spot ,ok spicy chicken still not ready so got mild it was a white woman who ordered after me she also ordered Spicy but got mild but she was also offered spicy chicken to take home me nothing so for me it was a slap in the face so people it’s not about black and white but it’s about character how you treat people all people so I won’t spend my money again at this location no no no.  Good luck getting your food on time it was terrible and the black  woman Manager calling all the women moma yeah I had enough.

google_address: 1082 Huff Rd NW, Atlanta, GA 30318, USA

reviews.author: A GREATFULL STORE
reviews.text: A good friend of mine insisted we try souper jennie. I’m so happy we got a chance to experience this wonderful place! Now this is my favorite place! I love fresh food! The soup and sandwich combo is a great way to have lunch! It comes with a drink, cookie, and fresh fruit. We sat out side on the patio with its rustic tables & chairs! You can also take a stroll around their gardens and meet farmer Jeff. He is very friendly! Everyone here is very polite and friendly! I’ll be going to the garden 101 class this spring. 5 ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️’s from a Greatfull store ✨💫

reviews.author: Vicki
reviews.text: great place to stumble upon with delicious soup/sandwiches and they donate with every bowl of chili to families that are in need. Love a place that does community work while serving up good food. 2 of us could even split 1 lunch combo and both be satisfied

reviews.author: Devon Sams
reviews.text: Can't rate them high enough. The atmosphere is cozy and a great escape from the city. Feels like you're at home with views of their garden in the back. The staff is unmatched! The food is fantastic but the team that works here made this a staple for me. I'm always greeted and do a little progress report on our lives at the moment and glad I've taken the time to develop a relationship with this location. Great meat eater options and vegetarian options alike.

reviews.author: Nathan Vassey
reviews.text: In addition to thoroughly enjoying eating in Souper Jenny's restaurants, I also was so impressed by their catering experience! Their delicious food was reasonably priced as always. And Marcie did a wonderful job. She was pleasant every time we spoke, so easy to work with, and accommodating in so many ways like making sure dishes with nuts were noted since one of our guests had a food allergy, bringing tablecloths, utensils etc, and having to go containers for us. And when her help wasn't able to come that day, she was still there on-time and ready ahead of time for our event. Thank you so much Marcie for helping us have such a great meal at our party!

reviews.author: Brianna Chambers
reviews.text:
Update | August 2025:
This location is often closed outside of the listed hours. With this in mind, I messaged the restaurant’s Instagram to find out if the location was open before I made the drive. The message was marked as “seen” soon after I sent my message, but I never received a response. That was disappointing, and I took my business elsewhere.

Original Review | October 2024:
Had the best lunch at Souper Jenny sitting outside on an October day with 79 degree weather. Not crowded, not loud - peaceful. Ordered the turkey chili soup and a Cajun chicken sandwich and they were both delicious! And I am a picky-ish eater. Love the Westside location.

google_name: Design Galleria Kitchen and Bath Studio
google_address: 351 Peachtree Hills Ave NE #234, Atlanta, GA 30305, USA

reviews.author: Jackie Rose
reviews.text: Matthew Quinn is ultimately the best kitchen and all around lifestyle designer I know.  He is calm and focused, precise and organized.  And he can actually execute his and your vision to the exact specifications you have agreed on.  In the chaos of building or renovating, you need his radar focus.  It will save you tons of $$$ in the long run.

reviews.author: Theresa Smith
reviews.text: Attempted to purchase a La Cornue range from this company. I waited on multiple phone calls that I never received in attempt to get information regarding the range. Had to chase sales person down for a week…was promised return phone calls which weren’t received, had to leave messages with front desk (mailbox was full for sales associate). Finally reached the owner, Matthew, who was very rude and honestly I was so taken aback by this, I ended up having to tell him that because of his unprofessionalism and his curt responses, I would be purchasing the range elsewhere. Sometimes people forget to be humble and helpful once they’ve become successful. I hope going forward, Matthew realizes it’s hard to train staff accordingly when he sets the bar low.

reviews.author: David Preuss
reviews.text: The best Kitchen and Bath (cabinetry) spot around. We have worked with them for 20 years.

reviews.author: Kemor brown
reviews.text: Appreciate it really.

reviews.author: Richaun Farmer
reviews.text: I’ve asked them for a month straight to transfer my prescription to another pharmacy I’ve called them over and over and over still they haven’t transferred my prescription I have really bad migraines I have been without medication for a whole month because they are greedy for money they just want the 50 dollar copay but it’s ok I will never use this pharmacy ever again

reviews.author: Marriette Agbaw
reviews.text: One of the best pharmacy’s I’ve ever been too. The owner is the most sweet and respectful person ever who will do anything to help costumers. 100% will be going again.

reviews.author: Chelsy Diony
reviews.text: i personally had a great experience at this pharmacy. i was treated with respect and they also had outstanding customer service. the owner of this pharmacy was so incredibly kind and i couldn’t have been treated better. 10/10 and would definitely recommend.

reviews.author: Blessed Efilo wa Ngoe
reviews.text: No better place to get the most of customer service satisfaction but here. The staff takes full responsibility over their consumers. Product delivery to YOUR home is 100% FREE! Think about that!! I highly recommend Trinity Pharmacy!!

reviews.author: Otte Barake
reviews.text: Best customer service I ever received. Very courteous, friendly and professional people work here. I recommend this pharmacy to everyone.

reviews.author: No Name
reviews.text: I really liked the food it was juicy and very saucy , they were very sweet and had music playing so it’s a nice vibe. I LOVED the hotdogs and burgers. We also got a crazy Philly and that thing was huge!!!. Overall 10/10!!!

reviews.author: Ashley Rodriguez
reviews.text: best burger ever !!! Super juicy love the sauces and bags I like that my fries were fresh and crispy !! Have gone back so many times after . Just found out it’s on maps I had to leave a review I can’t gate keep how good this place is!!😍😍😍

reviews.author: Darion Williams
reviews.text: Unfortunately, Burger or fries were not good at all. Tastes like low quality meat. Staff was friendly.

reviews.author: Angelica Colina
reviews.text: Super delicious food, it's very difficult to find authentic Venezuelan food but this is the best!! I always had to go as far as an hour from where I live but now I have something close to quality and very, very delicious 😍 cachapa, pepitos, hot dogs, hamburgers a dream for a Venezuelan and with a cold maltica hehehe🤣🤣

reviews.author: Danicia Veliz
reviews.text: Delicious and unique. Don't miss it, you won't regret it. Everything is super delicious.

google_address: 1800 Jonesboro Rd SE Suite D, Atlanta, GA 30315, USA

reviews.author: Starr Davis
reviews.text:
Cute and cozy atmosphere. Friendly staff, attentive service.
Delicious food. Pancake is on the cakey side, not fluffy, and tasty. Need extra syrup 😀
Fish and grits was delicious. Big portion, definitely shareable.
Deviled eggs came with candied bacon, interesting and yummy.
Coffee was good, came in a pleasant presentation.
Pricing is reasonable.
Large parking lot.
Located in a rough looking neighborhood. If wasn’t for the reviews. We will never come in if passing by.
Do recommend by @winedinenvacay

reviews.author: Jassy Jass
reviews.text: My family and I were out of town and came to eat here. The inside is clean and decorated very nicely. The music was great. The food was amazing ! and our server Kel was great. He was friendly and very conversational. Whenever we are back in this area we will definitely come back here.

reviews.author: Che Johnson
reviews.text: I love this black owned restaurant , quaint with a nice and  ambience and I love that they have a black owned coffee shop downstairs as well. The servers were very friendly. The food was delicious. I had the  fried catfish and grits. Loved every bit of it. Just a quick reminder to out of town guests  like  myself , when you order ice tea just know  it’s gonna be sweet tea lol I wasn’t ready. I do recommend and I will be back to visit when I’m back in town.

reviews.author: Yolanda Wright
reviews.text: We came here for a Father’s Day meal and had a great time. It was a pleasant, clean atmosphere and the food was delicious. I had the Breakfast Tacos and my husband had the French Toast Sandwich. We also got the Salmon on Toast.The salmon was perfectly prepared and well seasoned. We only waited about 15 minutes to be seated and the food came out quickly. In fact we had barely finished the appetizer when the main meal served. Looking forward to eating there again.

reviews.author: Freddie Ross
reviews.text:
This was my first time here. My girlfriend and I found it by accident, and I can say, I'm glad we found them. I always love to support a black owned business.

The venue is very nice and the atmosphere is very chill. The food is amazing. I ordered the oreo waffle, and to my surprise, it wasn't overly sweet.

If you're looking for a small low-key breakfast lounge vibe, then this is the spot for you.

address: 2760 Donald Lee Hollowell Pkwy NW, Atlanta, Georgia, 30318
google_address: 2760 Donald Lee Hollowell Pkwy NW, Atlanta, GA 30318, USA

reviews.author: The Real Rah Raah
reviews.text: I placed my order over the phone before arriving. The cashier was exceptionally friendly and helpful, especially considering my indecisiveness about my meal. The chicken was perfectly seasoned, flavorful, and featured the best hot honey flavor I’ve experienced in Atlanta. This is one of those small businesses that truly deserves more recognition. I am extremely satisfied; the food was cooked to order and fresh. I will be visiting at least once a week. Thank you for the excellent service and fulfilling experience.

reviews.author: S R
reviews.text: Happy, we enjoy your sauce, but y'all either stop phone orders or don't pass off refried wings because someone doesn't pick up their food. Wings were hard and dry.

reviews.author: Morgan Tochi
reviews.text: Don’t call and order they will make her food when you get there and pay. And the chicken wings, I really don’t know what kind of chicken it is lol. It’s really tiny probably it’s cause of the price.

reviews.author: M Ansari
reviews.text:
Great choice for lemon pepper wings !
Passing thru because of a traffic jam and stopped here for to-go wings.

reviews.author: Torsheika Holt
reviews.text: There's nowhere in Atlanta Georgia you can get a 10-piece wing combo for $11 This is the only place and they're not those big gummy jumbo wings and they're not those small one bite wings sauce is perfect

google_address: 668 Metropolitan Pkwy SW, Atlanta, GA 30310, USA

reviews.author: Alemayehu Kassahun
reviews.text:
I recently had the pleasure of visiting Rodney Scott’s Barbecue in Atlanta, and it was an unforgettable experience! AJ checked up on us and was fantastic. He gave us an in-depth behind-the-scenes tour of the kitchen, showcasing how everything is made from scratch and introducing us to the heritage hogs hanging in the freezer. I had the southern style pulled pork sandwich. 👌🏾

The food was delicious! The banana pudding and apple pie, made fresh daily, were mouthwatering. The mac and cheese had a unique twist with a unique shaped pasta, and the hush puppies were perfectly crispy. I also enjoyed a local IPA that paired wonderfully with everything.

The onion rings were a standout as well—crispy and perfectly balanced, with the onion staying inside the batter for each bite.

Overall, Rodney Scott’s Barbecue is a must-visit for anyone who loves great barbecue and exceptional hospitality. We’ll definitely be back!

reviews.author: Cassandra
reviews.text:
Ordered the southern pork plate (shredded pork - no sauce, coleslaw collard greens) and banana pudding.

The take out service was fine, had to wait as online/DoorDash orders were before mine.

I had already planned to fly this home so I wasn't going to eat the pork but did eat the spicy pickles on top, its a good spicy doesn't linger too long. The cole slaw is also flying but tasted it, its not what I'm used to when you say cole slaw, it had a spicy bite to it. Since I'm flying had to drain out the liquid.

The collard greens weren't my cup of tea, used to something with a southern flavor. Ate them but wouldn't order again if I had the chance.

Now, the banana pudding, that was all forms of wrong. The cookies were put on top, like a garnish instead of the base. Had no sliced bananas and the pudding was just lacking didn't even taste like banana pudding.

I may be from the north (NYC) but I was raised on North Carolina cooking. And none of this minus the pork (yet) tasted nothing like Southern cooking or even fake southern cooking.

This was a big $25 failure. Maybe their ribs are okay but since I'm leaving in 24 hours I'll never know. But if Rodney is willing to ship a sample to me, I would try it and give an honest opinion.

But as of right now, if I was staying another day I would be looking to try food somewhere else.

Sorry, Rodney Scott but truth is truth, and when it comes to food no one wants a lie.

reviews.author: Samuel Payne
reviews.text:
The barbecue is pretty good, but the standout here is the sides. The cornbread is delicious, and they have probably the best hush puppies I've ever had. All very filling, two people could probably share a plate.
I didn't see any other reviews mention it, but it's counter service and seat yourself, so would work well for a large party

reviews.author: My experiece
reviews.text: One cashier was very friendly and nice, The individuals at the pick -up counter were nice too. The mac and cheese , collard green's were good. The downside: I didn't like the fact that banana pudding is instant pudding with a few bananas but has the price of homemade! I didn't like the cornbread muffin. The ribs I had was basically just fat and the meat portion was dried out. I was looking for tenderness.

reviews.author: Naija The Streamer
reviews.text: Great place to eat...The very first time my boyfriend and I ate here it was at dinner time we both had the turkey club sandwich. It WAS AMAZING,TASTY AND FRESH. The service was awesome. As a result we decided to come back... this time for lunch... the service was ok this time however the food was not as great for lunch as it was for dinner...All I ask is that you all make the experiences match. We came back expecting the same greatness we had the first time and sadly you all feel a little short during the lunch rush unfortunately...BUT we will be back because the food is GREAT!

google_address: 1990 Perkerson Rd SW, Atlanta, GA 30310, USA

reviews.author: GERALD BRISTER
reviews.text: Prep is amazing!!!! A one stop shop!!!

google_address: 352 University Ave SW, Atlanta, GA 30310, USA

reviews.author: Hector Belloso
reviews.text: Definitely need to spot by here if you want so delicious vegan ice-cream. It was so good, I got what was called "flight" its all there currently favorites in one. Must warn through, its a lot of ice-cream, so recommend to spare it if you get this option.

reviews.author: Marcus Johnson
reviews.text: The creamy spot is SOOO AMAZING! I’ve been searching for a non dairy ice cream shop for my girlfriend and we finally found a great place! We’ve become regulars and have visited The Creamy Spot 4 times already! Although we’ve tried every single flavor, our favorite go to is the Pank. Every time we go to the Creamy Spot, this is a MUST HAVE! The most recent time we went, we tried Sundaes Best which is our new favorite. The Creamy Spot ice cream is so good, but one of the main reasons we continue to go back is because of Wendy and Michelle. Their remarkable customer service is second to none. They are very personable, engaging, and professional. The Creamy Spot = Atlanta’s best ice cream spot by a landslide.

reviews.author: Mis'ha Proctor
reviews.text: I loved it!!! Service was top tier, it’s black owned and vegan friendly. The owner was a there and she me a tour and allowed me to try all the ice creams with no problem. They do use cashew milk and no peanuts. I will absolutely be back

reviews.author: Elizabeth M.
reviews.text: Thanks for coming to Vegan Fest in Bham!!! Best vegan ice cream I've ever had!!

reviews.author: Migo
reviews.text: I am not vegan but definitely allergic to dairy. What a delicious dairy-free substitute! The vanilla mini-icecream sandwiches are everything. Welcome to a pic of my last 2 bites😋✨

google_name: Greedyman's Bar B Que & Grill Food Truck & Catering
google_address: 1423 Stockbridge Rd, Jonesboro, GA 30236, USA

reviews.author: V P
reviews.text: I was out there for memorial weekend and I found this spot on Google. Definitely felt the southern hospitality from the moment I walked in! The food was AMAZING AND GOOD! The seasoning was spot on! I got the rib tips with fry fish, then I went back the next day and got a turkey burger with a Philly chicken. Their Mac and cheese was also fire! Definitely recommend this place if your by the area. The owner and workers were very patient with me to explain their menu. So shout out to them for going above and beyond!

reviews.author: Koslyn FireAngel
reviews.text:
Awesome customer service. The food takes a while to cook, but it is definitely worth the wait or call ahead and pick it up. The place is more of take out but they have one table with 4 chairs if you have to eat something while you're there.

The smoked wings with hot and spicy was really good, the potato salad was delicious.. had a different taste but a good different taste, the tips was good and fall off the bone type, the greens was good as well.
Overall, I will definitely be back..
I also got the homie the burnt ends and he said it was good...

reviews.author: Braxton Zeidler
reviews.text: I had the pleasure of trying Greedyman’s out of their truck at a catered lunch event, and although the menu was limited, the selection of apple smoked rib tips, wings, fried fish and a veggie burger was a nice variety. The apple smoke was a bit sweet for my taste but very well cooked. The fried fish was a little small but the breading perfect. The mac and cheese is excellent.

reviews.author: Jamie Marshall
reviews.text: We had Greedyman’s come out for a neighborhood event. They were fantastic to work with from beginning to end. Rae was kind and helpful. The food was incredible and they handled the crowd amazingly. I can’t wait to have them back out next year.

reviews.author: Majestic Butterfly
reviews.text:
I rushed to door at 7:07pm & got in. The staff was kind, professional, and accommodating. I ordered ribs with potato salad.
1 I forgot to ask for sauce on side so my ribs were drenched in sauce so sweet I as a gastric patient got dumping
2. The ribs had good crust on outside & tender meat on inside
3 potatoes salad was flavorful but I don’t do salt so it was a tad much for me. For normal people it may be ok.
4 the bread was seasoned with mild heat& possibly cinnamon. It was good
5 y’all know Spirit is my final taster. She accepted the rib and took it to bed. That’s 4 stars in her book
6. Overall Kansas style BBq is different in texture and taste. The sauce is better left on side to as needed.

google_address: 552 Decatur St. SE Ste 2, Atlanta, GA 30312, USA

reviews.author: Roger L. Conner
reviews.text: Run and find these as fast as you can. It’s not icy sugar water.  It’s real, tasty ice cream on a stick. Big enough to satisfy, small enough so you don’t overindulge. I make my own ice cream, & this is very good for commercial ice cream.

reviews.author: Rebecca Knowles
reviews.text: I wasn't sure where to go to get King of Pops since the walk up window we used to go to is now closed, and I was worried that this place wouldn't have what we were looking for, but it ended up working perfectly. In addition to the pops, they had boozy concoctions as well. There was a shady spot for our group to sit and visit as we enjoyed our popsicles. I only wish they had the bargain mystery pops like the other place had. That was always fun, and welcome for the pocketbook since we can eat multiple popsicles in one visit!

reviews.author: Hunter Scott
reviews.text: Anyone out there who says that being cool and being professional are mutually exclusive obviously haven't ever come in contact with King of Pops. The KoP HQ is fill of people who are driven and self motivated to ensure the highest quality of product from their pops to their yoga sessions, all under the auspices of being a laid back cool kids clubhouse. The pops speak for themselves, and you know they're the real deal when you find little bits of blueberry in your Blueberry Lemonade pop. Drawing from real, natural ingredients really pays off, and this company always delivers on it's main product: Unexpected Moments of Happiness. I'll never stop being a fan.

reviews.author: L Rogers Beaujuin
reviews.text: I had an amazing experience at King of Pops! Upon arrival, we were warmly greeted by a friendly young lady who provided outstanding service. She was not only engaging but also made excellent recommendations based on our preferences. The atmosphere was fantastic with a parking lot filled with shaded seating areas and small spaces equipped with yard games, making it a perfect spot to relax and enjoy our delicious popsicles. Highly recommend for both the great service and the fun ambiance! The blueberry lemonade poptail  is simply outstanding, blending the refreshing tang of lemonade with the burst of blueberry sweetness in every sip.  The popsicles in your cup absorb the drink and makes eating it an extra special adult treat.

reviews.author: Henry Goldberg
reviews.text: Got some good popsicles here. Nice atmosphere.

google_address: 1728 Campbellton Rd SW, Atlanta, GA 30311, USA

reviews.author: Bernette Fondong
reviews.text:
Drove about 25 minutes to come here. It says open on the door and on the site, and all of the lights are on but no one was there. I waited about 20 more minutes and tried calling with no answer. The door was LOCKED. He finally came out after about 5 more minutes and when i tried to tell him how long i’ve been waiting, he tried to argue with me and say i wasn’t waiting that long. Then he said he was in the bathroom. He kept asking me “so what do you want me to do” with an attitude and pretty much opened the door and gestured for me to leave. I do not recommend coming here at all. They have terrible customer service and the guy in the photo was not understanding or kind at all.

edit: in the business response he says “I don't believe this was your first time visiting us” which is disappointing. I just moved to ATL and this was a snow cone place that had all 5-star reviews— I wanted to try so badly... So, i have no reason to lie about coming here for the first time. I am truly saddened by this and I likely won’t be back.

reviews.author: TAMARA Kendrick
reviews.text: Soft ice smooth and delightful flavors. The best customer service ever provided by Jam the Sno-man. Best sno balls ever straight New Orleans Style. Prices are very reasonable. Exceptional Service will be back all summer ☀️ Try the nachos a must-have !!!

reviews.author: Alexandria Maddox
reviews.text: Excellent service! I could immediately tell he is a community man with a community loving establishment. As I sat in my car, I noticed that every person who passed by stopped to say hello and wave at him. He is THAT GUY! He was humble. He was kind and delivered quality service. He even provided the child in front of us a free snocone as a birthday gift. He layered our sNOcones PERFECTLY. As you can see in the picture, we ate most of it before we even left the establishment. I will be back tomorrow! I felt like i was visiting family.

reviews.author: Kelis Bain
reviews.text: My bf and I have made this our weekly trip😂 Best snowballs in ATL! Also he’s very affordable. Come here he’ll get you right every time.

reviews.author: Love waller JAYCEON
reviews.text: The Real New Orleans snow ball the best ever. Great service you have to get the king cake flavor with the condensed milk

google_address: 99 Krog St NE, Atlanta, GA 30307, USA

reviews.author: Ethereal Minimalist
reviews.text: Ordered through the Foodsby app my job offers us and just got finished with my Spiced Vegan Wrap. The positives are the flavor is amazing, no doubt about that, and the food is fresh. The negatives are presentation and filling ratio. My wrap was mostly full of the spiced carrot dip mix. As far as tofu, shredded carrots, and almond crumbles…I barely got any, they were almost nonexistent. Also the butter lettuce was missing. I’m not even sure if I got any chermoula honey mustard, if I did it wasn’t much. Also presentation is lacking and not appealing. When I opened the box, I got a whole, loosely rolled wrap. I was also expecting it to be cut in half, no biggie, but it’d be more appealing to the eye if it were cut in half where the ingredients are exposed. For the price, one would think the presentation and filling ratio would be on point. It’s pricey for what it is. But for the fact the wrap still tasted great and was filling, I’ll make a trip with my fiance one weekend to try it out again. I hope the owner or manager will take these reviews as constructive criticisms from their customers and improve for the ones willing to spend $17 on a wrap.

reviews.author: Lauren S
reviews.text: Very disappointed.  Ordered delivery and when I opened it up there were major issues. The schug chicken pita was only half full (if that full, for 16$ they cant expect to only partially fill the pita), the vegan wrap we got was solely spread and lettuce--not tofu or carrots to be seen like in the pics and description-- and the dip side we got with fresh vegetables was a grand total of 6 slices of cucumber. If cucumber was going to be the only vegetable you use, maybe just say that instead of vegetables with pics of carrots. This was not cheap. If there was a way to refund I would have. Taste was soso although obviously missing major elements which is why ill give them 2 stars

reviews.author: Kerri Weavil
reviews.text: Heddy was a gem of a gal that was such a joy to meet.  She let my friend (visiting from Portland) and I taste so many delicious samples & was so knowledgeable and helpful.  Sandwiches and dips were incredible, as well as their juice specials.  Thank you for your wonderful hospitality & yummy eats today!  Can’t wait to come back!!

reviews.author: Heather Mason
reviews.text: If you want something super unique and also insanely delicious, you should try this out! We tried the low country shrimp sandwich, and were blown away with how good it was. Highly, highly recommend

reviews.author: Sorya goloversic
reviews.text: So all the dips are actually delicious but they are super super stingy on the side portion you dip your stuff with. I got half pita and veggies and for $17 I only got 4 celery sticks and 2 cucumbers with. Couple slices of pita which is quite ridiculous

google_address: 1996 Sylvan Rd SW, Atlanta, GA 30310, USA

reviews.author: Greg Bolden
reviews.text: After walking half a mile on the Lee-White Beltline, we were surprised to find a plant based ice cream stand. The music and atmosphere compliments the pleasant vibes.  My lady and I purchased a scoop of pineapple and one watermelon which were mouthwatering. A wonderful touch to the summer evening ✨️ We will be back!

reviews.author: Bernette Fondong
reviews.text: I came here and they were so nice! The man who served me also told me about partnering with the youth in ATL! They give back to the community and I really loved hearing everything they do around the city. Service was great, good price, the italian ice flavors were delicious, and it’s for a good cause. I also got a stamp card! I would totally recommend coming here.

reviews.author: Nichelle Veasley
reviews.text: I couldn’t wait to dig in before I posted. Glaciers has got to be the best Italian ice I’ve ever tasted. The customer service was terrific, and the environment was welcoming. I also liked that they hire young black men from the community and offer more than just Italian ice. Glaciers take a personal interest in the community.

reviews.author: Tishonna Cherry
reviews.text: Matt was so nice he let me sample some flavors for my first visit! The inside of the restaurant is very beautiful and prices are very reasonable. Summerhill lemonade was so good! 10/10

reviews.author: A Beckett
reviews.text: My kids and I stop by often for the Italian ice, ice cream, and water. They have great customer service and we have a wonderful experience every time. They’re always patient and make us feel appreciated but we truly appreciate them and the message they convey to young people. Plus they have children’s books galore! 💯💯💯

google_address: 2845 Greenbriar Pkwy SW, Atlanta, GA 30331, USA

reviews.author: Iesha J
reviews.text:
The customer service is in hell. I strongly dislike going to this location because EVERYONE is always MAD or they have an ATTITUDE!
Pay for my extra sauces, no problem. I ask for napkins and am told “I put some in the bag”’ I said there not in there(BECAUSE THEY WERENT WHICH IS WHY IM EVEN ASKING FOR THE NAPKINS), “can I have some napkins please?” Like give me the napkins sis, you’re doing too much!!!

If you don’t want to be at work, please clock out and go home and don’t subject customers to the nasty attitude, KEEP IT !

As far as the food my wraps were ok, yall drowned the poor chicken in sauce! Are yall okay? Fr? I had to wipe some of the sauce out of the wrap, that’s how much sauce yall put on there…..

reviews.author: Shanqueeta Watson
reviews.text: I arrived and when I got to the intercom the girls on drive -thru thought it was hilarious to have me to repeat my order numerous times so I drove up to the window and all you see is foolishness ,everybody playing,all co workers laughing and remind you the drive thru had excessive wait time and I know the car was there a good 20 minutes after ordering.Please hire people who wants to work and this was my 3rd time attempting to order for here the first time it was an rude elderly lady on night shift it gets worse every time and yall already have 3 stars and it definitely should be a 1star restaurant. It’s hardworking individuals that actually want to work and these individuals in here playing as if people don’t have places to be and families to feed.These people gave me a burnt sandwich no type of customer service or respect for people who pay their money to eat please shut it down

reviews.author: Edward Eaves
reviews.text:
ORDER 606

I WAS IMPRESSED THAT I CAME THROUGH THE DRIVE UP WINDOW AT 2:16 PM ON 10/2/2025 AND ORDERED 3 PIECES OF CHICKEN. ONE SPICY AND TWO MILD.

I UNDERSTAND HOW DIFFICULT IT IS WORKING IN FAST FOOD. THIS IS WHY I AM GIVING "HOST" (KENIAH) 70107 A 5-STAR REVIEW AND IF I COULD FIVE HER 20 STARS I WOULD. I WOULD ALSO LIKE TO GIVE A 5-STAR REVIEW TO HER CO-WORKERS BECAUSE TEAMWORK IS ESSENTIAL.

MY FOOD WAS HOT AND FRESH. SHE PUT HOT SAUCE AND HONEY IN MY BAG AND I DID NOT HAVE TO ASK FOR IT. I WAS SO IMPRESSED. I NEEDED MY HOT SAUCE AND HONEY FOR MY BISCUIT.

TO ME THIS WAS ATTENTION TO DETAIL AND SHE AND THE OTHERS SHOULD BE THANKED FOR THEIR GOOD SERVICE.

TO THE OWNER AND MANAGER:

PLEASE READ THIS REVIEW TO YOUR STAFF IN YOUR MORNING MEETINGS. THEY DESERVE TO KNOW HOW WELL THEY DID.

reviews.author: GOD GIVEN
reviews.text: I just visited this Popeyes and the service was not bad at all. I will say they charged for extra sauce which I have never experienced at any other Popeyes, but what really made the experience for me was this gentleman named James Vance. He actually cooked my food and personally walked it out to me. He was kind in demeanor and his words were warm and welcoming. I highly recommend visiting this Popeyes and James’s quality service!

reviews.author: Lakeisha Allison
reviews.text: Food was good, service was horrible. Also, if you're going after 9pm be prepared to wait 20+ minutes to even place your order in drive thru. I'm just thankful that after waiting for so long my food was actually hot and tasted good!

google_address: 5620 Riverdale Road, college park, 5620 Riverdale Rd, Atlanta, GA 30349, USA

reviews.author: Tonya Washington
reviews.text:
Parking: Next to Clean Wave laundromat.  Free
Food: I ordered two chicken tacos. Oh my, it was delicious. The chicken was not dry, and the green sauce was spicy. They ran out of drinks so I walked to the Dollar store.
Service: The gentleman was polite.

I will come back to eat when I need to wash my comforters.

reviews.author: Journey
reviews.text: Freaking love them!! The food and the nice young men are amazing. Update prices went up by a dollar!!! 5 dollars for 1 tacos is not in my budget im gonna miss yall:(

reviews.author: JANELL BARBER
reviews.text: The first time I had this I ordered from doordash and got a burrito. It was underwhelming. HOWEVER, based off the reviews I wanted to try the tacos. The chicken tacos are so good. I've been back 3x since just for them. $4 is pretty steep though especially for the size.

reviews.author: J S
reviews.text: I’ve been in person and ordering from this place almost everyday for the last 10 months! Their tacos are soooooo amazing and the ingredients always taste so fresh ! Their sauces are homemade and always delicious with their food items ! The menu is very limited on DoorDash , however in person they have great choices to choose from. I’ve noticed recently that they’re no longer filling the cups of red and green sauce , they literally barely fill them up anymore compared to back in March of this year . Just be prepared to be under sauced and have no options to add more sauce on DoorDash .

reviews.author: Denisse
reviews.text:
Stopped here on a Monday around 5pm to grab a bite. There was no one in line, I drive right up to order.

The chic at the window was in the phone and took a while to acknowledge me and take my order. No greeting. Just looked at me like she would rather not be bothered.

I couldn’t hear what she was saying because the music was blasting. When I motioned that I couldn’t hear her, she didn’t make any adjustments.

I ordered. She gave me a beeper. I waited 15 minutes for two tacos when there was no one there before me. When I went to get it she rolled her eyes and gave no salutation as she handed me the bag.

The chicken taco was dry and the birria was average.

I will never be back and I don’t recommend you go. I spend my money where the business understands the importance of paying customers and prioritizes positive interactions. 🤡

google_address: 660 Northside Dr NW, Atlanta, GA 30318, USA

reviews.author: R B
reviews.text: All I have to say is that if TI would ever go to a restaurant and his food looked and tasted like mine and it cost $175,   he’d be furious so I’m asking him to please fix the quality and pricing of the food expeditiously.  Also don’t ever give customers cheap plastic to go silverware if they are eating in. Lastly for the love of god get some Hennessy!!! How are you the trap cafe without any cognac of any kind in this establishment.   One bright spot though was that he was there and he’s was very approachable .

reviews.author: Amy S
reviews.text: Before you step foot out your vehicle. $20 to park! These businesses will definitely nickel and dime you. Food was good. I think they may take the trap theme too far because eating with plastic utensils in a restaurant is crazy. Couldn’t even eat my pasta. Then they give you baby sippy cups for your non alcoholic for 4.00 which is filled with ice so more like a shot of sprite. Gone in one gulp! I didn’t even get a refill due to lack of service coming over. Also, it took 20 minutes for a server to even come over. Mind you they weren’t busy, it was pretty empty. Wings were smaller than those baby wings from American Deli lol

reviews.author: Cheryl Thomas
reviews.text: I am "really Ol School." But I am TOTALLY impressed with these young people. The Divas and Gents Bicycle group went here for dinner. Our server Erin and their team lead did a wonderful job with our large group. They were kind and professional. The food was delish and I really enjoyed myself. I ordered the turkey burger and it was way better than I expected. They made sure our we had a great time.  Thank you!

reviews.author: Dana seals
reviews.text: Well to start i made reservations on a Saturday for 7:15pm upon arriving trying to figure out where to park, the parking area SUCKS it's extremely small and they had the nerve to charge $20 for parking come on now TI you'll have to go their to see what im talking about as far as parking, after getting parked entering the inside no one was their to greet us, so making those reservations was pointless even tho we had reservations it didn't matter anyway because when I tell you there wasn't nobody in their, so we seated ourselves wherever we wanted, after waiting for about 10 minutes at a table we just went and sat at the bar to hopefully get waited on, so now were sitting at the bar the waitress/ bartender served us a drink and took our order 15 minutes later our food arrived we were both hungry we got the $29 Tower everything was good except the turkey sliders they were just bland no kind of seasoning on the turkey so then she never came back to check on us her focus was on the VIP area that was on the other side of the bar so TI the food was on point but the CUSTOMER SERVICE SUCKS  🤔 hummm bad customer service but good food how do I rate this place ill give Trap  City Cafe a #5

reviews.author: Tambra Jamar
reviews.text: Cute place. Our waitress Kris was awesome! We ordered chicken tenders and fries, black bean burger with fries and fried broccoli, chicken pasta, lemon pepper wings and Gouda Mac and cheese. Trouble trouble (drink) . Everything was delicious.the dj was good , service was great. I’d definitely go back.

address: 1475 Atlanta Industrial Way NW, Atlanta, Georgia, 30331
google_address: 1475 Atlanta Industrial Way NW, Atlanta, GA 30331, USA

company_name: Rickette's World Famous Chicken , Fish , and BBQ
google_name: Rickettes World Famous Chicken fish & Bbq Chicago style
google_address: 2740 Greenbriar Pkwy SW, Atlanta, GA 30331, USA

reviews.author: Dionne Penman
reviews.text: This is our second time ordering rib tips. Originally from Chicago so I got excited to get some good mild sauce in Georgia. The tips were barely there. Mostly bone and fat. The sauce is good. Not as good as Chicago but close enough. Fried chicken was on point. Fries on point.

reviews.author: Billy G
reviews.text: I was excited to try this place especially when I walked into a full lobby with people standing around waiting for ages. That's always a good sign at a restaurant. I went for the barbecue Italian beef sandwich with a side of fries and strawberry lemonade. I must have ordered the wrong thing. The sandwich was more like a soup. And they only gave me two little napkins and no spoon to eat the sandwich. I picked at it with my fingers a little bit but there's no way to pick it up. The beef was so salty I could only have a couple bites and ended up throwing the entire thing away. The side of fries was $4.50 and I ordered them extra crispy but the cook must have missed that note because they were undercooked and floppy even before any of the sauce was added and look at the tiny portion of fries for that price. The strawberry lemonade was okay, nothing special. Like I said, maybe I got the wrong thing but based on just what I ordered I would absolutely not recommend going here. If you do, try something else perhaps.

reviews.author: Linda Edgar
reviews.text: Got fried Chicken wings and an italian Beef.  Wings were seasoned well but still just ok..I think they were not freshly fried. italian beef had plenty of meat but was dry even though I had it dipped in gravy.  Bread was wet but meat still dry.  It was horrible. I tried to eat it because I hate wasting money and food but I threw them both out. Being from Chi, I was really hoping this food would satisfy my craving for chicago street food.  It was a miss for me.

reviews.author: Tamma Nelson
reviews.text: My family and I are visiting from Alabama! The fried okra didn’t make it out the park in lot my wife tried it and did a little dance. There staff was very friendly! The Turkey tips that we were given to try were fantastic! My wife and I ordered right at $100 worth of food. We were so excited, to try it all! “ WE DID LOL” We had the Greens, 10 out of 10! YOU MUST TRY!! The ribs were cooked to perfection! The fried chicken wings were fabulous! Okra, bbq beans, Mac Cheese, Banana whip, sweet pie! ALL THE THINGS WERE FINGER LICKING GOOD!! Oh the jolly rancher lemonade was the greatest! We had to get another one! Over all it was a fantastic experience. We will be repeating customers!! Thanks for a pleasurable experience!

reviews.author: Jessica Campbell
reviews.text: Worst Food Ever!! First time trying this out! I ordered the 3piece wing and gizzards combo. My Gizzards were fried so hard I couldn’t chew them. Chicken wings had no seasoning! My fries look like that had been sitting in grease!!! We waisted $26 because we threw our food straight into the trash!!!! Waited 30 minutes on food as well!!

google_address: 2002 Campbellton Rd SW, Atlanta, GA 30311, USA

reviews.author: Champion For Jesus Don't Get Ready Be Ready
reviews.text: My family and I love this restaurant we go all the time. Firstly, the food is delicious and they give you plenty 😁 I always have a goody bag to take home. The owner and staff are top notch. We had my auntie and cousin birthday party there and this year we are having our Christmas party there. My family highly recommend.

reviews.author: Monica Carson
reviews.text: OMG it was fantastic service from our server. She was very personable and attentive. She really worked my friends birthday celebration. The DJ was kind when interacting. He played a mixture of old school Atl and new school. Overall great atmosphere, the vibe was what I like.  A time was had! Everyone was inviting and spoke as soon as we entered their presence.

reviews.author: Char Marie Toma
reviews.text: Nice grown and sexy spot. I went on a Friday night which is line dance night. They line danced alllll night! Fun times. The food was ok. I ordered wings and fries, and the wings were cold. I would go back.

reviews.author: Latosha Green
reviews.text: Buckhead type vibes! The food is amazing. I recommend the lamb chops and the salmon is mouth watering! The DJ can move a crowd! The staff is very nice and welcoming as well as accommodating. With good there is always some bad, they have to hire more staff for the number of patrons. They need at least two bartenders and more wait staff. But let me be clear, this place is the best kept secret and much needed in the area! I will have to try the Sunday Brunch next! Highly recommended this beautiful establishment! 🫶🏾

reviews.author: Shaunda McManus
reviews.text: My girls’ trip crew were in town from Virginia, attending a graduation. We happened upon this nice place. The DJ was amazing, staff and food. Great atmosphere! We had a great time dancing and doing all of the line dances. Great vibes! Great music!

google_address: 2997 Campbellton Rd SW, Atlanta, GA 30311, USA

reviews.author: A R
reviews.text: When driving in you’d think the place was closed. But when you come inside it’s a vibrant esthetic. The restaurant is beautiful. The color scheme is unique with green sofas and gold chairs. Even the dinnerware was gold. The hookah is perfect… we ordered cocktails which was tipsy juice. The food was scrumptious. We ordered the crab cake, shrimp, wings and the snapper. Everything was great. The chef is definitely cheffing! Our server was kind, checked on us often, and made sure we enjoyed our visit. I highly recommend trying this restaurant. It’s a whole vibe!

reviews.author: Linz M.
reviews.text: When we first got seated, we were greeted by two different servers. That was very nice. Then after we ordered (shrimp- fried for one, grilled for the other) it took awhile to get our food. It tasted really good. Those “happy hour” drinks tasted like kool-aid, like there was no alcohol in them. So, they gotta rethink those. The live band was nice. The restaurant needs a little work, but overall, I would go back to give them another chance!

reviews.author: Nicholas Jackson
reviews.text: Wanted to try something different and Your Wish Sharisse said pull up here.  Definitely a chill vibe great atmosphere friendly staff and the food was amazing. Definitely will be returning in the near future.

reviews.author: Angie Immahandfull Davis
reviews.text: This is a great spot to hold and event. It's a great spot to watch sports. It's a great spot for some good food. Come and experience a NY vibe.

reviews.author: Stacey Hopkins
reviews.text:
Okay, so let me start by saying I WANT THIS BUSINESS TO THRIVE and this is a LOVING critique.

With that said, I was disappointed with the meal we got here. It was our anniversary and we figured we'd give this place a try, as we live a few blocks away. This location, which I knew as the clubs, Marko's and DejaVu , has been renovated and it is lovely, but rather dark. Venue is a great event space with two bars, stage and VIP areas.

The food? While seasoned well (a bit heavy, but I liked it), I was bothered that we ordered a NY strip and a ribeye and it looks like I was given two skirt syeaks for a NY strip and not sure about the rib eye. You only get one side and the portions were small. The drinks? Weak. I had a margaritas with 1800 tequila. My husband wanted Barcardi light, they were out. They also were out of baked potatoes, so I got the broccoli. Nothing special.

We spent about $120 for two and for that price, I expected at least Longhorn or Chili's kinda quality. It wasn't. The crab fingers? We've had them in Florida before and expected a platter of them for $20. We gor six claws that were basically stuffed and fried. Seasoning was stoke level HEAVY and I expected a bit more for the price.

I MIGHT give them another try in the future, but was not impressed by our visit and disappointed our anniversary meal wasn't as special as I wanted it to be.

No complaints on service.

I need this establishment to do better; I was so excited to see it open.

google_address: 1699 Sylvan Rd SW, Atlanta, GA 30310, USA

reviews.author: Shalanda Cowans
reviews.text: I absolutely love this place! The owner has a beautiful spirit! She really loves her customers! The heart of a woman bowl that she created is the absolute best! I can’t stay away from this place! I feel compelled to support her success! She has different bases for your fruit bowls, and she has 3 different sizes, which I love because sometimes the larger bowls are too much for me to eat in one serving. But, the açaí bowls are fresh and delicious. The gumbo is good! The seafood rolls are also good. Don’t sleep on this place and be patient with your support because she really loves her customers.

reviews.author: S. Mashet Smith
reviews.text: This morning my daughter treated me to breakfast here. First off the customer service from J and Taniyah was excellent. Loved the vibe from the music to the decor here upon entrance. I fell in love with the almond butter croissant at first bite! 😆 The açaí cup which my daughter ordered not only is good for you but tasted super delicious. Definitely enjoyed our Garden district lattes. This was a great impromptu mom and me outing overall here. Will be back and recommend a visit to others for sure!

reviews.author: Krystina Nelson
reviews.text: I have been supporting Everythang NOLA for years, not even sure how many atp. I was a customer back when they went by a different name and even a different location. Keisha and T-Man never disappoint! Treat and love on my babies like family, the food is always fresh and delicious and the açaí bowls are always on point. Down to the fresh fruit toppings. I respect that the owner never half steps and doesn’t sell or serve product that she isn’t pleased with. They def have a life customer with me.

reviews.author: Brittany Walton
reviews.text: Service was top tier. I got the praline pound cake with a praline ice coffee. Delicious 🤤 you have to come and check this place out it has a variety of different flavorful snacks.

reviews.author: Mardi Graz
reviews.text: Everythang Nola is seemingly in the middle of nowhere but is actually right on the outskirts or everywhere you wanna be! #IYKYK! I happened to come, luckily, when it wasn't busy at all! The staff was super friendly! The Dragon fruit smoothie bowl was insanely bussin and so refreshing, and the gooey butter cake was chefs kiss, on chefs kiss! I would definitely recommend this to any and everybody!

google_address: 2477 Metropolitan Pkwy SW, Atlanta, GA 30315, USA

reviews.author: Azaria Hawthorne
reviews.text: I went to call their phone twice to ask about feminine care products for a loved one. The phone had rung and went on for a second until it answered then it was instantly disconnected. I had assumed it was a mere incident until I called the second time and they rudely asked "Who is this?"  I tried to be very polite and cordial but, they didn't have any mannerisms whatsoever tonight. I won't say this reflects this shell station as a whole, but whoever was on the phone displaying that attitude to strangers over the phone needs to straighten that out.

reviews.author: ebethany vinson
reviews.text: My personal experience was great. I went in to pay for gas and noticed they sell Grippos, which is rare in the South. The attendant noticed me right away, and we had a nice conversation. Polite staff, clean gas station, and the food looked good, but I didn't have any. Also the prices were nice.

reviews.author: Swaggy P
reviews.text: HORRIBLE CUSTOMER SERVICE!!! I BELIEVE ITS SELF HATRED!!!

reviews.author: Chico Malo
reviews.text: They won't short change you unless some new hire not knowing the prices is working. There is one tall male thinking he's God's gift with a very nasty disrespectful attitude towards customers along with have the employees not focused because their cellular phones are more important than sales that make it difficult to get in and out respectfully. Plus this place has really went down hill on it's selection

reviews.author: angela green
reviews.text:
Store was clean. But expect racism if you're  Hispanic or White. My money is good regardless of what color I am. I've never been a racist. Never plan to either. But your cashier on the 6:30 shift needs to understand a customer service job. If he has issues with the color of people's skin then he should work in a factory out of the public eye,  so he's not triggered randomly. Only when his boss comes by.
Can't believe how I witnessed him speak nor how he spoke to me. Its 2019 ALMOST 2020. NOT 1920. please just stop.

address: 890 Joseph E Boone Blvd NW, Atlanta, Georgia, 30314
google_address: 890 Joseph E. Boone Blvd NW, Atlanta, GA 30314, USA

reviews.author: Craig Prater
reviews.text: The customer service was great. The food was good for the most part, but some things could've been better. The yams seemed a bit overcooked. But the meatloaf, collard greens, and yellow rice were great. The prices are a bit high, but you get some heavy portions. My plate was enough for two servings. Wish the Mac & cheese had style been available when I showed up though.

reviews.author: John Cofey
reviews.text: I live in the area but don’t generally eat in the area. I wish I would’ve stuck to that. This food was bland as hell. I asked for cheese grits and I’m pretty sure these are those instant cheese grits cuz there’s not a single taste of cheese. The fish must be old because whiting is a mild fish and doesn’t normally smell or taste super fishy but I could smell it through the bag. The smell is actually louder than cat fish. The biscuit tastes like it was cooked in bacon grease. If I could give this plate 0 stars, I would. Eeeeeyuck.

reviews.author: Ciera Bey
reviews.text: Sad because I loved this restaurant! I ordered fish n grits. Noticed the grits had hair in them. The “French toast” was stale as hell , the porch chops were dryer than a roll of paper and the potato salad side came in Costco sample cups 😒 do not recommend.

reviews.author: Nika Harris
reviews.text: If I could rate is a -1 stars I would. I wouldn’t at from here if they told me the food was free for life cause it’s no way I order food through an app I’m waiting and you give me food that an animal wouldn’t sniff let alone eat. Meatloaf yellow rice and white beans kind you I didn’t pick the items they were picked for me and you can tell they were old and warmed up almost went to jail because I through that plate right back inside that counter !!! I would never eat here again I should actually call a lawyer if I’m being honest

reviews.author: Cici’s Channel
reviews.text: Meatloaf is the bomb, yams are okay not all that Mac and cheese is okay not all that. Portion of food was a lot and worth it for the price of pay but food don't give a place for soul food. Service was great, homemade juice wasn’t good at all. Price is not worth the meal

google_address: 6358 Old Dixie Hwy, Jonesboro, GA 30236, USA

reviews.author: Daniel Kennedy
reviews.text: Karen and bob might as well be my family. They have been truly understanding when we were at the hospital and gave us extra time to. Make it back to pay them. They don’t throw our things out instead asked how our baby was doing. If you get to know them they are amazing people.

reviews.author: KJ Piotter
reviews.text: I recommend no one stay at this hotel. The staff is very, very rude and very unprofessional. The experience was quite terrible and there are so many other options in the area so if you know best, I recommend go try other places before you come to this one star  hotel.

reviews.author: Christopher Grant
reviews.text: Very good for the price. Room was reasonability decent and the owners were very nice. Easy access to freeway and food nearby.

reviews.author: arun raj
reviews.text: I forgot my iwatch in the hotel, i called them and they shipped it via usps. I just recieved it, I’m so happy. Such a nice gesture by owner and the team working there.

reviews.author: Felicia Mcfarland
reviews.text: It was horrifying. The smell was horrendous. The water in the tub wasn't dripping it was running couldn't turn it off. The one good I could say I didn't see any bugs

google_address: 1021 Fair St SW, Atlanta, GA 30314, USA

reviews.author: Macy Combs
reviews.text: Don’t shop here. They will overcharge you for everything. I just moved to this area and live right around the corner from this store. The store is not that big and have a lot of the same items. So I basically get the same items every time I shop. One day a 2pack off advil cost me 2.99, the next day I come they try and charge me $5. When I mention it to them or say I don’t want the items they become very snobby and rude. It’s not the first time it has happened but it will be the last! No matter how much money you spend they’ll give you their ssa to kiss. I won’t be spending another dollar here!

reviews.author: Brianna Miller
reviews.text: Very rude workers

google_address: 2841 Greenbriar Pkwy SW, Atlanta, GA 30331, USA

reviews.author: Fam first tsrifmaf anders
reviews.text: Chelsea had great customer service This is the one located in Greenbrier Mall have not eaten the food yet This is a review for her customer service 10 out of 10.

reviews.author: Korey Edwards
reviews.text: Was my first time and I ordered the 2pc flounder platter and after eating the first bite I was upset that I didn’t get the 3pc. Cashier was nice as well. Will definitely be going back.

reviews.author: Nina Byrd
reviews.text: Get they honey garlic wings . The service was wonderful im from Cincinnati and really felt at home here stop by if you ever in Atlanta check my food review out @ xine999nine

reviews.author: mari
reviews.text: Mimi Thomas your review isn’t true  I work here at fish club and you posted this review 2 hours ago but you didn’t come to the fish club & James does not work here. Sorry for the inconvenience of what service you have received but I assure you that it wasn’t from our club nor today thank you have a blessed day

reviews.author: International Louie
reviews.text: Great food and great customer service and staff

company_name: J J RIB SHACK AL TIN TEX INC
google_address: 2969 Campbellton Rd SW, Atlanta, GA 30311, USA

reviews.author: william terry
reviews.text: I got a pan of rib tips they were pretty good tender, not salty, smoky and so easy to eat enough that my two year ate with ease. But remember call in your order first, cause I did call a hour early and when I got there I still had to wait another 5 -10 minutes, but instead of getting angry, I rather make sure I have fully cooked food, and it was good

reviews.author: S J
reviews.text: 1st time customer that seen a reel on IG and went 4 the Rib tips but they were sold out and only had Ribs so I tried the Rob sandwich and it was really good! The wait was a bit but not tooooo long.

reviews.author: Anita Miller
reviews.text: I ordered two trays of rib tips never got them. I got  two trays of ribs, one with four bones and the other with 5 bones one tray the ribs was dry and  burnt very unsatisfied.

reviews.author: Love My Mama
reviews.text:
First of all, this place open at 12pm so why do you open 15-30 minutes before your scheduled time which is the same time your customers arrive. There is no way WE (customers) should wait over 20-25 minutes for a rib/chicken dinner instead you have customers waiting 3-4 hours which is ridiculous. YOU ARE TAKING PERSONAL ORDERS FOR FRIENDS AND THEY DON'T HAVE TO WAIT. PLEASE EXPLAIN, IF I PLACED AN ORDER FOR BARBECUE CHICKEN 10 MINS AFTER YOU OPEN AND YOU TELL ME 2.5 HOURS LATER THAT YOU ARE OUT OF CHICKEN, LIES!!!!

Customers, please make sure that you get a receipt that reflects the breakdown of your order because...they know why??? I am wondering if this establishment pay taxes 🤔

Allow me to help you (JJs), if you are going to take orders for a pan of chicken or ribs TAKE ORDERS OVER THE PHONE INSTEAD. GIVE A TIME FOR PICK UP AND IF THEY DON'T PICK UP WITHIN 30 MINUTES, SELL IT!!!!

I am so disappointed after spending $90 dollars for a pan of ribs & chicken because I was definitely overcharged. More importantly, the pan of chicken was not BARBECUED AT ALL (ROTISSERIE) with the BURNT marks from the rotisserie seasoned very well but the PAN OF CHICKEN was NOT from the GRILL. I AM A COOK TOO so I know YOU don't care.

reviews.author: Yolanda Parks.
reviews.text: I had a visit on 7/3/25, arrived at 10:45, doors didn't open until 12pm. I was about #10 in line, as I was entering,  it was announced chicken was sold out. I said how could that be possible, you haven't taken any orders. So, I sat waiting until 3:45, but I was late for work. So the female in the front had already placed my order for chicken for the 4th which is the next day. I left and came back the next day, I arrived at 8:45, there was one car there before me and we lined up in that order, the 1st person got her order in 10 maybe 15 mins. I sat there until almost 4pm, still no order. During that time, I  was seeing orders being placed in the rear of restaurant for higher price, for example, 1 customer told me his order was $90 but he can get his order for $180, and so made a deal with the owner and didn't have to wait,  and the male left with his order.  There was several transactions that took place in that same manner that day. Disregarding the other customers time and money. I think they should be audited and shut down. They inconvenienced people, the manager refused to come out and face customers, no apologies, the employees had a very bad attitude,  and was very rude. You had customers upset, but then act as if we was the problem after most of us was there for 2 days and still didn't get served. I am not just going to stop here. I will not be satisfied until they understand you can't mistreat people and prosper. God don't like ugly. They will get just what they deserve.

address: 3613 Martin Luther King Jr Dr SW, Atlanta, Georgia, 30331
google_address: 3613 M.L.K. Jr Dr SW, Atlanta, GA 30331, USA

reviews.author: Kenyata Smith
reviews.text: So nasty!!!!!!!!!!!   I ordered the house special last night before it closed round bout 7:15 they close at 8 on Sunday when I tell you the braised wings and rice tastes like toilet water it does the wings taste like sewer water and the rice leaves a aftertaste of toilet water I don’t know if you all enjoy that but I don’t I couldn’t even finish it then I can’t go get my money back no refunds!!!!!! This is not the same no more will never return

reviews.author: Pure Life
reviews.text: It’s just not the same anymore And do it with a smile on there Faces Never again This shouldn’t happen literally The next day from buying Right or wrong let me know Just putting ya down ..,.,,  Imma just start back cooking at home again Ong!!!!!

reviews.author: Jacques Chabot
reviews.text: Excellent food here and no MSG. You will not go wrong here. I like spicy when it come to Chinese food. There spicy is the Mandarin Chicken or Spicy Wings. I got the Mandarin Chicken. Everything is take out no tables available.

reviews.author: Sheva Sheva
reviews.text: I grew up on China Cafeteria in the West End but overtime its quality went downhill. With getting tired of eating at the same restaurants, I checked out the reviews for this location. Surprisingly, they were good. I went and the customer service was absolutely phenomenal. The young guy that works in there has the most positive attitude and good conversation. The food taste like what I remember from childhood. The lemonade is a must have! The place is very old and outdated which is normally a turnoff. If they would do something about its appearance, I guarantee it'll bring in more customers. For a quick, cheap meal, this is a go to every now and then. This location does not serve lo mein :(

reviews.author: achi aav
reviews.text: Don't know why I haven't reviewed this place and we've been going there for over 20 years. Upon entering, we were greeted and started our usual order- the house special. Throughout the years, it's been a hit or miss, recently it's a hit. I like the cook, it's not how it was before but it's still pretty darn good.

google_address: 2740 Greenbriar Pkwy SW, Atlanta, GA 30331, USA

reviews.author: Kristin A.
reviews.text: I’ve been eating here since childhood! Food quality is not the same. Vegetables are cut too big. I do not want gigantic (like extremely huge) onions and bell peppers in my pepper steak. I asked for vegetable fried rice that’s generally carrots and peas. They gave me rice with huge broccoli pieces, cabbage, mushrooms etc. I barely had rice because of the huge broccoli pieces. The flavor of the pepper steak was blah. It was not cooked with soy sauce or broth but more like a brown gelatin or gravy. Egg rolls are always good. However, today is the last day I’ll spend my money here.

reviews.author: Marvin O
reviews.text: Han's II is a great place to eat on a budget. I've been going here for years. Everything is cooked to order, so it's always hot and fresh. I fell in love with the portion sizes too. You call ahead as well, which is really good. The young lady at the front named May, and her cute little girl always happily greets everyone who enters. Give them a try if you're in the area. Oh one more thing?! THEY NOW ACCEPT DEBIT CARDS!!!

reviews.author: True Believer
reviews.text: Update: something has changed, got the pepper 🫑 steak with the shrimp 🦐 fried rice and it was tasty! 😋

reviews.author: Darlene Lyles
reviews.text: The best Mongolian beef I’ve ever had in my life and it was spicy and I asked them to make it spicy and they did. I’m gonna ask him to make it even more spicier when I get it again.

reviews.author: meisha thompson
reviews.text: This place never disappoints me. Customer service is always good. The wait is quick even though it’s super busy. I ordered the house fried rice with a shrimp egg roll and had a strawberry lemonade which was so refreshing. Egg roll and strawberry lemonade not pictured. Also try the braised wings you will not be disappointed. The sauce I poured over the rice was the sauce that they put on the braised wings.

google_address: 3030 Headland Dr SW # 200, Atlanta, GA 30311, USA

reviews.author: Tionna Watson
