reviews.text: Chicken is not fresh. I hate to take a picture of my chewed food but this is the chicken. I got the sesame chicken it’s like trying to eat strips of plastic. Uneditable.

reviews.author: Kema Sylvester
reviews.text: I eat here all the time . But the other day my food was clearly old had been sitting out or something of that nature . The egg roll I bit into had a loud foul odor . Against my better judgment I threw it out & started to eat my shrimp fried rice & sweet & sour chicken . The food tasted funny but I continued to eat it , shortly after I’m on the toilet & throwing up at the same time . Guess I won’t be eating here again. Very disappointed in this place .

reviews.author: J “Speedking” P
reviews.text:
Finally, I found the best chinese takeout restaurant.
If you are looking for New York style chinese food, you should try this place.
Best chinese takeout restaurant in ATL.
Chicken w/ brocoli, sesame chicken, general tso chicken, and wonton  soup... two thumbs 👍 up.

reviews.author: Brandy Nichole
reviews.text: I give it two stars because the food was quickly prepared. So I had big hopes but I was disappointed after the first bite. They have yellow fried rice which despite its color which suggests seasoning  was as bland as white rice. Also the chicken if you could call it that has a fishy taste??? I’m not totally sure it’s chicken I bit a few pieces in half and it wasn’t the usual chicken breast or dark meat chunks that I am used to. Instead it’s this semi clear meat like substance that if it was chicken would be raw. Not happy! Also there was no health score posted which I originally ignored but now I realize should have had me concerned 😟

reviews.author: Diamond Martin
reviews.text: Always good taste just like NYC Chinese food which is the best Chinese food iykyk 💙

google_address: 2910 Campbellton Rd SW, Atlanta, GA 30311, USA

reviews.author: A Wells
reviews.text: Fries were definitely pre-cooked, then dropped back into the grease. Wings were small but flavorful.

reviews.author: Javan Slusher
reviews.text: I've only had the wings there. The wings are good but extremely small. They are truly baby wings. They have other things on the menu to try

reviews.author: roderick carroll
reviews.text: Best wings in the whole ATL!!! They never miss! Good every time!!!

reviews.author: Prue
reviews.text: That was one of the best Philly cheese steaks I've ever eaten. And I've eaten at a lot of famous Philadelphia places. This is going to be one of my go-to work from home lunch places now.

reviews.author: BabyGirl Dennis
reviews.text: Best wings in the city for years! But they  Haven’t been open in 2 months now!! Think I’m going to have to find a new wing spot

google_address: 2883 Lakewood Ave SW, Atlanta, GA 30315, USA

reviews.author: Bayuntray Anderson
reviews.text: Overall, I’m satisfied. The wings were a decent size, a little larger than normal. I would get them fried hard. But the flavor was on point. The owner is also a cool guy and had good energy. For 20 wings for under $20, you really can’t really find that in Atlanta. Try this spot out. You can’t lose!

reviews.author: Shawnie A
reviews.text: Came here from Google.  Ordered plain wings. Wings were cooked just right. Food didn't take long and the Man serving the food was very welcoming and pleasant.  I'll definitely be back

reviews.author: kijana pratt
reviews.text: I’ve been here a few times now and the wings have always been good every single time I’ve come. I’ll gladly drive from buckhead to Rahim’s because not only are these the best wings in Atlanta but the owner is so amazing and so kind. Ive tried so many wing spots isn’t atl but honestly im grateful i found Rahim’s he makes his wings exactly how you want them and they are so dang yummy!! Best wings in Atl!!

reviews.author: liluzirager
reviews.text: wanted to try this place bc of the good reviews. ordered a 20 piece & 10 piece both with fries and the order was completely wrong when i came to pick it up. though the food was remade, the order was still wrong lol. food was edible ig, just bland & wings were soggy,, don’t even bother coming here

reviews.author: Kimberly
reviews.text: Great wings and excellent fries!  This was my first time ordering from this establishment. Next time I will order my wings crispy. The wings were not soggy, l just enjoy my wings a tad bit crispier. Everything was well seasoned and not too salty. I’ll. Be back! 😋

google_address: 1192 Pryor Rd SW, Atlanta, GA 30315, USA

reviews.author: Dejse Knuckles
reviews.text: Food was amazing, nice hot and fresh. The service was fast and our order was correct. The frozen lemonade was good as well. I recommend the fish and wing plate. Only thing the area seems a little rough but they had security guard outside. We will definitely return. Only thing I would recommend would be seating I came from out of town and wish I could have ate inside.

reviews.author: T Kir
reviews.text:
This is a stop we make anytime we have to got to the airport because of its proximity.
Our entire family affectionately calls this spot Hood Chicken. It’s not in nicest of neighborhoods, but I have seen people of ALL races stop here for chicken!

This is by far the crispiest chicken on earth! It takes us almost 30 minutes to get back to our place, and it’s STILL HOT and crispy and Delicious! They have a shaker on the table that is filled with (for lack of a better word) chicken and French fry crack! I can’t tell you all the herbs/spices in it, but I can tell you: it’s the BEST seasoning on EARTH!!

On this trip we got a 10 piece (that’s FULL SIZED WINGS (the wing and the ding) unlike some places that charge full price when the wing is separated)
I’ve tried 3 flavors of their lemonade…(also liquid crack) it’s the perfect blend of everything, the sweet, the sour and the flavor! My only complaint is that they put a half of a lemon in the cup which obviously takes up a LOT of space and  therefore the customer pays full price when you gave me half the liquid.
I have only been to this location, but found that there are others. I wouldn’t recommend you go at night, but that’s just my personal take.

reviews.author: Sani 24k
reviews.text: Had to stop by jjfish in ATL after we got finished taking care of business in the city. After Long day after fliming and being in the studio theres nothing better than JJ FISH & CHCIKEN!!! They ALWAYS stuff the box with food especially closer to closing. You definitely gonna get your bang for your bucks at this location!! They not stingy with the seasoning either! Just tell them to add more. 10/10 never had a problem with these people nor had a food quality issue. Food so good I could cry 🤣🔥 ya hear me!!!

reviews.author: sadee head
reviews.text: I come to this restaurant often to get food for my mother. Never had a problem before today. The restaurant messed up my order and handed me the wrong food. It was unacceptable and nasty for them to take the food back after I opened the container and give it to another customer later. However I had to wait twice the time for their mistake and I politely asked for something for the inconvenience and was told “we don't do guest services.” I felt this response was unreasonable and disrespectful for a long time paying customer..I cannot do business with a restaurant that does not respect my time and only wants my money…done spending money with ungrateful and racist businesses. Shop at your own risk and make your food is fresh and not something someone breathed on and handed back to get handed to you.

reviews.author: Jaelyn Melena
reviews.text: If you’re a catfish person like I am, the fried whitining might not be for you. I felt the fish had a very fishy flavor. The crack seasoning was okay. Likely wouldn’t order seafood from here if I came back.

address: 3657 Martin Luther King Jr Dr SW, Atlanta, Georgia, 30331
google_address: 3657 M.L.K. Jr Dr SW B, Atlanta, GA 30331, USA

reviews.author: Titiana Weaver
reviews.text: Ver good pancake was the star. Very generous with food and the cheese eggssss 20/10. Mom took me definitely will tell others

reviews.author: Highly Favored
reviews.text: Its was my first time going there.. Food was great and price was perfect for the amount of food given. For three people sent about $30 total and I tipped. We will definitely be back and I definitely want to try the Sunday soul food menu. 10 out of 10

reviews.author: LEACIE Bell
reviews.text: Don’t get me wrong. The food is great but they’re supposed to open at 8:30 and they don’t be on time. You can’t set your business up to open at a certain time and you get their hours after the opening time y’all gotta understand people be having things to do. I’m not telling nobody how to run a business but when you set your opening time at 8:30 people will come around that time, but when we be sitting outside, waiting for y’all to open and y’all still don’t open, that’s very inconsiderate. Change your time simple or keep getting compliance. I’ve been here since 8:30 and it’s now 9:30 and y’all still not open.

reviews.author: Ashley B
reviews.text: I was on my lunch break looking for decent food in the area and I saw that this place was only a mile away. I don’t typically hang out on this side of town, but I figured the food would be at least decent. When I walked in, I was greeted by the chef who is really nice and did informed me that they were only serving breakfast. I ordered two over easy eggs, grits, and chicken wings which also came with toast. It took about 15 minutes and the food was fresh. I made a joke about the chicken when I first saw it I called it light skin chicken because I’m used to chicken being a little more brown. That is the best chicken that I have had since I’ve been in Georgia. It was perfectly cooked not overdone and not overly seasoned. It was the perfect flavor. My eggs came out amazing. I didn’t eat my eggs for about 10 minutes after they were made and they still were running on the inside just like I like them, I will definitely be returning because the food was great. The one thing I will say is that the area is sketchy so make sure to keep your car locked and remove all valuables. The food was very affordable. I believe I paid about $10 plus a tip. Follow my Instagram @rosadivina29 and check out my foodie & foodie 2 highlights for more places I’ve visited!

reviews.author: Music Lover
reviews.text:
The food and friendliness here were wonderful! We had lunch one day and breakfast the next. I didn't take photos of our breakfast but the kids' hotcake meal had a hotcake as big as the full-size to go container! Our lunch was fried fish (we had whiting and catfish) and various sides, all of which were delectable and such large portions we all had some to take with us.

This place deserves all the accolades from locals and is most definitely worth a stop if you're traveling, too. Thank you, MeMezz!

google_address: 839 Cleveland Ave SW, Atlanta, GA 30315, USA

reviews.author: 1278 Deli
reviews.text: These employees need to be trained on what a white meat means. People don’t purchase a five piece white and expect 4 wings and one breast. Then the manager is rude, she had regular employees trying to calm her down..like she owns all the breast and it would personally hurt her to give me more than one breast on a 5 piece white meat. The 3.7 rating is true..I had to tell her we not arguing, ima just complain. In which she encouraged me to do..she told me to go ahead and complain…She should be a team member

reviews.author: V Reese
reviews.text:
Worst example of management ever! I wish I could rate it a negative number for the negative experience. Went in on Aug 15th to place an order. Saw a special listed for the wings - buy one, get one free. Ordered that and a three piece meal. The cashier called the manager over for help to input the special properly. He came over and when he saw what it was, he told me in no uncertain terms that the special was no longer going on. To which I replied, that if the sign is up and I'm allowed to place the order, it should be honored. He said that it would not be and what did I want to do? I asked for his name several times and he refused to give me his name. As a manager, he should not be afraid to give his name and he should honor their specials that are posted. He told me it was over and would not be honored. His behavior sets the tone for his entire staff and customers. I cancelled my order and will not patronize there again. A man should be able to stand on his word so if his word was no, then he should have been proud to give his name. And to not at least try to accommodate a customer, he has shown that he is not management material either. I took pictures and video of this foolery.
Today, Aug 24th @ 12:20pm I received a phone call from someone from Popeyes. He didn't tell me his name initially but wanted to know what my complaint was. When I asked him who he was, he said Anthony and then I asked what his position was. He stated that he was one of the managers there. I asked if he was the manager there when my incident happened on August 15th at 11:15ish. He said he didn't know and what did I have to say? I realized it was the same man and I am very upset that he was allowed to call my phone when the complaint was against him. What is that about?  If this is not going to be taken seriously, I will find out where I need to escalate it to.

reviews.author: Sasheena Campbell
reviews.text: I really tried to be patient with this Popeyes, but after three messed up orders on three completely separate days, I’ve had enough. Every time I ordered, something was wrong, missing food, wrong food or items I specifically paid extra for not included. It’s frustrating because I kept giving them another chance hoping it was just a bad day, but clearly this is how they operate. The service is careless and the quality control is nonexistent. I won’t ever order from this location again.

reviews.author: Ambrose Emmanuel
reviews.text:
Ok this is the worst restaurant in the states I’ve ever been to.  Pathetic service.  The girl taking orders at the counter was super arrogant. Least courteous. No management at all. One reasonable guy, looked like the manager, couldn’t handle things at all.  You literally even have to be in waiting for a simple thing as a ketchup.  Worst, the restrooms. Pathetic. Dirty, smelly, no paper towels and no air dryer even.
The food was excellent though. Typical Popeyes chicken. The management definitely needs to look into this restaurant for improvement.

reviews.author: Lavonne
reviews.text: I ordered the two can dine white meat only and was told I have to get one breast and four wings. I asked for three breast. The manager asked me if I drive a challenger and told me I was wrong when I said I go to other Popeyes and they always give me more than one breast on a five piece white. She told me she’d have to charge me..yall need to definitely retrain yal employees!

address: 825 Martin Luther King Jr Dr NW, Atlanta, Georgia, 30314
google_address: 825 M.L.K. Jr Dr SW, Atlanta, GA 30314, USA

reviews.author: Rocky Jones
reviews.text: Had a craving for wings so I decided to give this restaurant a try. Disappointed in the quality of the wings. I did ask them to fry it hard which was a mistake considering the wings were so tiny frying it hard made it taste worse. Idk if people go there for the Phillies but the wings are not it . I got lemon pepper and extra hot and for some reason the extra hot had a weird tangy sweetness to it. Customer service was good tho; I can’t eat customer service unfortunately.

reviews.author: BaShonda Rucker
reviews.text: This is my first time ordering from this place. My coworker recommended them to me because I was trying to find a spot to me some lunch. My food was delicious and fresh. It was cooked to order. I will definitely be returning

reviews.author: Ms. Sharon T. (VESTA)
reviews.text: The good thing is they have small wings. The sauce tastes like a ketchup base w/vinegar and spices. The only thing was my Shrimp fried rice was dry and clumpy, with a good amount of shrimp. The eggs inside the rice was as brown as the rice, where I thought none was in there. I give them a 3 on rice, 7 on wings and a 7 on Philly sandwich, overall. Try for yourself

reviews.author: Keeya Womack
reviews.text:
This is my first time visiting this establishment.
I really, really want to rate the meal I purchased a negative 10.
I purchased the large House Rice.  I do not advise anyone to waste his/her money on this.
1. The rice was overcooked, gummy, dark, and sweet. Why? Why? Why?
2. The vegetables were few and old; they were not fresh at all.
3. Meat:
Shrimp: maybe five,
Chicken was dry, and
The other meat was some type of shaving, fried!
If you don't know how to prepare a dish, just don't offer it on your menu.
I  want my money back.

reviews.author: Sheva Sheva
reviews.text: Love this place. My favorites are the chicken phillies, wings, fish, tenders and fries. Always fresh and customer service is equally as good. I do not recommend their hamburgers though.

google_address: 7523 GA-85, Riverdale, GA 30274, USA

reviews.author: Lynn Johnson
reviews.text: My co-worker shared her lunch from here and it was awesome.  It was so good that  I went there for dinner after school the same day and ordered what she had. The seafood pasta was wonderful and the Shrimp Egg Rolls were a delight. I can't wait to return to try something new. It is a little pricey but you get what you pay for. No complaints from me.

reviews.author: Joseph Sheffield
reviews.text: I’ve eaten here before and I enjoyed it, I have to program it in my memory- because I don’t shop in this plaza. I’m glad I remembered today because I stopped by and man everything was amazing. I love their salmon croquettes. The pancake was exceptional, eggs exceptional, grits exceptional, chicke sausage exceptional, Value exceptional. I couldn’t leave the parking lot without writing a review as I ate it in the car- see pictures lol. They have a nice little spread of food as well and everything looks great. Nice people and good vibes in here. I was looking for some veggies. The bar could be larger/order at the bar. I can tell that they are continuing to improve as things look upgraded since the last time which is great to see. I’d highly recommend this place for lunch as I believe they close at 3 PM. Plenty of parking in the plaza. Kid friendly and wheelchair accessible.Great job Yummies Café. I just came here again and the food is really delicious again. They only had one server and cashier today so they were a bit slow but the food was so good that I wasn’t tripping. She acknowledged it and she was very nice so I had no issues for real, but I was kind of on a time crunch this Saturday. I recommend all their food. They got some real cooks back there.

reviews.author: Daverney
reviews.text: 7/30/25-4pm - This is my second time here and I will not be returning. I was under the impression that there was a happy hour special for food due to the large banner outside the door but that was not the case. The shrimps were heavily overcooked, the sauce was watered down (not my preference), and the lemon drop and margarita for happy hour was disguising. I left the lemon drop bc of how nasty it was. The service was friendly and very helpful with the menu and I appreciate that. The location has such potential but overpriced and the quality of food isn’t that great. Honestly, I’ll go down the shopping plaza to the BBQ joint.

reviews.author: Sha'Bria Johnson
reviews.text: This is my favorite place to eat for breakfast the food is so delicious and gives home cooking with love! The food is always cooked to order and fresh! All the ladies are so sweet and always have great meal suggestions!  I always get the Jazzy special with extra salmon because baby that Salmon taste like my grandma was back there cooking it her self and don’t get me started on those nice crispy breakfast potato’s!!! All of the food is affordable and just so delicious I be out side waiting until Yummies open that’s how bad I be crazing my Jazzy Special for breakfast!

reviews.author: Chavonne White
reviews.text: My breakfast tastes like my Grandma made it!!! These salmon croquettes taste like home. The food was really good. Pancakes were perfect. They can stand to do a deep cleaning though. The floor was sticky and I'm so grateful I didn't have to touch the keypad when I was checking out. That was my only issue. I thought the food was reasonably priced especially for the climate we're in.

address: 3401 Atlanta Industrial Pkwy NW, Atlanta, Georgia, 30331
google_address: 3401 Atlanta Industrial Pkwy NW, Atlanta, GA 30331, USA

reviews.author: Jean-Marie Craigs
reviews.text: Nice, helpful and fairly quick unloading. Tight to back into docks, but doable. Good place to deliver to. My photo is after I was backed into a middle dock.

reviews.author: Gary Jackson
reviews.text: Got here early was sent to 3nd location, great service fast unloading ad friendly people like receiving guy Lester and his crew

reviews.author: Almir Sinanovic
reviews.text:
Great place for delivery.
It was July 3rd ( 4th of July weekend today ,I was here to deliver,2 young man told me that they should be off today ,since I'm here they will unload it .
Door 6 Empty in 30 min

reviews.author: michael sharp
reviews.text: They use chemicals unsafe for human consumption people fake clean. They're is acidic chemicals ask over the ceilings and walls spiders and webs everywhere I worked here found bugs and grime everywhere this place is disgusting people sweating all over covered in the powder they dump. Coughing sneezing around equipment. Friendly staff but the business should be shut down. Half the equipment needs to be cleaned. The floors are never correctly cleaned. This business is dirty all the way around. The only time they deep clean is when they have an audit. They tried to make me sign papers stating they deep cleaned every Friday and i didn't even work there on the dates they made me sign for I asked them to shred and remake papers. This business is fraudulent and need an investigation I hope u guys see me telling the truth to the world

reviews.author: A A
reviews.text: Very difficult to back into with semi, blind side and you have to wait for employee vehicles are moved. Suggest arriving during the night before employees start showing up at 7 a.m.

google_address: 609 Whitehall St SW, Atlanta, GA 30303, USA

reviews.author: Henny NoChasa
reviews.text:
SMH. I have been passing by this place for awhile now and I saw a post on IG.  I decided to go here on a 1st date and was disappointed. We paid 113$ for crap in takeout containers. We both ordered Hennessy margaritas which did not taste good. He ordered shrimp and grits. The shrimp were fried to perfection, that's the only good thing we had. The grits were gritty, not creamy. I has the broiled seafood platter which came with salmon, that was over cooked, they were out of scallops. It came with shrimp that were ok. It came with potatoes and corn that were under cooked, and broccoli, that was ok. Then they charged a 13% service charge, which the bartender tried to tell me that was not a tip, although, the receipt had a line for additional tip. So if thats not a tip why is there a space for additional tip? Wouldn't it just say Tip? So I'm supposed to pay 13% service charge + 15% tip? 28% extra? These people crazy. NEVER GOING BACK
I see why it's always empty.

reviews.author: Allimarie Wallace
reviews.text:
I brought my son here for lunch and he enjoyed himself. Their food is okay and the DJ was a nice touch. We spent $100 including tip for 2 appetizers, 2 entrees, and 2 drinks so that was pretty good. I feel like things are appropriately priced and service was good.
My only issue is that the dining area was not clean. The inside seating needs a deep clean, including the little accents they leave on the table. Everything was dusty, and there was food everywhere like it wasn't cleaned when the last people left. I probably won't return, but I'm glad I gave it a try.

reviews.author: Valdenia Simmons
reviews.text: I had the cod and shrimp basket. Husband shrimp were served hot, cooked nicely with ample portions. I wasn't allowed to switch out the fries for a veggie so I went with broccoli and Mac-n-cheese @$5 each. The Mac was extremely oily and salty. Couldn’t eat it. The broccoli looked okay but it was cold, decided to take it home to eat with my leftover fish. Scored down on ambiance because the place needed tidying up (wipe down table tops and seats). No cocktail sauce and the young lady didn't offer water. Drink didn't come with the meal so I paid $38 total. Might try them again but will stick with a sandwich. Lots to like but the little things dinged my experience a bit.

reviews.author: Brian Lawson
reviews.text: Off the beaten path.  I thought they were  closed. I had the Fried Seafood basket. The Whitting tasted  fresh. The shrimp were cooked to perfection. The crab cake didn't taste like  fresh  crab meat. Almost tasted like it was canned. Great taste, though. Great customer service!! Plenty of parking. Military discount, too. Overall, it was a good  experience.

reviews.author: Rena Rich
reviews.text:
Come with me to Tredrick’s who is now serving up cocktails! Crab legs and a cocktail? Yes please! They have inside seating as well as patio seating with tv’s to catch a game. Free parking is available.

Featured:
- 1lb mussels
- Fish & Shrimp
- Lobster tail & Crab legs
- Shrimp & Grits (I prefer mine more buttery)
- Chicken & French Toast (love me a bone in spot!)

In addition to seafood, they serve breakfast all day & hookah is available. Everything especially the chicken was seasonedddddd and the french toast was so good!
Check them out!

address: 183 Ralph David Abernathy Blvd SW, Atlanta, Georgia, 30312
google_address: 181 Ralph David Abernathy Blvd, Atlanta, GA 30312, USA

reviews.author: jasmine mcneil
reviews.text: Loved the ambience of the venue. I think this is a great place to have parties, weddings, corporate events. Loved the decor and the different vibes on each level. The rum punch is great. Love the outside games and the people were friendly. Bathrooms were moderately clean.

reviews.author: Jennifer Z
reviews.text:
I scheduled this as a surprise gift for my husband & it absolutely blew his mind! He had such a great time. Had a smile for the entire duration!
Thank you so much Brittany & the Loco staff for putting this on & making such an unforgettable event! We will be coming back!
Hurry up 2026 dates!!! We are so excited!

reviews.author: Brook Tewodros
reviews.text: One of the best EDM music halls Ive been to. They have a great sound system, great porch balcony area, the energy of the bartenders is always right too

reviews.author: Rick Hunter
reviews.text: I loved this place. I love the layout. You've got great views of the stage from pretty much anywhere. The VIP area is nice. Probably my favorite aspect of the whole place is that it has tons of outdoor seating for people to talk and hangout. Great bartenders and friendly staff.

reviews.author: koko budder
reviews.text: Came to see Don Trip and Starlito's Step Brothers 4 concert tour. It was great. Quick entry, not a lot  of seating, but I was able to get upfront.

address: 3349 Martin Luther King Jr Dr SW, Atlanta, Georgia, 30331
google_address: 3349 M.L.K. Jr Dr SW, Atlanta, GA 30331, USA

reviews.author: preshus nelson
reviews.text: I ordered a family 8 piece meal Plus an extra large mashed potato and this is what I got. I’ve been coming here for years but this is the third time they don’t messed up on my order so I guess it’s time for me to go somewhere else.. I don’t mind spending my money, but you’re not gonna play with me neither…

reviews.author: Saleemah Gibbs
reviews.text: I usually love Popeyes, but I was really disappointed this time. I received only half of my sides, which was very unprofessional and frustrating

reviews.author: Pnon
reviews.text: I got the 10 piece chicken for $16.99 and they gave me spices and the chicken is steal  I tried to call because I was not near and no one answered the phone so I hope when I go back they will get my order right I got this for my kids to eat and end up had to cook because they did not want the hard chicken I wish I can give them no stars

reviews.author: Christopher
reviews.text:
06/22/25 Update: I live in the area and frequently visit this Popeyes at 3349 Martin Luther King Jr. Dr., but I’ve reached my limit with the poor service. If you arrive after 9:00 or 9:30 PM—despite the posted closing time being midnight—expect very limited options. No fries, no mac & cheese, and sometimes even the chicken selection is minimal.

The lead staff member, Jamila, who appears to be in a management or supervisory role, consistently displays poor customer service. She often seems rushed, and her tone comes off as dismissive and unprofessional. This is not the kind of attitude a customer should encounter, especially from leadership.

Additionally, the staff mops the floors with excessive water right near the drive-thru window. This not only looks unclean but is also a serious safety hazard.

This location needs urgent improvement in customer service, food availability during listed hours, and basic safety and cleanliness protocols. Jamila’s behavior in particular needs to be addressed—I’ve tolerated it long enough.

The lines are long, and the customer service is despicable. Employees bringing food to the car look like they are dressed for the club. If you are looking for any specials, please have a coupon, or download the Popeyes app. It is hard to get in this location because it’s next to Cascade skating rink, so be prepared for traffic,  poor customer service, and they say t no macaroni and cheese is available; I was looking forward to the macaroni and cheese🤓.

reviews.author: John Robinson
reviews.text: The customer service today was amazing! I received wrong order and the ladies were very nice and kind. They made sure it was fixed and they smiled!!! The drive thru cashier was very kind and respectful and that goes a long way!!! Bravo to that manager!!!

address: 733 Joseph E Boone Blvd NW, Atlanta, Georgia, 30314
google_address: 733 Joseph E. Boone Blvd NW, Atlanta, GA 30314, USA

reviews.author: nat
reviews.text: Ordered a chicken fried rice lunch special for delivery, it took almost 2 hours. received shrimp fried rice and egg rolls instead of spring roll. the egg drop soup is like jello. it’s gooey. it’s nasty. the delivery driver asked if i was paying in cash and had to remind him i ordered and paid online, then made a comment about leaving a better tip. this is a waste of money.

reviews.author: Nika Williams
reviews.text:
Zero Stars if I could
Shiii horrible $21.31 wasted..9/30/25...
All i ordered was Sweet n Sour chicken with fried rice and crab ragoon..
I ordered delivery to be told AFTER payment was 1hr..
Go pick up to only be compensated a can soda for my delivery fees that was paid $5.71....
No vegetables at least in the rice and it was dry no flavor. Rice tasted like it had fumes of lighter fluid on it.. no flavor
Chicken was fried extra hard to were it wasn't eatable smh
Crab Ragoons was dry no filling & over cooked.. the sauce was/is like Jello and thick (sweet n sour sauce)
1st time ordering and The Last Time...

Edited next day after payment cleared.. 10/1/25
I wake up to the final payment and guess what the cashier added a tip I DID NOT AUTHORIZE. So I'll be paying them a visit and filing a police report of theft by that cashier. I clearly wrote $0 as a tip on my receipt!!!
FOOD NOR CUSTOMER SERVICE WAS WORTH A TIP..

reviews.author: Dempsey R
reviews.text:
Rating based on the food only, as I ordered through Uber Eats. Lessons learned for me, as I am visiting ATL & did not bother looking at google reviews prior to ordering on the app. I dont like wasting food, but was not going to risk getting sick during travel. Ordered the following on 08/05/2025 through Uber Eats:

Dan Dan noodles 0/5 - if you google the dish, you will see it comes generally dry sauced with minced meat & I am very familiar with the dish. Lucky china 8's description on the app, also states "Topped with green onions, fresh seasonal vegetables & seasoned ground beef". What arrived was nothing like the description, it comes drenced in some mystery tasting sauce, no vegetables and no single piece of ground beef.

Zhong Style dumplings 2/5- The description provided on the app was "Our famous & award-winning boiled dumpling... topped with sesame seeds & fresh green onions".

I can verify that the green onions are fresh, but sesame seeds were missing. As for what award this dish received... I dont think it was for best taste. Dumplings were topped generously with a similar sauce they put on the Dan Dan noodles.

To add insult to injury, the fortune cookies they provided with the order was stale & dense - one had no fortune, the other states "Tell a joke"

Would I revisit? A strong NAO.
Would I recommend? Another strong NAO.

reviews.author: Joshua Garcia-Barreto
reviews.text: I didn’t get anything to crazy. Just some egg rolls, fried dumplings, and crab Rangoon’s. The Egg-rolls and Dumplings were mid. The Rangoon’s on the other hand absolutely not! Chewy and the sauce was like a red sauce with jello consistency. The restaurant is also not very clean.Wanted to give it a try but not sure if I’ll return unless desperate.

reviews.author: Virginia Latimore
reviews.text: How is this wonton egg drop soup if there barely anything of either in the soup…. ONE wonton per bowl is horrible…. The lady up front with braids was very dry and stand offish as if she didn’t want to be there in there first place… I guess you get the quality food of where you go….

google_name: Love at First Bite ATL Brunch
google_address: 1800 Jonesboro Rd SE Suite D, Atlanta, GA 30315, USA

reviews.author: Starr Davis
reviews.text:
Cute and cozy atmosphere. Friendly staff, attentive service.
Delicious food. Pancake is on the cakey side, not fluffy, and tasty. Need extra syrup 😀
Fish and grits was delicious. Big portion, definitely shareable.
Deviled eggs came with candied bacon, interesting and yummy.
Coffee was good, came in a pleasant presentation.
Pricing is reasonable.
Large parking lot.
Located in a rough looking neighborhood. If wasn’t for the reviews. We will never come in if passing by.
Do recommend by @winedinenvacay

reviews.author: Jassy Jass
reviews.text: My family and I were out of town and came to eat here. The inside is clean and decorated very nicely. The music was great. The food was amazing ! and our server Kel was great. He was friendly and very conversational. Whenever we are back in this area we will definitely come back here.

reviews.author: Che Johnson
reviews.text: I love this black owned restaurant , quaint with a nice and  ambience and I love that they have a black owned coffee shop downstairs as well. The servers were very friendly. The food was delicious. I had the  fried catfish and grits. Loved every bit of it. Just a quick reminder to out of town guests  like  myself , when you order ice tea just know  it’s gonna be sweet tea lol I wasn’t ready. I do recommend and I will be back to visit when I’m back in town.

reviews.author: Yolanda Wright
reviews.text: We came here for a Father’s Day meal and had a great time. It was a pleasant, clean atmosphere and the food was delicious. I had the Breakfast Tacos and my husband had the French Toast Sandwich. We also got the Salmon on Toast.The salmon was perfectly prepared and well seasoned. We only waited about 15 minutes to be seated and the food came out quickly. In fact we had barely finished the appetizer when the main meal served. Looking forward to eating there again.

reviews.author: Freddie Ross
reviews.text:
This was my first time here. My girlfriend and I found it by accident, and I can say, I'm glad we found them. I always love to support a black owned business.

The venue is very nice and the atmosphere is very chill. The food is amazing. I ordered the oreo waffle, and to my surprise, it wasn't overly sweet.

If you're looking for a small low-key breakfast lounge vibe, then this is the spot for you.

google_address: 581 Metropolitan Pkwy SW, Atlanta, GA 30310, USA

reviews.author: Catherine
reviews.text: always a staple when i’m in the area! love great pizza and love black owned businesses! the pizza was piping hot and the ingredients were fresh. the chefs really know what they’re doing! and we came on $10 tuesday which i had no idea was a thing. ms. regina i believe her name is was exceptional. she made our night really special and the first visit for my man even more enjoyable. shoutout to her she deserves it all!!! thank you and much love!!!

reviews.author: X. Moorer
reviews.text: Slim & Husky is a cool cultural gem. The food is okay and has flavor. Having lived in NYC and knowing what pizza really is, it is a challenge to critique the pies here. The ingredients taste fresh and service is good in this Atlanta location. The frozen drink machine was out of my beverage of choice and the team felt bad enough to give me an alternative for free. Our food was filling but pricey for what it was and how it taste. Eat the cinnamon rolls upon ordering, they will get hard after that. The garlic knots come a set of 2 but they are good. The wings are pretty small and lemon pepper has decent flavor. I'm happy to support anyway. The spot is a vibe from the playlist to the ambiance. Parking gets scarce when it gets busy. Order ahead for a quick pick up at the to-go window in the back.

reviews.author: Brian Lawson
reviews.text:
I recently stopped by Slim & Husky’s and tried the House Party pizza, and I’ve got to say—it lived up to the hype. The combination of classic red sauce, the S+H house cheese blend, pork pepperoni, and Italian sausage delivered big on flavor. Everything tasted fresh, well-balanced, and not overly greasy—just clean, quality ingredients.

The vibe inside was just as impressive as the food. The walls are covered in bold, creative artwork that gives the place a unique personality and adds to the overall experience. Ordering was a breeze, too—sleek digital kiosks made the process fast and easy.
/
If you're looking for a flavorful, no-fuss pizza spot with style, Slim & Husky’s is definitely worth the visit. I’ll be back for another slice soon.

reviews.author: Hafsa Kamara
reviews.text:
I was looking forward to giving it a try b/c saw good reviews but was fooled and very disappointed. The pizza was rubbery and undercooked. You can tell by the way the dough and cheese looks and tastes. Like Unfortunately was not edible enough for me to continue eating and had to throw it away ver disheartening.

Also placing sauce containers on food is an unsanitary practice that needs to change.

reviews.author: M Long
reviews.text:
They burnt my pizza. They still boxed my pizza, which is a lack of integrity. I didn't have my car so someone picked it up for me. I was very disappointed as I am quite hungry.  I had to remove the toppings that I paid  for and basically had a cheese pizza for 18 dollars.   This pic is of the "nuthhin but a V thang". It is already not real meat, so it only needs to be warmed not over cooked.
It is inedible at this point.
